## 设置系统启动选项（Set System Boot Options）

命令功能

设置系统启动选项。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>Chassis 00h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>08h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Parameter valid</p>
<p>[7]- 1b=mark parameter invalid/locked</p>
<p>0b=mark parameter valid/unlocked</p>
<p>[6:0]-boot option parameter selector</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(2:N)</td>
<td><p>Boot option parameter data, <a href="#table02449305532">表8-1 Boot Option Parameters</a>.</p>
<p>Passing 0-bytes of parameter data allow the parameter valid bit to be changed without affecting the present parameter setting.</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>Completion Code. Generic plus the following command-specific completion</p>
<p>codes:</p>
<p>80h=parameter not supported.</p>
<p>81h=attempt to set the 'set in progress' value (in parameter #0) when not in</p>
<p>the 'set complete' state. (This completion code provides a way to recognize that another party has already 'claimed' the parameters.)</p>
<p>82h=attempt to write read-only parameter</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

参考信息

1.  Boot Option Parameters

<table style="width:83%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 17%" />
<col style="width: 7%" />
<col style="width: 56%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>#</th>
<th>Parameter Data</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Set In Progress</td>
<td>00h</td>
<td><p>data 1-This parameter is used to indicate when any of the following parameters are being updated, and when the updates are completed.</p>
<p>[7:2]-reserved</p>
<p>[1:0]</p>
<p>- 00b=set complete. If a system reset or transition to powered down state occurs while ‘set in progress’ is active, the BMC will go to the ‘set complete’ state. If rollback is implemented, going directly to ‘set complete’ without first doing a ‘commit write’ will cause any pending write data to be discarded.</p>
<p>-01b=set in progress. This flag indicates that some utility or other software is presently doing writes to parameter data. It is a notification flag only, it is not a resource lock. The BMC does not provide any interlock mechanism that would prevent other software from writing parameter data while.</p>
<p>-10b=commit write (optional). This is only used if a rollback is implemented. The BMC will save the data that has been written since the last time the ‘set in progress’ and then go to the ‘set in progress’ state. An error completion code will be returned if this option is not supported.</p>
<p>-11b=reserved</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Service Partition Selector</td>
<td>01h</td>
<td><p>data 1</p>
<p>[7:0]-service partition selector. This value is used to select which service partition BIOS should boot using. This document doesn’t specify which value corresponds to a particular service partition. 00h=unspecified.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Service Partition Scan</td>
<td>02h</td>
<td><p>data 1</p>
<p>[7:2] – reserved</p>
<p>[1]-1b=Request BIOS to scan for specified service partition. BIOS clears this bit after the requested scan has been performed.</p>
<p>[0]-1b=Service Partition discovered. BIOS sets this bit to indicate it has discovered the specified service partition. The bit retains the value from the last scan. Therefore, to get up-to-date status of the discovery state, a scan may need to be requested.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>BMC Boot Flag Valid Bit Clearing</td>
<td>03h</td>
<td><p>data 1- BMC boot flag valid bit clearing. Default=0000b. [7:5] – reserved</p>
<p>[4]-1b=don’t clear valid bit on reset/power cycle caused by PEF</p>
<p>[3]-1b=don’t automatically clear boot flag valid bit if Chassis Control command not received within 60-second timeout (countdown restarts when a Chassis Control command is received)</p>
<p>[2]-1b=don’t clear valid bit on reset/power cycle caused by watchdog timeout</p>
<p>[1]-1b=don’t clear valid bit on pushbutton reset/soft-reset (e.g. “Ctrl-Alt-Del”) [0]-1b=don’t clear valid bit on power up via power pushbutton or wake event</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Boot Info Acknowledge</td>
<td>04h</td>
<td><p>data 1: Write Mask (‘write-only’. This field is returned as 00h when read. This is to eliminate the need for the BMC to provide storage for the Write Mask field.)</p>
<p>[7]-1b=enable write to bit 7 of Data field</p>
<p>[6]-1b=enable write to bit 6 of Data field</p>
<p>[5]-1b=enable write to bit 5 of Data field</p>
<p>[4]-1b=enable write to bit 4 of Data field</p>
<p>[3]-1b=enable write to bit 3 of Data field</p>
<p>[2]-1b=enable write to bit 2 of Data field</p>
<p>[1]-1b=enable write to bit 1 of Data field</p>
<p>[0]-1b=enable write to bit 0 of Data field</p>
<p>data 2:Boot Initiator Acknowledge Data The boot initiator should typically write FFh to this parameter prior to initiating the boot. The boot initiator may write 0’s if it wants to intentionally direct a given party to ignore the boot info. This field is automatically initialized to 00h when the management controller is first powered up or reset.</p>
<p>[7]-reserved. Write as 1b. Ignore on read.</p>
<p>[6]-reserved. Write as 1b. Ignore on read.</p>
<p>[5]-reserved. Write as 1b. Ignore on read.</p>
<p>[4]-0b=OEM has handled boot info.</p>
<p>[3]-0b=SMS has handled boot info.</p>
<p>[2]-0b=OS/service partition has handled boot info.</p>
<p>[1]-0b=OS Loader has handled boot info.</p>
<p>[0]-0b=BIOS/POST has handled boot info.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Boot Flags</td>
<td>05h</td>
<td><p>data 1</p>
<p>[7]-1b=boot flags valid. The bit should be set to indicate that valid flag data is present. This bit may be automatically cleared based on the boot flag valid bit clearing parameter, above.</p>
<p>[6]-0b=options apply to next boot only.</p>
<p>1b=options requested to be persistent for all future boots (i.e. requests BIOS to change its boot settings) Note: In order to set this bit remotely (over a session), the user must execute the Set System Boot Options command at ADMIN privilege level. In order to retain backward compatibility, this bit will be AUTOMATICALLY CLEARED by the BMC whenever the boot flags valid bit is clear (0b). This is to avoid the possibility that this bit would already be set when an older application changes other options. Thus, this bit and the boot flags valid bit must be set simultaneously.</p>
<p>[5]-BIOS boot type (for BIOS that support both legacy and EFI boots) 0b=“PC compatible” boot (legacy)</p>
<p>1b=Extensible Firmware Interface Boot (EFI)</p>
<p>[4:0]-reserved</p>
<p>data 2</p>
<p>[7]-1b=CMOS clear Intelligent Platform Management Interface Specification 383</p>
<p>[6]-1b=Lock Keyboard</p>
<p>[5:2]-Boot device selector</p>
<p>0000b=No override</p>
<p>0001b=Force PXE</p>
<p>0010b=Force boot from default Hard-drive</p>
<p>0011b=Force boot from default Hard-drive, request Safe</p>
<p>0100b=Force boot from default Diagnostic Partition</p>
<p>0101b=Force boot from default CD/DVD</p>
<p>0110b=Force boot into BIOS Setup</p>
<p>0111b-1110b=Reserved 1111b=Force boot from Floppy/primary removable media</p>
<p>[1]-1b=Screen Blank</p>
<p>[0]-1b=Lock out Reset buttons</p>
<p>data 3</p>
<p>[7]-1b=Lock out (power off/ sleep request) via Power Button</p>
<p>[6:5]-Firmware (BIOS) Verbosity (Directs what appears on POST display)</p>
<p>00b=system default</p>
<p>01b=request quiet display</p>
<p>10b=request verbose display</p>
<p>11b=reserved</p>
<p>[4]-1b=Force progress event traps ~. When set to 1b, the BMC transmits PET traps for BIOS progress events to the LAN or serial/modem destination for the session that set the flag. Since this capability uses PET traps, this bit will be ignored if for connection modes that do not support PET such as Basic Mode and Terminal Mode.</p>
<p>[3]-1b=User password bypass ~. When set to 1b, the managed client’s BIOS boots the system and bypasses any user or boot password that might be set in the system. This option allows a system administrator to, for example, force a system boot via PXE in an unattended manner. It is recommended that ADMINISTRATOR Privilege Level be required to set this bit if this feature is supported in a given BIOS. (To set this bit remotely (over a session) the Set Boot Options command must be executed at ADMIN level)</p>
<p>[2]-1b=Lock Out Sleep Button ~. When set to 1b, directs BIOS to disable the sleep button operation for the system, normally until the next boot cycle. Client instrumentation might provide the capability to re-enable the button functionality without rebooting. (This only applies to systems that have a separate sleep button on the chassis.)</p>
<p>[1:0]-Console Redirection control</p>
<p>00b=console redirection occurs per BIOS configuration setting (system default)</p>
<p>01b=suppress (skip) console redirection if enabled</p>
<p>10b=request console redirection be enabled</p>
<p>11b=reserved</p>
<p>data 4</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3]-BIOS Shared Mode Override</p>
<p>1b=Request BIOS to temporarily set the access mode for the channel specified in parameter #6 to ‘Shared’. This is typically accomplished by sending a ‘Set Channel Access’ command to set the volatile access mode setting in the BMC[4].</p>
<p>0b=No request to BIOS to change present access mode setting.</p>
<p>[2:0]-BIOS Mux Control Override</p>
<p>000b=BIOS uses recommended setting of the mux at the end of POST (See Table 14-2, Serial Port Sharing Access Characteristics for more info.)</p>
<p>001b=Requests BIOS to force mux to BMC at conclusion of POST/start of OSboot. If honored, this will override the recommended setting of the mux at the end of POST</p>
<p>010b=Requests BIOS to force mux to system at conclusion of POST/start of OSboot. If honored, this will override the recommended setting of the mux at the end of POST</p>
<p>data 5-reserved</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Boot Initiator Info</td>
<td>06h</td>
<td><p>Address &amp; Identity information for the party that initiated the boot.</p>
<p>data 1- Channel Number. Channel that will deliver the boot command (e.g. chassis control). BIOS and boot software (e.g. service partition or OS loader) can use the Get Channel SessionsGet Session Info command to find out information about the party that initiated the boot.</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-Channel Number</p>
<p>data 2:5-Session ID. Session ID for session that the boot command will be issued over. This value can be used with the Get Channel SessionsGet Session Info command to find out information about the party that initiated the boot. For IPMI v2.0/RMCP+ this is the Managed System Session ID that was generated by the BMC when the session was activated.</p>
<p>data 6:9-Boot Info Timestamp. This timestamp is used to help software determine whether the boot information is ‘stale’ or not. A service partition or OS loader may elect to ignore the boot information if it is older than expected. The boot initiator should load this field with the timestamp value from the Get SEL Time command prior to issuing the command that initiates the boot.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Boot Initiator Mailbox</td>
<td>07h</td>
<td><p>This parameter is used as a ‘mailbox’ for holding information that directs the operation of the OS loader or service partition software.</p>
<p>data1: Set Selector=block selector Selects which 16-byte info block to access. 0-based.</p>
<p>data 2:(17) block data</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>BIOS ID</td>
<td>60h</td>
<td><p>data1-cpu selector</p>
<p>must be 0x00</p>
<p>data2-boot_biosID</p>
<p>0x00--bios 0</p>
<p>0x01--bios 1</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Power off timeout/PXE Option</td>
<td>62h</td>
<td><p>Power off timeout(M project only):</p>
<p>data 1:2-ShutdownTime, LSB First.</p>
<p>PXE Option:</p>
<p>data1-pxe option</p>
<p>[7:4] Reserved</p>
<p>[3] enable PXE2</p>
<p>[2] enable PEX1</p>
<p>[1] 1b, boot from PXE enable</p>
<p>0b, boot from PXE disable</p>
<p>[0] 1b, boot from PXE2(Base1)</p>
<p>0b, boot from PXE1(Base0)</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>BIOS write protect</td>
<td>63h</td>
<td><p>data1</p>
<p>7:4--bios id</p>
<p>3:0--protect state（待查代码确认）</p>
<p>00h protect enable</p>
<p>01h protect disable</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Pre-timeout Interrupt</td>
<td>64h</td>
<td><p>data1 -Block Selector</p>
<p>data2:4- Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</p>
<p>data5 -Event Type</p>
<p>00h诊断中断事件</p>
<p>other Reserved</p>
<p>data6-Interrupt Type（当Event Type 为0时，表示中断类型）</p>
<p>00h-none</p>
<p>01h-SMI</p>
<p>02h-NMI/Diagnostic Interrupt</p>
<p>03h-Messaging Interrupt</p>
<p>other Reserved</p>
<p>data7:8-事件原因</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Power on delay</td>
<td>65h</td>
<td><p>data1~3 Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</p>
<p>data 4-delay mode</p>
<p>0: only short term delay.//禁止长延时，只有短延时(R1延时方案)；是出厂默认设置。</p>
<p>1：long term half delay, half the servers selected randomly are delayed.//长延时，可能会有几十秒的延时，随机选择一半进行延时，是当前核心网应用场景。</p>
<p>2：long term fix delay, all servers are delayed.//不随机，所有指定的服务器均进行长延时。不确定场景，用于未来扩展。</p>
<p>3：random delay，all servers are delayed.//随机延迟，(0,指定时间]内随机延迟)</p>
<p>all others: reserved.</p>
<p>data 5~8-delay count, 100ms/count, 0h=use default delay time</p>
<p>说明</p>
<p>delay count&gt;=1200, use default max delay time(1200).</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>logic device id</td>
<td>66h</td>
<td><p>data1:3- Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</p>
<p>data 4:7-Managed system logic device id</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取系统启动选项（Get System Boot Options）

命令功能

获取系统启动选项。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>Chassis 00h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>09h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Parameter selector</p>
<p>[7]-reserved</p>
<p>[6:0]-boot option parameter selector</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>[7:0]-Set Selector</p>
<p>Selects a particular block or set of parameters under the given parameter</p>
<p>selector.</p>
<p>Write as 00h if parameter doesn't use a Set Selector</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><p>[7:0]-Block Selector</p>
<p>Selects a particular block within a set of parameters.</p>
<p>Write as 00h if parameter doesn't use a Block Selector.</p>
<p>说明</p>
<p>As of this writing, there are no IPMI-specified Boot Options parameters</p>
<p>that use the block selector. However, this field is provided for consistency with other configuration commands and as a placeholder for future extension of the IPMI specification.</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code. Generic plus the following command-specific completion</p>
<p>codes:</p>
<p>80h=parameter not supported.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-parameter version. 1h for this specification unless otherwise specified.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><p>Parameter valid</p>
<p>[7]-1b=parameter marked invalid/locked</p>
<p>0b=parameter marked valid/unlocked</p>
<p>[6:0]-boot option parameter selector</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4:N</td>
<td><p>Configuration parameter data, per Table 8-3, Boot Option Parameters.</p>
<p>If the rollback feature is implemented, the BMC makes a copy of the existing</p>
<p>parameters when the 'set in progress' state becomes asserted (See the Set In</p>
<p>Progress parameter #0). While the 'set in progress' state is active, the BMC</p>
<p>will return data from this copy of the parameters, plus any uncommitted</p>
<p>changes that were made to the data. Otherwise, the BMC returns parameter</p>
<p>data from non-volatile storage.</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取/设置已缓存的BIOS升级模式（Set/Get Cached BIOS Upgrade Mode）

命令功能

获取/设置已缓存的BIOS升级模式

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>92h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=43h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Cached BIOS Upgrade Mode命令行为</p>
<p>0x00：设置</p>
<p>0x01：查询</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>Cached BIOS Upgrade Mode开关，当Byte5为0x00的时候有效</p>
<p>0x00：OS重启及下电均生效缓存的BIOS（默认）</p>
<p>0x01：仅OS下电生效缓存的BIOS</p>
<p>0x02：OS重启及下电均不生效缓存的BIOS</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>d6-说明该命令在BMC侧未注册，功能不支持。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。当请求Byte5=0x01时存在此字段。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>对应开关状态，当请求Byte5=0x01时存在，返回结果</p>
<p>0x00：OS重启及下电均生效缓存的BIOS（默认）</p>
<p>0x01：仅OS下电生效缓存的BIOS</p>
<p>0x02：OS重启及下电均不生效缓存的BIOS</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## BIOS上报系统复位/平滑关机状态（BIOS Post Host Restart/Power Off Type）

命令功能

BIOS上报系统复位/平滑关机状态。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>参数（字节）</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>93h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=5ch</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5~6</td>
<td><p>Byte5的定义：</p>
<ul>
<li><p>系统上电过程中：1</p></li>
<li><p>系统下电过程中：0</p></li>
</ul>
<p>Byte5为1时：</p>
<p>0x0100：hard reset</p>
<p>0x0101：warm reset</p>
<p>Byte5为0时：</p>
<p>0x0000：host OS Graceful Shutdown</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |

## 设置设备状态（Set Device Status）

命令功能

设置设备状态。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>参数（字节）</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>92h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=05h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>Device ID，参见<a href="#table15703203464518">表8-2 BIOS上报事件定义 Device Status Code</a></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>[7]-event direction</p>
<p>0=assertion(告警产生)</p>
<p>1=deassertion(告警恢复)</p>
<p>[6:0]-segment, 1 based，对于高性能服务器9032等，每个segment表示一个4P系统，BDF是以4P系统编号的；为了兼容之前产品以及便于BMC统一处理，对于8100和其它4P系统及以下系统等不需要通过segment区分BDF的，则segment始终为0。</p>
<p>Note：Device ID=10h</p>
<p>byte6：</p>
<p>1：BIOS上报POST阶段完成</p>
<p>0：BIOS POST阶段未完成</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td>device status1</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td>device status2</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9</td>
<td>device status3</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>10</td>
<td>device status4</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>11</td>
<td>device status5</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>12</td>
<td>device status6</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>13:N</td>
<td><p>device status7</p>
<p>……</p>
<p>device statusN</p>
<p>考虑后续扩展，不限制device status个数。</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>特例场景</th>
<th>说明</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>当device status1（字节7）为0x0D表示上报UPI链路故障</td>
<td><p>X86机型：device status3（字节9）表示对应的UPI端口号</p>
<p>ARM机型：device status5（字节11）表示对应的UPI端口号</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |

## 查询设备状态（Get Device Status）

命令功能

查询设备状态。

参数说明

| 参数（字节） | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| NetFn | 30h |
| CMD | 92h |
| 1:3 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 4 | Sub command，子命令=06h |
| 5 | Device ID[表8-2 BIOS上报事件定义 Device Status Code](#table15703203464518) |
| 6 | reserved. |

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 5 | device status1 |
| 6 | device status2 |
| 7 | device status3 |
| 8 | device status4 |
| 9 | device status5 |
| 10 | device status6 |

参考信息

1.  BIOS上报事件定义 Device Status Code

<table style="width:83%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 8%" />
<col style="width: 8%" />
<col style="width: 7%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 38%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th rowspan="2"><strong>部件</strong></th>
<th colspan="3"><strong>BIOS -&gt; BMC事件格式</strong></th>
<th><strong>BIOS</strong></th>
</tr>
<tr>
<th><strong>Device ID</strong></th>
<th><strong>Device Status1</strong></th>
<th><strong>Event</strong></th>
<th><strong>告警描述</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td rowspan="16">CPU</td>
<td rowspan="16">01h</td>
<td>00h</td>
<td>Firmware Mismatch</td>
<td>系统开机时，检测CPU微码是否有加载，如果有异常，通过BT消息上报异常信息给BMC。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>01h</td>
<td><p>CPU Mismatch</p>
<p>Device Status2：CPU ID</p></td>
<td>判断CPU是否在支持范围内。如果不在支持范围内，通过BT消息上报BMC异常。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>02h</td>
<td><p>CPU BIST Failure</p>
<p>Device Status2：CPU ID</p>
<p>Device Status3：Cache Way Number低8位</p>
<p>Device Status4：Cache Way Number高8位</p>
<p>Device Status3：Isolation core number隔离核数低8位</p>
<p>Device Status3：Isolation core number隔离核数高8位</p></td>
<td><p>系统开机时，CPU进行BIST检测，如果有异常，在能开机的情况下，通过BT消息上报异常信息给BMC。</p>
<p>Device Status3~6仅存储产品BMC会解析，计算及TCE产品BMC不会解析，接口兼容。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>04h</td>
<td><p>Cpu Offline Succeed</p>
<p>Device Status2：CPU ID</p></td>
<td>cpu offline成功,即将某个CPU成功隔离，属于消息级别，可用于BMC实时监控当前工作CPU是否在线【EX】</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>05h</td>
<td><p>Unsupported opcode</p>
<p>Device Status2：CPU ID</p></td>
<td>运行时CPU执行不支持的机器码导致错误，该错误为致命错误【EX】</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>07h</td>
<td><p>VMSE Link Failure In Mirror Mode</p>
<p>Device Status2：CPU ID</p>
<p>Device Status3：VMSE Channel</p>
<p>Device Status4：Node ID</p></td>
<td>内存镜像模式下，SMI2链路失效，属于不可纠正但可恢复错误【EX】</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>08h</td>
<td><p>VMSE Link Failure</p>
<p>Device Status2：CPU ID</p>
<p>Device Status3：VMSE Channel</p>
<p>Device Status4：Node ID</p></td>
<td>非内存镜像模式下，SMI2链路失效，属于致命错误【EX】</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>09h</td>
<td><p>VMSE Err Observed</p>
<p>Device Status2：CPU ID</p>
<p>Device Status3：VMSE Channel</p>
<p>Device Status4：Node ID</p></td>
<td>Jordan Creek内部发现错误，属于不可纠正非致命错误【EX】</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>0ah</td>
<td><p>VMSE DIMM Register Parity Error</p>
<p>Device Status2：CPU ID</p>
<p>Device Status3：VMSE Channel</p>
<p>Device Status4：Node ID</p></td>
<td>VMSE链路发生奇偶校验错误，属于致命错误【EX】</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>0bh</td>
<td><p>VMSE Nb Persistent Counter Reached</p>
<p>Device Status2：CPU ID</p>
<p>Device Status3：VMSE Channel</p>
<p>Device Status4：Node ID</p></td>
<td>数据从Jordan Creek发往内存控制器的途中产生的错误达到门限值，属于非致命错误【EX】</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>0ch</td>
<td><p>VMSE Sb Persistent Counter Reached</p>
<p>Device Status2：CPU ID</p>
<p>Device Status3：VMSE Channel</p>
<p>Device Status4：Node ID</p></td>
<td>数据从内存控制器发往Jordan Creek的途中产生的错误达到门限值，属于非致命错误【EX】</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>0dh</td>
<td><p>Qpi Error Detected</p>
<p>Device Status2：CPU ID</p>
<p>Device Status3：QPI ID</p>
<p>Device Status4：MSCOD</p>
<p>Device Status5：Current Tx Lane(start with 1)</p>
<p>Device Status6：Current Rx Lane(start with 1)</p></td>
<td><p>QPI链路发生故障</p>
<p>MSCOD：有助于定位具体什么原因引起故障</p>
<p>事件码：</p>
<p>0x00--上电检测到QPI故障(Config error)</p>
<p>0x01--上电自检检测到QPI Link Failure</p>
<p>0x02--上电自检检测到QPI Degrade Failure</p>
<p>Current Tx Lane：默认0x14，如果不等于该值，说明是TX方面的链路有问题</p>
<p>Current Rx Lane：默认0x14，如果不等于该值，说明是RX方面的链路有问题</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>0eh</td>
<td><p>Socket Boot Isolation</p>
<p>Device Status2：CPU ID</p></td>
<td><p>启动阶段，CPU自检不通过进行隔离，将隔离的socket信息反馈给BMC</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>0fh</td>
<td><p>Core Boot Isolation</p>
<p>Device Status2：CPU ID</p>
<p>Device Status3：Core ID Bitmap</p>
<p>bit0~bit7分别对应Core0~Core7</p>
<p>Device Status4：Core ID Bitmap</p>
<p>bit0~bit7分别对应Core8~Core15</p>
<p>Device Status5：Core ID Bitmap</p>
<p>bit0~bit7分别对应Core16~Core23</p>
<p>……</p>
<p>考虑后续扩展性，不限制Device Status的个数</p></td>
<td><p>启动阶段，core自检不通过进行隔离，将隔离的core信息反馈给BMC</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>10h</td>
<td><p>PCI resource configuration</p>
<p>Device Status2：CPU ID</p></td>
<td><p>启动阶段，在受限的slot上插需要IO资源的卡，BIOS会停掉</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>11h</td>
<td><p>Vmse Config Error</p>
<p>Device Status2：CPU ID</p>
<p>Device Status3：Vmse channel id</p>
<p>Device Status4：Node ID</p></td>
<td><p>该错误主要记录启动阶段发送的JC错误，或者CPU与JC间的SMI2通道错误</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td rowspan="6">Pcie</td>
<td rowspan="6">02h</td>
<td>00h</td>
<td rowspan="5"><p>Pcie error：</p>
<p>Device Status 2：Bus</p>
<p>Device Status 3：Device</p>
<p>Device Status 4：Function</p></td>
<td>pcie device fatal error</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>F7h</td>
<td>MMIO resource not enough</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>F8h</td>
<td>legacy IO resource not enough</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>F9h</td>
<td>legacy oprom resource not enough</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>FAh</td>
<td>PCIe Bandwitdh Error</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>F5h</td>
<td><p>Pcie error：</p>
<p>Device Status 2：Bus</p>
<p>Device Status 3：Device</p>
<p>Device Status 4：Function</p>
<p>Device Status 5：MaxSpeed</p>
<p>Device Status 6: NegoSpeed</p></td>
<td>PCie Link Speed Error</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Video</td>
<td>03h</td>
<td>00h</td>
<td>Video device error</td>
<td>显卡芯片异常时，通过BT消息上报BMC</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td rowspan="15">Memory</td>
<td rowspan="15">04h</td>
<td>00h</td>
<td><p>Memory config error:</p>
<p>Device Status 2：NODE ID</p>
<p>Device Status 3：channel id</p>
<p>Device Status 4：dimm id</p>
<p>Device Status 5:serverity (0:invalid,1:ok,2:minor,3:major,4:critical)</p></td>
<td><p>1、内存插法是否正确检测，如果有异常，请能开机的情况下，通过BT消息上报异常信息给BMC</p>
<p>2、检测不到内存情况下，通过BT消息上报BMC没有内存告警</p>
<p>3、DIMM异常检测。如果启动过程中检测到内存，但在最终training完毕后，把内存屏蔽掉。通过BT消息上报BMC异常，同时屏幕打印有内存无法使用的提示信息</p>
<p>4、启动过程中BIOS通过本事件上报所有MRC故障，因为MRC故障是由intel提供的代码直接检测并产生的，目前intel只提供了代码，并未提供任何文档，BIOS无法知道哪些场景会报什么MRC故障，也无法确定各个MRC故障的严重性级别</p>
<p>5、MRC错误的严重性级别由BIOS上报，作为BMC产生告警级别的参考，目前所有MRC故障都统一上报为紧急，保持与现在的Configuration error级别一致，后续如有其它级别上报，需要BIOS调整</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>01h</td>
<td><p>DDDC Sparing</p>
<p>Device Status 2：NODE ID</p>
<p>Device Status 3：channel id</p>
<p>Device Status 4：dimm id</p>
<p>Device Status 5：rank id</p></td>
<td>对于满足DDDC特性的RANK(x4颗粒且使能lock-step)，当RANK上的可纠正错误超过门限值时，BIOS使用该RANK内的冗余颗粒替换故障颗粒，该错误属于可纠正错误</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>02h</td>
<td><p>RANK Sparing</p>
<p>Device Status 2：NODE ID</p>
<p>Device Status 3：channel id</p>
<p>Device Status 4：dimm id</p>
<p>Device Status 5：error rank id</p></td>
<td>在使能内存RANK Sparing特性下，当RANK上的可纠正错误超过门限值时，BIOS使用备份RANK替换故障RANK</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>03h</td>
<td><p>Devicce Tagging</p>
<p>Device Status 2：NODE ID</p>
<p>Device Status 3：channel id</p>
<p>Device Status 4：dimm id</p>
<p>Device Status 5：rank id</p></td>
<td>对于满足DeviceTagging特性的RANK(x4颗粒或者x8颗粒且使能lock-step)，当RANK上的可纠正错误超过门限值时，BIOS使用奇偶颗粒替换故障颗粒，该错误属于可纠正错误</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>04h</td>
<td><p>Memory migration</p>
<p>Device Status 2：ErrorNode</p>
<p>Device Status 3：SpareNode</p>
<p>Device Status 4：EventID</p></td>
<td><p>内存迁移：</p>
<p>ErrorNode：出错内存板</p>
<p>SpareNode：备份板</p>
<p>EventID：迁移事件码</p>
<p>EventID：</p>
<p>0x0：MIGRATION_SUCCESS</p>
<p>0x1：MIGRATION_CFG_ERR</p>
<p>0x2：MIGRATION_NON_NUMA</p>
<p>0x3：MIGRATION_SMALL_MEMSIZE</p>
<p>0x4：MIGRATION_ONLINE_FAIL</p>
<p>0x5：MIGRATION_COPY_FAIL</p>
<p>0x6：MIGRATION_ONLINE_INPROGRESS</p>
<p>0x7：MIGRATION_ONLINE_SUCCESS</p>
<p>0x8：MIGRATION_INPROGRESS</p>
<p>0x9：MIGRATION_BEGIN</p>
<p>0xa：MIGRATION_CANCEL</p>
<p>0xb：MIGRATION_PATROLSCRUB_START</p>
<p>0xc：MIGRATION_PATROLSCRUB_END</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>05h</td>
<td><p>Mirror FailOver</p>
<p>Device Status 2：NODE ID</p>
<p>Device Status 3：channel id</p></td>
<td>在使能内存镜像特性场景下，当某个通道内存发生不可纠正错误时，导致镜像失效，属于可纠正错误范畴【EX】</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>07h</td>
<td><p>Memory Board Add Fail</p>
<p>Device Status 2：NODE ID</p></td>
<td>内存板热插过程中发生错误【EX】</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>08h</td>
<td><p>CE overflow（可纠正错误超过阈值）</p>
<p>Device Status 2：NODE ID</p>
<p>Device Status 3：channel id</p>
<p>Device Status 4：dimm id</p>
<p>Device Status 5：rank id</p></td>
<td>RAS特性生效后的可纠正错误</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>0ah</td>
<td><p>Spare Rank Info</p>
<p>Device Status 2：NODE ID</p>
<p>Device Status 3：channel id</p>
<p>Device Status 4：dimm id</p>
<p>Device Status 5：rank id</p></td>
<td>如果使能了rank sparing，则上报备份的RANK信息</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>0bh</td>
<td><p>Spare Memory Board Info</p>
<p>Device Status 2：NODE ID</p></td>
<td>如果使能了内存迁移，则上报备份的内存板信息【EX】</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>0ch</td>
<td><p>Memory Board Online Succeed</p>
<p>Device Status 2：NODE ID</p></td>
<td><p>内存板Online成功</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>0eh</td>
<td><p>Memory Board Offline Succeed</p>
<p>Device Status 2：NODE ID</p></td>
<td>内存板Offline成功【EX】</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>11h</td>
<td><p>Mirror Node</p>
<p>Device Status2：LowBitmapOfMirrorNode（node0-7）</p>
<p>Device Status3：HighBitmapOfMirrorNode（node8-15）</p>
<p>Device Status4：LowBitmapOfMirrorNode（node16-23）</p>
<p>Device Status5：HighBitmapOfMirrorNode（node24-31）</p>
<p>Device Status6：LowBitmapOfMirrorNode（node32-39）</p>
<p>Device Status7：HighBitmapOfMirrorNode（node40-47）</p>
<p>Device Status8：LowBitmapOfMirrorNode（node48-55）</p>
<p>Device Status9：HighBitmapOfMirrorNode（node56-64）</p>
<p>(reserved)</p></td>
<td><p>内存板进入镜像模式</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>12h</td>
<td><p>PFAE</p>
<p>Device Status 2：NODE ID</p>
<p>Device Status 3：channel id</p>
<p>Device Status 4：dimm id</p></td>
<td>内存预故障事件</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>20h</td>
<td><p>FailDimmInfo</p>
<p>Device Status 2：NODE ID</p>
<p>Device Status 3：channel id</p>
<p>Device Status 4 :dimm id</p>
<p>Device Status 5：rank id</p>
<p>Device Status 6：bank group id</p>
<p>Device Status 7：bank id</p></td>
<td>内存失效事件</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>KBC</td>
<td>05h</td>
<td>00h</td>
<td>Unrecoverable PS/2 or USB keyboard failure</td>
<td>KBC Controller启动过程进行自检，如果有问题，需要通过BT消息上报BMC</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td rowspan="13">Memory Board</td>
<td rowspan="13">06h</td>
<td>00h</td>
<td><p>Memory Board Memory Controler Fault</p>
<p>Device Status 2：NODE ID</p>
<p>Device Status 3：channel id</p>
<p>Device Status 4：dimm id</p>
<p>Device Status 5：memory control id</p></td>
<td>【EX】</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>01h</td>
<td><p>Memory Board Power Chip Fault</p>
<p>Device Status 2：NODE ID</p>
<p>Device Status 3：channel id</p>
<p>Device Status 4：dimm id</p>
<p>Device Status 5：power chip id</p></td>
<td>【EX】</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>02h</td>
<td><p>Memory Board Hot Remove</p>
<p>Device Status 2：Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3：NODE ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4：NODE ID 2</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为00h，用于下发热移除开始命令</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>02h</td>
<td><p>Memory Board Hot Remove</p>
<p>Device Status 2：Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3：NODE ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4：NODE ID 2</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为01h，用于BIOS上报热移除开始标记</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>02h</td>
<td><p>Memory Board Hot Remove</p>
<p>Device Status 2：Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3：NODE ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4：NODE ID 2</p>
<p>Device Status 5：Progress Code</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为02h，用于BIOS上报热移除进度信息</p>
<p>Progress Code:</p>
<p>0x00--内存板下线</p>
<p>0x01--OS迁移完成</p>
<p>0x02--写NC</p>
<p>0x03--BE目录清除</p>
<p>0x04--内存板下电</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>02h</td>
<td><p>Memory Board Hot Remove</p>
<p>Device Status 2：Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3：NODE ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4：NODE ID 2</p>
<p>Device Status 5：Event Code</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为03h，用于BIOS上报热移除失败信息</p>
<p>Event Code:</p>
<p>0x00--未知错误</p>
<p>0x01--剩余内存不够</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>02h</td>
<td><p>Memory Board Hot Remove</p>
<p>Device Status 2：Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3：NODE ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4: NODE ID 2</p>
<p>Device Status 5：Result Code</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为03h，用于BIOS上报热移除失败信息</p>
<p>Event Code：</p>
<p>0x00--未知错误</p>
<p>0x01--剩余内存不够</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>02h</td>
<td><p>Memory Board Hot Remove</p>
<p>Device Status 2：Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3：NODE ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4：NODE ID 2</p>
<p>Device Status 5：Result Code</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为04h，用于BIOS上报热移除结束标记</p>
<p>Result Code：</p>
<p>0x00--成功</p>
<p>0x01--失败</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>03h</td>
<td><p>Memory Board Hot Plug</p>
<p>Device Status 2: Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3: NODE ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4: NODE ID 2</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为00h，用于下发热添加开始命令</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>03h</td>
<td><p>Memory Board Hot Plug</p>
<p>Device Status 2: Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3: NODE ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4: NODE ID 2</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为01h，用于BIOS上报热添加开始标记</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>03h</td>
<td><p>Memory Board Hot Plug</p>
<p>Device Status 2: Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3: NODE ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4: NODE ID 2</p>
<p>Device Status 5: Progress Code</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为02h，用于BIOS上报热添加进度信息</p>
<p>Progress Code：</p>
<p>0x00--内存板下电</p>
<p>0x01--内存板上电初始化</p>
<p>0x02--修改SAD/TAD信息</p>
<p>0x03--OS添加内存上线</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>03h</td>
<td><p>Memory Board Hot Plug</p>
<p>Device Status 2: Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3: NODE ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4: NODE ID 2</p>
<p>Device Status 5: Event Code</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为03h，用于BIOS上报热添加失败信息</p>
<p>Event Code：</p>
<p>0x00--未知错误</p>
<p>0x01--两块内存板容量不相等</p>
<p>0x02--两块内存板没有同时在位(业务侧角度，同时ds3，ds4中不在位内存板node id表示为0xff)</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>03h</td>
<td><p>Memory Board Hot Plug</p>
<p>Device Status 2: Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3: NODE ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4: NODE ID 2</p>
<p>Device Status 5: Result Code</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为04h，用于BIOS上报热添加结束标记</p>
<p>Result Code：</p>
<p>0x00--成功</p>
<p>0x01--失败</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>IOH</td>
<td>07h</td>
<td>00h</td>
<td><p>IOH Fault</p>
<p>Device Status 2: IOH ID</p></td>
<td>-</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>IOH</td>
<td>07h</td>
<td>00h</td>
<td><p>IOH Fault</p>
<p>Device Status 2: IOH ID</p></td>
<td>-</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Chassis</td>
<td>09h</td>
<td>00h</td>
<td>General Chassis Intrusion</td>
<td>机箱开箱指示</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td rowspan="10">Cpu Board</td>
<td rowspan="10">0ah</td>
<td>00h</td>
<td><p>Cpu Board Hot Remove</p>
<p>Device Status 2: Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3: CPU ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4: CPU ID 2</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为00h，用于下发热移除开始命令</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>00h</td>
<td><p>Cpu Board Hot Remove</p>
<p>Device Status 2: Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3: CPU ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4: CPU ID 2</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为01h，用于BIOS上报热移除开始标记</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><p>Cpu Board Hot Remove</p>
<p>Device Status 2: Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3: CPU ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4: CPU ID 2</p>
<p>Device Status 5: Progress Code</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为02h，用于BIOS上报热移除进度信息</p>
<p>Progress Code：</p>
<p>0x00--IIO下线开始</p>
<p>0x01--内存下线开始</p>
<p>0x02--CPU下线开始</p>
<p>0x03--CPU下线完成</p>
<p>0x04--处理器板下电开始</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>00h</td>
<td><p>Cpu Board Hot Remove</p>
<p>Device Status 2: Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3: CPU ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4: CPU ID 2</p>
<p>Device Status 5: Event Code</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为03h，用于BIOS上报热移除失败信息</p>
<p>Error Code：</p>
<p>0x00--未知错误</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>00h</td>
<td><p>Cpu Board Hot Remove</p>
<p>Device Status 2: Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3: CPU ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4: CPU ID 2</p>
<p>Device Status 5: Result Code</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为04h，用于BIOS上报热移除结束标记</p>
<p>Result Code：</p>
<p>0x00--成功</p>
<p>0x01--失败</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>01h</td>
<td><p>Cpu Board Hot Plug</p>
<p>Device Status 2: Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3: CPU ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4: CPU ID 2</p></td>
<td>Operate Code：统一为00h，用于下发热添加开始命令</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>01h</td>
<td><p>Cpu Board Hot Plug</p>
<p>Device Status 2: Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3: CPU ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4: CPU ID 2</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为01h，用于BIOS上报热添加开始标记</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>01h</td>
<td><p>Cpu Board Hot Plug</p>
<p>Device Status 2: Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3: CPU ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4: CPU ID 2</p>
<p>Device Status 5: Progress Code</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为02h，用于BIOS上报热添加进度信息</p>
<p>Progress Code：</p>
<p>0x00--从BMC发送上电OK信息</p>
<p>0x01--Cpu Online完成</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>01h</td>
<td><p>Cpu Board Hot Plug</p>
<p>Device Status 2: Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3: CPU ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4: CPU ID 2</p>
<p>Device Status 5: Event Code</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为03h，用于BIOS上报热添加失败信息</p>
<p>Error Code：</p>
<p>0x00--未知错误</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>01h</td>
<td><p>Cpu Board Hot Plug</p>
<p>Device Status 2: Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3: CPU ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4: CPU ID 2</p>
<p>Device Status 5: Result Code</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为04h，用于BIOS上报热添加结束标记</p>
<p>Result Code：</p>
<p>0x00--成功</p>
<p>0x01--失败</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td rowspan="7">Computing Unit</td>
<td rowspan="7">0Bh</td>
<td>00h</td>
<td><p>Computing Unit Hot Plug</p>
<p>Device Status 2: Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3: Cluster ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4: Cluster ID 2</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为00h，用于下发热添加开始命令</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>00h</td>
<td><p>Computing Unit Hot Plug</p>
<p>Device Status 2: Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3: Cluster ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4: Cluster ID 2</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为01h，用于BIOS上报热添加开始标记</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>00h</td>
<td><p>Computing Unit Hot Plug</p>
<p>Device Status 2: Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3: Cluster ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4: Cluster ID 2</p>
<p>Device Status 5: Progress Code</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为02h，用于BIOS上报热添加进度信息</p>
<p>Progress Code：</p>
<p>0x00--上电OK信息</p>
<p>0x01--Cpu Online进度</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>00h</td>
<td><p>Computing Unit Hot Plug</p>
<p>Device Status 2: Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3: Cluster ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4: Cluster ID 2</p>
<p>Device Status 5: Event Code</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为03h，用于BIOS上报热添加失败信息</p>
<p>Error Code：</p>
<p>0x00--未知错误</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>00h</td>
<td><p>Computing Unit Hot Plug</p>
<p>Device Status 2: Operate Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3: Cluster ID 1</p>
<p>Device Status 4: Cluster ID 2</p>
<p>Device Status 5: Result Code</p></td>
<td><p>Operate Code：统一为04h，用于BIOS上报热添加结束标记</p>
<p>Result Code：</p>
<p>0x00--成功</p>
<p>0x01--失败</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>01h</td>
<td><p>System Merging error detected(系统合一错误)：</p>
<p>Device Status 2：Error Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3：Cluster ID</p></td>
<td><p>Error Code：</p>
<p>0x01--firmware post error（主BIOS统一上报）</p>
<p>0x02--没有硬分区配置(各BIOS自己上报)</p>
<p>0x03--setup配置信息同步失败（各BIOS自己上报）</p>
<p>0x04--cluster之间的内存频率不一致（主BIOS统一上报）</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>02h</td>
<td><p>Configuration Error:(配置错误)</p>
<p>Device Status 2：Error Code</p>
<p>Device Status 3：Cluster ID</p>
<p>Device Status 4: CPU ID</p></td>
<td><p>Error Code:</p>
<p>0x1--Memory module and DIMMs must be configured in pairs for each（同一个节点内的内存板必须成对）</p>
<p>【EX】</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>RAID</td>
<td>0Eh</td>
<td>00h</td>
<td><p>RAID hardware fault.</p>
<p>Device Status2：pcie bus number(root port)</p>
<p>Device Status3：pcie device number(root port)</p>
<p>Device Status4：pcie function number(root port)</p>
<p>Device Status5：error code</p></td>
<td><p>RAID卡硬件故障，RAID卡的芯片外围器件(如内存)故障，BMC通过RAID卡error pin无法检测到或无error pin（PCIE RAID标卡），故通过BIOS检测并上报。但是无法支持运行中检测。</p>
<p>Error code：</p>
<p>00h-正常，无故障</p>
<p>其它值-故障</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td rowspan="5">Boot Error</td>
<td rowspan="5">0Fh</td>
<td>00h</td>
<td>No Boot Device Error</td>
<td>没有启动设备</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>01h</td>
<td>Non-bootable diskette left in drive</td>
<td>没有可启动的硬盘</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>02h</td>
<td>PXE Server not found</td>
<td>PXE服务器找不到</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>03h</td>
<td>Invalid boot sector</td>
<td>非法的启动项</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>04h</td>
<td>Timeout waiting for selection</td>
<td>选择启动项超时</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Boot End Flag</td>
<td>10h</td>
<td>01h</td>
<td>Post end flag</td>
<td>BIOS启动完成（1620新增）</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td rowspan="2">Certificate</td>
<td rowspan="2">11h</td>
<td>00h</td>
<td>NA</td>
<td>BIOS证书正常。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>01h</td>
<td>BIOS certificate is about to expire or has expired。</td>
<td>BIOS证书过期或者即将过期。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td rowspan="3">Memory</td>
<td rowspan="3">12h</td>
<td>00h-20h</td>
<td>NA</td>
<td>能力同Memory 04h，该接口上报仅在channel id存在区别，明确为logical channel id</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>24h</td>
<td><p>PPR</p>
<p>Device Status 2: system id(global system id)</p>
<p>Device Status 3: local system id</p>
<p>Device Status 4: socket id(兼容CPU、NPU)</p>
<p>Device Status 5: channel id(logical channel)</p>
<p>Device Status 6: dimm id(同Rank Group ID)</p>
<p>Device Status 7: subchannel id</p>
<p>Device Status 8: device(颗粒)</p>
<p>Device Status 9: rank id</p>
<p>Device Status 10: bank group id</p>
<p>Device Status 11: bank id</p>
<p>Device Status 12: row addr high</p>
<p>Device Status 13: row addr mid</p>
<p>Device Status 14: row addr low</p>
<p>Device Status 15: repair type(0-hPPR;1-sPPR;2-mPPR)</p></td>
<td>内存PPR事件</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>25h</td>
<td><p>ACLS</p>
<p>Device Status 2: system id(global system id)</p>
<p>Device Status 3: local system id</p>
<p>Device Status 4: socket id(兼容CPU、NPU)</p>
<p>Device Status 5: channel id(logical channel)</p>
<p>Device Status 6: dimm id(同Rank Group ID)</p>
<p>Device Status 7: subchannel id</p>
<p>Device Status 8: device(颗粒)</p>
<p>Device Status 9: rank id</p>
<p>Device Status 10: bank group id</p>
<p>Device Status 11: bank id</p>
<p>Device Status 12: row addr high</p>
<p>Device Status 13: row addr mid</p>
<p>Device Status 14: row addr low</p>
<p>Device Status 15: col addr high</p>
<p>Device Status 16: col addr low</p>
<p>Device Status 17: transfer num(burst id)</p>
<p>Device Status 18: spare index</p></td>
<td>内存ACLS事件</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td rowspan="2">Link Error</td>
<td rowspan="2">13h</td>
<td>00h</td>
<td><p>PSULinkAbnormal</p>
<p>Device Status 2: CPU ID</p>
<p>Device Status 3: PSU Type</p>
<p>Device Status 4 :Die</p>
<p>Device Status 5 :Channel</p></td>
<td><p>电源PMBUS/AVSBUS访问异常告警</p>
<p>PSU Type：电源类型</p>
<p>0x00--CORE</p>
<p>0x01--UNCODE</p>
<p>0x02--DDR VDD</p>
<p>0x03--Nimbus</p>
<p>0x04--DDR VDDQ</p>
<p>Die：调研供电Die区域</p>
<p>0x00--NA</p>
<p>0x01--TA</p>
<p>0x02--NB</p>
<p>0x03--TB</p>
<p>Channel：电源通路</p>
<p>0x00–PMBUS</p>
<p>0x01--AVSBUS</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>01h</td>
<td><p>Memory I2CI3Clink Abnormal</p>
<p>Device Status 2: CPU ID</p>
<p>Device Status 3: Channel Index</p>
<p>Device Status 4 :DIMM Index</p></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>VR</td>
<td>14h</td>
<td>00h</td>
<td><p>VR Power Phase Redundancy</p>
<p>Device Status 2: CPU ID</p>
<p>Device Status 3: PSU Type</p>
<p>Device Status 4 :Die</p></td>
<td><p>VR电源相冗余</p>
<p>PSU Type：电源类型</p>
<p>0x00--CORE</p>
<p>0x01--UNCORE</p>
<p>0x02--DDR VDD</p>
<p>0x03--Nimbus</p>
<p>0x04--DDR VDDQ</p>
<p>0x05--CORE_MEM</p>
<p>0x06--UNCORE_MEM</p>
<p>0x07--SIOE</p>
<p>Die：供电Die区域</p>
<p>0x00--NA</p>
<p>0x01--TA</p>
<p>0x02--NB</p>
<p>0x03--TB</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Base OS Boot</td>
<td>15h</td>
<td>06h</td>
<td>boot completed - boot device not specified</td>
<td></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 查询设备健康状态（Get Device Health Status）

命令功能

查询设备状态情况。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----------|--------|
| NetFn    | 3Eh    |
| CMD      | 03h    |
| \-       | \-     |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>Bit[4:7]–reserved</p>
<p>Bit[0:3]–health status</p>
<p>0h=health is ok</p>
<p>1h=health is warning</p>
<p>2h=health is critical, it is the current health status.</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 设置BIOS动态配置到BMC（Set Dynamic Configuration Result）(此命令用于BIOS向BMC上报配置结果）

命令功能

设置BIOS动态配置到BMC

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>92h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=2Fh</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>预留</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>[7:1]：resvered</p>
<p>[0]：</p>
<p>0-last frame</p>
<p>1-casecade frame</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7:8</td>
<td><p>Writing Offset，写入的数据偏移，从0开始，LSB first。</p>
<p>当数据较长需要多次写入时，一定要从头到尾按顺序写入，不能乱序。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9</td>
<td>Writing Length(写入数据长度)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>10:N</td>
<td><p>Command Data(命令数据)</p>
<p>每个配置项数据格式为:</p>
<p>Type：配置项编号</p>
<p>Length：配置项数据长度</p>
<p>Data：配置项数据信息(第一个字节表示配置结果，0表示成功，1表示失败，从第二个字节开始表示配置项数据,Type和Data含义具体详见<a href="#table9490103701517">表8-3 Bios Dynamic Configuration Parameter定义</a>)</p>
<p>data1:1-Configuration Item1 Type</p>
<p>data2:1-Configuration Item1 Length</p>
<p>data3:Length+1-Configuration Item1 Data</p>
<p>…</p>
<p>dataX:1-Configuration ItemM Type</p>
<p>data(X+1):1-Configuration ItemM Length</p>
<p>data(X+3):Length+1- Configuration ItemM Data</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |

参考信息

1.  Bios Dynamic Configuration Parameter定义

<table style="width:83%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 41%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Configuration Item Type</th>
<th>Configuration Item Data</th>
<th>Configuration Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>0x1</td>
<td><p>0x0: Disabled</p>
<p>0x1: Enabled</p></td>
<td>Dynamic Energy Management Technology</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>0x2</td>
<td><p>0x0: Minmum Ratio</p>
<p>0x1: maxmum Ratio</p>
<p>0x2: Auto</p></td>
<td>Uncore Frequency Scaling</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>0x3</td>
<td>支持0~15任意值调整</td>
<td>CPU Energy Efficiency Policy</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>0x4</td>
<td><p>0：默认值</p>
<p>1：减10W</p>
<p>2：减20W</p>
<p>3：减30W</p>
<p>4：减40W</p>
<p>5：减50W</p></td>
<td>PL1 Power Limit</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>0x5</td>
<td><p>0：默认值</p>
<p>1：减10W</p>
<p>2：减20W</p></td>
<td>PL2 Power Limit</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>0x6</td>
<td>支持0~56任意值调整</td>
<td>PL1 Time Windows</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>0x7</td>
<td>支持0~56任意值调整</td>
<td>PL2 Time Window</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>0x8</td>
<td><p>0x0：开启</p>
<p>0x1：关闭</p></td>
<td>Dynamic Loadline Switch</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取BMC保存的BIOS动态配置（Get Dynamic Configuration SMI Command）

命令功能

获取BMC上保存的BIOS动态配置信息

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| NetFn | 30h |
| CMD | 92h |
| 1:3 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 4 | Sub command，子命令=2Eh |
| 5 | 预留 |
| 6:7 | Reading offset(读取数据偏移，从0开始，LSB first) |
| 8 | Reading length(读取数据长度，长度未知时填充0xff) |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>[7:1]: resvered</p>
<p>[0]:</p>
<p>0-last frame</p>
<p>1-casecade frame</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6:N</td>
<td><p>Command Data(命令数据)</p>
<p>每个配置项数据格式为TLV:</p>
<p>Type：配置项编号</p>
<p>Length：配置项数据长度</p>
<p>Data：配置项数据信息，Type和Data含义具体详见<a href="#table9490103701517">表8-3 Bios Dynamic Configuration Parameter定义</a></p>
<p>data1:1-Configuration Item1 Type</p>
<p>data2:1-Configuration Item1 Length</p>
<p>data3:Length-Configuration Item1 Data</p>
<p>…</p>
<p>dataX:1-Configuration ItemM Type</p>
<p>data(X+1):1-Configuration ItemM Length</p>
<p>data(X+2):Length-Configuration ItemM Data</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## BIOS传递安全OS版本号（Set TEE OS Version）

命令功能

BIOS传递安全OS版本号

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| NetFn | 30h |
| CMD | 92h |
| 1:3 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 4 | Sub command，子命令=4Ah |
| 5 | bios发送安全OS信息类别（0-安全OS版本号，其余留作扩展） |
| 6 | 发送数据长度 |
| 7:n | info_string，目前最长不能超过128字节 |

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |

## BIOS读取板卡的在位情况（Get Device Present Status）

命令功能

Bios读取板卡的在位情况。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 16%" />
<col style="width: 65%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>92h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=4Bh</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>板卡类型</p>
<p>1：PCIe卡</p>
<p>2：OCP卡</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 16%" />
<col style="width: 65%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>Generic codes, plus following command-specific completion code(s):</p>
<p>80h=parameter not supported</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>板卡在位情况LSB（一共4字节，本字节表示slot1-slot8的在位情况，其中bit0表示slot1的在位情况）</p>
<p>1：在位</p>
<p>0：不在位</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>本字节表示slot9-slot16的在位情况，其中bit0表示slot9的在位情况</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td>本字节表示slot17-slot24的在位情况，其中bit0表示slot17的在位情况</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td>本字节表示slot25-slot32的在位情况，其中bit0表示slot25的在位情况</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 查询SP信息（Get Smart Provisioning Info）

命令功能

Bios查询SP信息。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| NetFn | 30h |
| CMD | 92h |
| 1:3 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 4 | Sub command，子命令=4Ch |
| 5 | BIOS ID：预留给多host场景，单host场景固定填0。 |
| 6 | 获取的信息类型[表8-4 SP信息类型参数表](#d1e58523) |

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 5 | 长度N |
| 6:N | 内容 |

参考信息

1.  SP信息类型参数表

<table style="width:83%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 28%" />
<col style="width: 9%" />
<col style="width: 23%" />
<col style="width: 21%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>功能描述</th>
<th>parameter selector</th>
<th>parameter data-get</th>
<th>parameter data-set</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>模板：功能描述，使用场景</strong></td>
<td><strong>0xMM</strong></td>
<td><p><strong>响应：</strong></p>
<p><strong>Data5: 长度</strong></p>
<p><strong>Data6:N: 响应信息</strong></p>
<p><strong>0: 功能0</strong></p>
<p><strong>1: 功能1</strong></p></td>
<td><p><strong>请求：</strong></p>
<p><strong>Data7：设置信息的长度</strong></p>
<p><strong>Data8:N：设置内容</strong></p>
<p><strong>0: 功能0</strong></p>
<p><strong>1: 功能1</strong></p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>u盘更新文件夹最大容量单位byte UmsMaxUpdateSpace</td>
<td>0x01</td>
<td><p>响应：</p>
<p>Data5: 长度</p>
<p>Data6:N: 响应信息</p></td>
<td>不支持</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>u盘部件配置或升级包下发到NAND FLAHS完成标志SpConfigFileReady</td>
<td>0x02</td>
<td><p>响应：</p>
<p>Data5: 长度</p>
<p>Data6:N: 响应信息</p></td>
<td><p>请求：</p>
<p>Data7：设置信息的长度</p>
<p>Data8:N：设置内容</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>u盘进入SP方式标志SPStartmode</td>
<td>0x03</td>
<td><p>响应：</p>
<p>Data5: 长度</p>
<p>Data6:N: 响应信息</p></td>
<td>不支持</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>u盘从SP操作(配置和升级)完后到复位主机系统之间的间隔时间SysRestartDelay</td>
<td>0x04</td>
<td><p>响应：</p>
<p>Data5: 长度</p>
<p>Data6:N: 响应信息</p></td>
<td>不支持</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SP应用程序版本SPAPPversion</td>
<td>0x05</td>
<td><p>响应：</p>
<p>Data5: 长度</p>
<p>Data6:N: 响应信息</p></td>
<td>不支持</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>自定义的SP的OS版本SPOSrevision</td>
<td>0x06</td>
<td><p>响应：</p>
<p>Data5: 长度</p>
<p>Data6:N: 响应信息</p></td>
<td>不支持</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SP中驱动版本SPDriverVersion</td>
<td>0x07</td>
<td><p>响应：</p>
<p>Data5: 长度</p>
<p>Data6:N: 响应信息</p></td>
<td>不支持</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>从SP启动过的标志SPBootedFlag</td>
<td>0x08</td>
<td><p>响应：</p>
<p>Data5: 长度</p>
<p>Data6:N: 响应信息</p></td>
<td><p>请求：</p>
<p>Data7：设置信息的长度</p>
<p>Data8:N：设置内容</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>bmc中是否存在sp程序SPDataExist</td>
<td>0x09</td>
<td><p>响应：</p>
<p>Data5: 长度</p>
<p>Data6:N: 响应信息</p></td>
<td>不支持</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SP平台版本信息SPPlatformVersion</td>
<td>0x0A</td>
<td><p>响应：</p>
<p>Data5: 长度</p>
<p>Data6:N: 响应信息</p>
<p>0：未知平台</p>
<p>1：鲲鹏平台</p>
<p>2：平台</p>
<p>备注：该信息类型判断逻辑：</p>
<p>SP从版本1.9.0开始，在/data/sp/spforbmc/spinfo目录下新增spinfo.ini文件，如有sp_platform=Kunpeng字段，判断为鲲鹏SP，返回1；否则判断为SP，返回2；如为老版本SP，不存在spinfo.ini文件，判断为未知平台，返回0。</p></td>
<td>不支持</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 设置SP信息（Set Smart Provisioning Info）

命令功能

Bios设置SP信息。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| NetFn | 30h |
| CMD | 92h |
| 1:3 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 4 | Sub command，子命令=4Dh |
| 5 | BIOS ID：预留给多host场景，单host场景固定填0。 |
| 6 | 设置的信息类型[表8-4 SP信息类型参数表](#d1e58523) |
| 7 | 设置信息的长度 |
| 8:N | 设置内容 |

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |

## 读取设备的配置能力（Get Device Capabilities）

命令功能

Bios读取设备的配置能力。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| NetFn | 30h |
| CMD | 92h |
| 1:3 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 4 | Sub command，子命令=4Eh |
| 5 | 获取的信息类型个数N，N为FF时返回所有配置项，配置项信息参见[表1 设备的配置能力参数表](#d1e59140) |
| 6 | Required Data Length.要求的读取数据长度 |
| 7:8 | Read Offset.读取的数据偏移，从0开始，LSB first |
| 9 | 获取的第1个信息类型ID |
| 10 | 获取的第2个信息类型ID |
| …… | …… |
| 9+N | 获取的第N个信息类型ID |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 16%" />
<col style="width: 65%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>End of List.表示当前数据是否结束。当参数数据比较长的时候，可能需要分多次读取，通过此字段可以判断数据是否读完。</p>
<p>[7:1]: reserved.</p>
<p>[0]: End of list.</p>
<p>0=last data.</p>
<p>1=middle data.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>响应主体长度：M</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7:M+N</td>
<td><p>//datax:y x表示起始字节，y表示字节数</p>
<p>data1:1-信息类型1的ID</p>
<p>data2:1-信息类型1的长度L1</p>
<p>data3:L1-信息类型1的内容</p>
<p>data(3+L1):1-信息类型2的ID</p>
<p>data(4+L1):1-信息类型2的长度L2</p>
<p>data(5+L1):L2-信息类型2的内容</p>
<p>data(5+L1+L2):1-信息类型3的ID</p>
<p>data(6+L1+L2):1-信息类型3的长度L3</p>
<p>data(7+L1+L2):L3-信息类型3的内容</p>
<p>data(7+L1+L2+L3):1-信息类型4的ID</p>
<p>data(8+L1+L2+L3):1-信息类型4的长度L4</p>
<p>data(9+L1+L2+L3):L4-信息类型4的内容</p>
<p>…………</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

参考信息

1.  设备的配置能力参数表

| 信息ID | 取值类型 | 描述 |
|----|----|----|
| 1 | unsigned char | PcieNcsiValid，NCSI线缆是否连接 |
| 2 | unsigned char | SWRAIDEnable，软raid功能启用 |
| 5 | unsigned char | WOLState，WOL(wake on lan)网络唤醒功能状态 |
| 9 | unsigned char | WeakPwdDictSupport，是否支持弱口令字典检查 |
| 10 | unsigned char | VMDState，VMD开关状态 |
| 13 | unsigned char | PcieNcsiCapability，用于生产查询主板对PCIE标卡NCSI功能支持能力（不管是否接NCSI线缆） |
| 14 | unsigned char | VGASwitch，用于设置VGA显示标志位 |

## 设置BIOS固件版本（Set BIOS Firmware Version）

命令功能

设置BIOS固件版本。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 16%" />
<col style="width: 65%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>

</thead>

<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>92h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>

<p>0x00：计算板IO DIE BIOS</p>
<p>其他预留</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>CpuBoard Slot</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容          |
|----------|-----------------|
| 1        | Completion Code |
| 2        | Length          |
| 3:N      | 内容            |

## 获取BIOS文件的属性（Get BIOS File Property）

命令功能

获取BIOS文件的属性。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>92h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=1Ah</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>BIOS ID：预留给多host场景，单host场景固定填0。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>File Selector</p>
<p>2Eh-PolicyConfigRegistry.json</p>
<p>Others-Reserved</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td><p>File Property Selestor</p>
<p>00-Version</p>
<p>Others-Reserved</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>File Selector</p>
<p>2Eh–PolicyConfigRegistry.json</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>Data Length（不存在情况为0）</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7:n</td>
<td><p>（仅获取成功才有此字段）</p>
<p>属性字符串的ASCLL码</p>
<p>Eg：”V1.00”</p>
<p>则第7~11字节分别为</p>
<p>0x56、0x31、0x2E、0x30、0x30</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 设置host侧各固件实际度量值（Set Host Standard Digest）

命令功能

设置host侧各固件度量值。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>92h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=57h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Firmware Type</p>
<p>0：由BIOS侧发起的度量</p>
<p>1：由SHIM侧发起的度量</p>
<p>2：由GRUB侧发起的度量</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>Firmware Detail Type</p>
<p>Firmware Type:0</p>
<p>0：由BIOS侧发起的度量</p>
<p>1：reserved1</p>
<p>2：reserved2</p>
<p>Firmware Type:1</p>
<p>0：由SHIM侧发起的度量</p>
<p>1：reserved1</p>
<p>2: reserved2</p>
<p>Firmware Type:2</p>
<p>0：grub.cfg</p>
<p>1：kernel</p>
<p>2：initrd</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td><p>Firmware Hash Algorithm Type</p>
<p>0：表示固件哈希值是通过SM3算法计算</p>
<p>1：reserverd1</p>
<p>2：reserverd2</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td>Firmware Hash Len：M</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9:8+M</td>
<td><p>Firmware Hash Content</p>
<p>针对BIOS侧发起的度量，Hash Content是Hash值</p>
<p>针对SHIM和GRUB侧发起的度量，Hash Content是一个指定结构体</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9+M</td>
<td>Firmware Version Len: N</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>10+M:9+M+N</td>
<td>Firmware Version</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |

## 获取SMBIOS信息（Get SMBIOS Info）

命令功能

获取SMBIOS信息（Type1整机信息）。

<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>92h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>

<tr>
<td>4</td>
