## 设置PPR（Set PPR Result）

命令功能

设置PPR。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| NetFn | 30h |
| CMD | 92h |
| 1:3 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 4 | Sub command，子命令=48h |
| 5 | fault num，返回故障数量，因ipmi命令长度限制，falut num\<=5 |
| 6 | 内存1 CPU ID |
| 7 | 内存1 CHANNEL ID |
| 8 | 内存1 DIMM ID |
| 9 | 内存1 Rank ID |
| 10 | 内存1 SubRank ID |
| 11 | 内存1 Device ID |
| 12 | 内存1 BankGroup ID |
| 13 | 内存1 Bank ID |
| 14:17 | 内存1 Row地址 |
| 18:49 | 内存1 SN |
| 50 | 内存1隔离结果 |
| 51 | 内存1预留 |
| 52 | 内存2 CPU ID |
| 53 | 内存2 CHANNEL ID |
| 54 | 内存2 DIMM ID |
| 55 | 内存2 Rank ID |
| 56 | 内存2 SubRank ID |
| 57 | 内存2 Device ID |
| 58 | 内存2 BankGroup ID |
| 59 | 内存2 Bank ID |
| 60:63 | 内存2 Row地址 |
| 64:95 | 内存2 SN |
| 96 | 内存2隔离结果 |
| 97 | 内存2预留 |
| … | \- |
| 6+46N | 内存N CPU ID |
| 7+46N | 内存N CHANNEL ID |
| 8+46N | 内存N DIMM ID |
| 9+46N | 内存N Rank ID |
| 10+46N | 内存N SubRank ID |
| 11+46N | 内存N Device ID |
| 12+46N | 内存N BankGroup ID |
| 13+46N | 内存N Bank ID |
| 14+46N：17+46N | 内存N Row地址 |
| 18+46N：49+46N | 内存N SN |
| 50+46N | 内存N隔离结果 |
| 51+46N | 内存N预留 |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>d6-说明该命令在BMC侧未注册，功能不支持。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 设置SOL配置（Set SOL Configuration Parameters）

命令功能

设置SOL配置。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>Transport 0Ch</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>21h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-Channel number.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td>Parameter selector</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>Configuration parameter data</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>80h=parameter not supported.</p>
<p>81h=attempt to set the 'set in progress' value (in parameter #0) when not in</p>
<p>the 'set complete' state. (This completion code provides a way to recognize that another party has already 'claimed' the parameters)</p>
<p>82h=attempt to write read-only parameter</p>
<p>83h=attempt to read write-only parameter</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取SOL配置（Get SOL Configuration Parameters）

命令功能

获取SOL配置。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>Transport 0Ch</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>22h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>[7]-0b=get parameter</p>
<p>1b=get parameter revision only.</p>
<p>[6:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-Channel number.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td>Parameter selector</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><p>Set Selector. Selects a given set of parameters under a given Parameter</p>
<p>selector value. 00h if parameter doesn't use a Set Selector.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Block Selector (00h if parameter does not require a block number)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code.</p>
<p>Generic codes, plus following command-specific completion code(s):</p>
<p>80h=parameter not supported.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>[7:0]-Parameter revision.</p>
<p>Format:</p>
<p>MSN=present revision.</p>
<p>LSN=oldest revision parameter is backward compatible with. 11h for parameters in this specification.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2">The following data bytes are not returned when the 'get parameter revision only' bit is 1b.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3:N</td>
<td><p>Configuration parameter data,SOL Configuration Parameters</p>
<p>If the rollback feature is implemented, the BMC makes a copy of the existing</p>
<p>parameters when the 'set in progress' state becomes asserted (See the Set In</p>
<p>Progress parameter #0).</p>
<p>While the 'set in progress' state is active, the BMC will return data from this copy of the parameters, plus any uncommitted changes that were made to the data. Otherwise, the BMC returns parameter data from non-volatile storage.</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 设置硬隔离地址结果（Set Hard Isolation Address Results）（Runtime阶段使用）

命令功能

设置硬隔离地址结果。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>92h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=41h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>[7]：命令响应方式</p>
<p>0-同步，BMC有返回值，需要解析响应</p>
<p>[6]：清除方式</p>
<p>1-指定内存清除</p>
<p>0-全部清除</p>
<p>[5:0]：segment，1based，对于高性能服务器9032等，每个segment表示一个4P分区，BDF是以4P系统编号；为了兼容之前产品便于BMC统一管理，对于8100和其他4P及以下系统不需要通过segment区分BDF，则segment始终为0。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>[1:0]：故障类型</p>
<p>0x03-预留</p>
<p>0x02-硬隔离</p>
<p>0x01-软隔离</p>
<p>0x00-无故障</p>
<p>[7:2]</p>
<p>硬隔离时：</p>
<p>0x00-隔离执行成功</p>
<p>因BMC旧版本兼容性问题，凡是失败的错误码，必须是奇数。</p>
<p>0x01-x4颗粒内存，BIOS中未打开ADDDC开关</p>
<p>0x03-x8颗粒内存，无隔离能力</p>
<p>0x05-x4颗粒内存，BIOS中打开了ADDDC开关，但是无隔离能力</p>
<p>0x3f-隔离失败（旧版本BIOS会上报）</p>
<p>其他-保留</p>
<p>软隔离时：</p>
<p>Byte6[7:6]表示PCLS是否打开，</p>
<p>1-打开</p>
<p>0-关闭</p>
<p>Byte6[5:4]表示PCLS执行成功\失败（在Byte6[7:6]表示打开的情况下）</p>
<p>0-成功</p>
<p>1-失败</p>
<p>Byte6[3:2]表示软隔离上报成功\失败</p>
<p>（在Byte6[7:6]表示关闭、或者Byte6[7:6]表示打开下且Byte6[5:4]表示PCLS执行失败的情况下）</p>
<p>0-上报成功</p>
<p>1-上报失败</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td><p>fault_type_1：内存故障隔离类型，当Byte6[1:0]为2的时候有效</p>
<p>0-无待隔离故障信息</p>
<p>1-Row故障</p>
<p>2-Col故障</p>
<p>3-Bank故障</p>
<p>4-颗粒故障</p>
<p>5-Rank故障</p>
<p>6-单地址故障</p>
<p>其他值-预留</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8:15</td>
<td>Address：预留。故障内存地址，Byte6[1:0]=0x01软隔离的时候有效。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>16</td>
<td>CpuId，当Byte6[1:0]为2的时候有效</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>17</td>
<td>ChannelId，当Byte6[1:0]为2的时候有效</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>18</td>
<td>DimmId，当Byte6[1:0]为2的时候有效</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>19</td>
<td>RankId，当Byte6[1:0]为2的时候有效</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>20</td>
<td>SubRank ID，当Byte6[1:0]为2的时候有效</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>21</td>
<td>Device ID，当Byte6[1:0]为2的时候有效</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>22</td>
<td>BankGroup ID，当Byte6[1:0]为2的时候有效</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>23</td>
<td>Bank ID，当Byte6[1:0]为2的时候有效</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>24:27</td>
<td>Row地址，当Byte6[1:0]为2的时候有效</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>28:31</td>
<td>Col地址，当Byte6[1:0]为2的时候有效</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>32</td>
<td>预留字段，默认为0</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>d6-说明该命令在BMC侧未注册，功能不支持。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 设置/获取MSP开关（Set/Get MSP switch）

命令功能

设置/获取MSP开关。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>92h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=42h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>MSP相关开关操作命令</p>
<p>[7:3]：预留</p>
<p>[2]：1 BIOS pageoffline开关</p>
<p>0 msp故障决策开关</p>
<p>Byte[1:0]：0x03返回C1错误</p>
<p>0x02查询MSP对应开关当前状态</p>
<p>0x01设置MSP对应开关为使能状态</p>
<p>0x00设置MSP对应开关为非使能状态</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>d6-说明该命令在BMC侧未注册，功能不支持。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>对应开关状态</p>
<p>当请求Byte5=2时存在</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 上报组件错误（Report Component Faults）

命令功能

接收iME故障错误上报。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>98h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=05h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>部件状态</p>
<p>0：FRU_STATUS_ASSERT</p>
<p>1：FRU_STATUS_DEASSERT</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>部件类型:</p>
<p>数值见“部件类型定义”</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td>故障的分帧编号（bit7和bit8保留），从0开始</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8:9</td>
<td>故障部件编号（从0开始编号）</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>10</td>
<td><p>表示故障的主状态寄存器个数</p>
<p>bit0：是否接收到最后一帧:用于判断消息是否接收完整</p>
<p>bit1-7：主状态寄存器错误的个数</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>11:M</td>
<td>故障寄存器信息：根据10的故障寄存器个数，依次上报</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>M+1:N</td>
<td>模块dump寄存器信息：模块除故障寄存器剩余的全部寄存器信息，依次上报</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>d6-说明该命令在BMC侧未注册，功能不支持。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取基础计算组件故障寄存器日志信息（Get BCU diagnosis data）

命令功能

获取OS发生硬件不可纠正故障信息。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>92h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=55h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>预留，默认填0xFF</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>End of List表示当前数据是否结束。当参数数据比较长的时候，可能需要分多次读取，通过此字段可以判断数据是否读完。</p>
<p>[7:1]：reserved.</p>
<p>[0]：End of list.</p>
<p>0=last data.</p>
<p>1=middle data.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7:10</td>
<td>Length待存储的数据长度</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>11:14</td>
<td>Offect，LSB First数据段相对于文件开始位置的偏移</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>15:16</td>
<td>Checksum，CRC16</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>17:N</td>
<td>Data</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |

## 上报DDR4隔离结果（Report DDR4 Fault Isolation Address）

命令功能

接收BIOS上报的DDR4隔离结果与地址信息。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>98h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td><p>Sub command，</p>
<p>子命令=18h，表示主板上实际物理内存</p>
<p>子命令=55h，表示上报为逻辑通道，需要BMC转换为物理通道</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>[7:2]：</p>
<p>0x00-隔离执行成功</p>
<p>0x01-x4颗粒内存，BIOS中未打开ADDDC开关，隔离失败</p>
<p>0x02-x4颗粒内存，BIOS中打开了ADDDC开关，但是无隔离能力</p>
<p>0x03-x8颗粒内存，无隔离能力</p>
<p>其他-保留</p>
<p>[1:0]：故障类型</p>
<p>0x03-预留</p>
<p>0x02-硬隔离</p>
<p>0x01-软隔离</p>
<p>0x00-无故障</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>fault_type_1：内存故障隔离类型</p>
<p>0-无待隔离故障信息</p>
<p>1-Row故障</p>
<p>2-Col故障</p>
<p>3-Bank故障</p>
<p>4-颗粒故障</p>
<p>5-Rank故障</p>
<p>6-单地址故障</p>
<p>其他值-预留</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7:14</td>
<td>Address：预留。故障内存地址，Byte5[1:0]=0x01软隔离的时候有效。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>15</td>
<td>CpuId</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>16</td>
<td><p>ChannelId</p>
<p>当Sub command为18h时表示为Physical Channel ID</p>
<p>当Sub command为55h时表示为Logical Channel ID</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>17</td>
<td>DimmId</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>18</td>
<td>RankId，当Byte5[1:0]为2的时候有效</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>19</td>
<td>SubRank ID，当Byte5[1:0]为2的时候有效</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>20</td>
<td>Device ID，当Byte5[1:0]为2的时候有效</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>21</td>
<td>BankGroup ID，当Byte5[1:0]为2的时候有效</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>22</td>
<td>Bank ID，当Byte5[1:0]为2的时候有效</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>23:26</td>
<td>Row地址，当Byte5[1:0]为2的时候有效</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>27:30</td>
<td>Col地址，当Byte5[1:0]为2的时候有效</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>31</td>
<td>预留字段，默认为0.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |

## 上报内存隔离结果（Report Memory Fault Isolation Address）

命令功能

接收BIOS上报的内存隔离结果与地址信息。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>92h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td><p>Sub command，</p>
<p>子命令=65h</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>GlobalSystemId(SystemId)</p>
<p>故障所在系统的逻辑编号，根据各产品形态对系统进行全局编号，从1开始</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>LocalSystemId</p>
<p>故障所在系统的物理编号，主系统编号0，同一个主系统内的子系统依次编号，从1开始</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td><p>IsolationPolicy:</p>
<p>0:DDR ACLS,</p>
<p>1:DDR sPPR,</p>
<p>2:DDR hPPR,</p>
<p>3:DDR adddc(bank),</p>
<p>4:DDR adddc(device),</p>
<p>5:DDR rank sparing,</p>
<p>6:DDR page_offline,</p>
<p>7:HBM CE - ACLS,</p>
<p>8:HBM UCE - ACLS,</p>
<p>9:HBM CE - SPPR,</p>
<p>10:HBM UCE - SPPR</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>data8:n</td>
<td>内存隔离结果地址、状态信息，详见<a href="#table1558911301163">表9-11 内存隔离地址</a></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

1.  内存隔离地址

<table style="width:83%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 14%" />
<col style="width: 10%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>IsolationPolicy</th>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td rowspan="15"><p>0: DDR ACLS,</p>
<p>1: DDR sPPR,</p>
<p>2:DDR hPPR,</p>
<p>3:DDR adddc(bank),</p>
<p>4:DDR adddc(device),</p>
<p>5:DDR rank sparing,</p>
<p>6:DDR page_offline</p></td>
<td>8</td>
<td><p>ResultState,响应码：</p>
<p>bit[7]：0-成功，1-失败</p>
<p>bit[0:6]：响应码，对应自定义消息，支持隔离失败时定位，详细定义如下:</p>
<p>IsolationPolicy字段取值-ACLS:</p>
<p>1-ACLS功能未开启</p>
<p>2-隔离下发参数异常</p>
<p>3-当前channel下ACLS资源已用尽</p>
<p>4-隔离执行失败</p>
<p>IsolationPolicy字段取值-adddc(bank/device):</p>
<p>1-MR/SR功能未开启</p>
<p>2-隔离下发参数异常</p>
<p>3-资源耗尽，无冗余资源可用</p>
<p>4-隔离执行失败</p>
<p>IsolationPolicy字段取值-hPPR/sPPR:</p>
<p>1-hPPR/sPPR功能未开启</p>
<p>2-隔离下发参数异常</p>
<p>3-资源耗尽(BankGroup)</p>
<p>4-隔离执行失败</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9</td>
<td><p>fault_type_1：内存故障隔离类型</p>
<p>0-无待隔离故障信息</p>
<p>1-Row故障</p>
<p>2-Col故障</p>
<p>3-Bank故障</p>
<p>4-颗粒故障</p>
<p>5-Rank故障</p>
<p>6-单地址故障</p>
<p>其他值-预留</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>10:17</td>
<td>System Address</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>18</td>
<td>CpuID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>19</td>
<td>LogicalChannelID，全局LogicalChannel，0~7</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>20</td>
<td>Dimm ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>21</td>
<td>SubChannel ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>22</td>
<td>Rank ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>23</td>
<td>Sub Rank ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>24</td>
<td>Device ID，表示SubChannel下Device编号，内存颗粒位宽X4:0~9，X8:0~4</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>25</td>
<td>BankGroup ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>26</td>
<td>Bank ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>27:30</td>
<td>Row</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>31:34</td>
<td>Col</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>35:39</td>
<td>预留字段，默认为0.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td rowspan="15"><p>7:HBM CE - ACLS,</p>
<p>8:HBM UCE - ACLS,</p>
<p>9:HBM CE - SPPR,</p>
<p>10:HBM UCE - SPPR</p></td>
<td>8</td>
<td><p>ResultState,响应码：</p>
<p>bit[7]：0-成功，1-失败</p>
<p>bit[0:6]：响应码，对应自定义消息，支持隔离失败时定位，详细定义如下:</p>
<p>HBM工作在Memory模式，错误码取值定义：</p>
<p>[bit0~1]页隔离状态；[bit2~3]在线修复状态；[bit4~5]页重新上线状态；[bit6]预留</p>
<p>1 - 页隔离失败（超阈值），未发起修复，不涉及页重新上线</p>
<p>2 - 页隔离失败（未知原因），未发起修复，不涉及页重新上线</p>
<p>20 - 页隔离成功，修复失败（资源耗尽），已隔离页未恢复上线</p>
<p>24 - 页隔离成功，修复失败（参数异常），已隔离页未恢复上线</p>
<p>28 - 页隔离成功，修复失败（未知原因），已隔离页未恢复上线</p>
<p>32 - 页隔离成功，修复成功，页重新上线失败</p>
<p>HBM工作在Cache模式，错误码取值定义：</p>
<p>[bit0~1]cache way隔离状态；[bit2~3]在线修复状态；[bit4~5]cache way重新上线状态；[bit6]预留</p>
<p>1 - cache way隔离失败（超阈值），未发起修复，不涉及cache way重新上线</p>
<p>2 - cache way隔离失败（未知原因），未发起修复，不涉及cache way重新上线</p>
<p>20 - cache way隔离成功，修复失败（资源耗尽），已隔离cache way未恢复上线</p>
<p>24 - cache way隔离成功，修复失败（参数异常），已隔离cache way未恢复上线</p>
<p>28 - cache way隔离成功，修复失败（未知原因），已隔离cache way未恢复上线</p>
<p>32 - cache way隔离成功，修复成功，cache way重新上线失败</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9</td>
<td><p>fault_type：内存故障隔离类型</p>
<p>0-无待隔离故障信息</p>
<p>1-Row故障</p>
<p>2-Col故障</p>
<p>3-Bank故障</p>
<p>4-颗粒故障</p>
<p>5-Rank故障</p>
<p>6-单地址故障</p>
<p>其他值-预留</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>10:17</td>
<td>System Address</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>18</td>
<td>CpuID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>19</td>
<td>DIE ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>20</td>
<td>Stack ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>21</td>
<td>Reserved-1，预留字段</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>22</td>
<td>SID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>23</td>
<td>Reserved-2，预留字段</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>24</td>
<td>Channel ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>25</td>
<td>BankGroup ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>26</td>
<td>Bank ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>27:30</td>
<td>Row</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>31:34</td>
<td>Col</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>35:39</td>
<td>预留字段，默认为0.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |

## 查询内存HPPR隔离地址（Get Memory HPPR Address）

命令功能

获取BMC记录的内存硬隔离地址信息。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>92h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command：66h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>GlobalSystemId(SystemId)</p>
<p>故障所在系统的逻辑编号，根据各产品形态对系统进行全局编号，从1开始</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>LocalSystemId</p>
<p>故障所在系统的物理编号，主系统编号0，同一个主系统内的子系统依次编号，从1开始</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td>TargetType，0:DDR，1:HBM</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8:9</td>
<td>IsolationAddressIndex，查询隔离地址索引，从0值开始</td>
</tr>

</tr>

<td>预留</td>
</tr>

## 屏幕截图操作（Screenshot）

命令功能

屏幕截图操作。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>93h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=7Bh</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Option</p>
<p>0x00：手动截图</p>
<p>0x01：删除手动和自动截图</p>
<p>0x02：删除手动截图</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |

## 收集整机信息（Collect Server Information）

命令功能

收集整机信息。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| NetFn | 30h |
| CMD | 93h |
| 1:3 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 4 | Sub command，子命令=8Ah |
| 5 | Parameter Selector，见 [表1 整机信息参数表](#d1e72670) |
| 6 | Offset，数据偏移，从0开始，LS Byte first。 |
| 7 | Length，读取或写入数据长度 |
| 8:N | Data，写入数据 |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>End of List</p>
<p>表示当前数据是否结束。当参数数据比较长的时候，可能需要分多次读取，通过此字段可以判断数据是否读完。</p>
<p>[7:1]：reserved.</p>
<p>[0]：End of list</p>
<p>0=last data.</p>
<p>1=middle data</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6:N</td>
<td><p>Data</p>
<p>响应数据，见 <a href="#d1e72670">表1 整机信息参数表</a></p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

参考信息

1.  整机信息参数表

<table style="width:83%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 18%" />
<col style="width: 21%" />
<col style="width: 42%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>功能描述</th>
<th>Parameter Data</th>
<th>#(10进制)</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>启动或停止收集整机部件信息（write-only）</td>
<td><p><strong>请求</strong>:</p>
<p>Offset: 0x00</p>
<p>Length: 1</p>
<p>Data: 0（停止），1（启动）</p>
<p><strong>响应</strong>:</p>
<p>End of List：0</p>
<p>Data：无</p></td>
<td>0</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>查询整机部件信息收集状态（read-only）</td>
<td><p><strong>请求</strong>:</p>
<p>Offset: 0x00</p>
<p>Length: 1</p>
<p><strong>响应</strong>:</p>
<p>End of List：0</p>
<p>Data: 0：未启动收集、1：正在收集、2：收集完成、3：收集失败</p></td>
<td>1</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

# 告警&事件命令

## 设定传感器迟滞（Set Sensor Hysteresis）

命令功能

设定传感器迟滞。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>S/E 04h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>24h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>sensor number (FFh=reserved)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td>reserved for future 'hysteresis mask' definition. Write as 'FFh'</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><p>Positive-going Threshold Hysteresis Value. Set to 00h if sensor does not</p>
<p>support positive-going threshold hysteresis. This value is subtracted from</p>
<p>positive going thresholds to determine the point where the asserted status for that threshold will clear.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td><p>Negative-going Threshold Hysteresis Value. This value is added to negative</p>
<p>going thresholds to determine the point where the asserted status for that</p>
<p>threshold will clear. Set to 00h if sensor does not support negative-going</p>
<p>threshold hysteresis.</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容          |
|----------|-----------------|
| 1        | Completion Code |

## 获取传感器迟滞（Get Sensor Hysteresis）

命令功能

获取传感器迟滞。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容                                                           |
|----------|------------------------------------------------------------------|
| NetFn    | S/E 04h                                                          |
| CMD      | 25h                                                              |
| 1        | sensor number (FFh=reserved)                                     |
| 2        | reserved for future 'hysteresis mask' definition. Write as 'FFh' |

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容                                                |
|----------|-------------------------------------------------------|
| 1        | Completion Code                                       |
| 2        | Positive-going Threshold Hysteresis Value. 00h if n/a |
| 3        | Negative-going Threshold Hysteresis Value. 00h if n/a |

## 设置传感器阈值（Set Sensor Threshold）

命令功能

设置传感器阈值。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>S/E 04h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>26h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>sensor number (FFh=reserved)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>[7:6]-reserved. Write as 00b.</p>
<p>[5]-1b=set upper non-recoverable threshold</p>
<p>[4]-1b=set upper critical threshold</p>
<p>[3]-1b=set upper non-critical threshold</p>
<p>[2]-1b=set lower non-recoverable threshold</p>
<p>[1]-1b=set lower critical threshold</p>
<p>[0]-1b=set lower non-critical threshold</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>lower non-critical threshold. Ignored if bit 0 of byte 2=0</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>lower critical threshold. Ignored if bit 1 of byte 2=0</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>lower non-recoverable threshold. Ignored if bit 2 of byte 2=0</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>upper non-critical threshold. Ignored if bit 3 of byte 2=0</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td>upper critical threshold value. Ignored if bit 4 of byte 2=0</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td>upper non-recoverable threshold value. Ignored if bit 5 of byte 2=0</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容          |
|----------|-----------------|
| 1        | Completion Code |

## 获取传感器阈值（Get Sensor Threshold）

命令功能

获取传感器阈值。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容                       |
|----------|------------------------------|
| NetFn    | S/E 04h                      |
| CMD      | 27h                          |
| 1        | sensor number (FFh=reserved) |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>[7:6]-reserved. Return as 00b</p>
<p>Readable thresholds: This bit mask indicates which thresholds are readable</p>
<p>[5]-1b=upper non-recoverable threshold</p>
<p>[4]-1b=upper critical threshold</p>
<p>[3]-1b=upper non-critical threshold</p>
<p>[2]-1b=lower non-recoverable threshold</p>
<p>[1]-1b=lower critical threshold</p>
<p>[0]-1b=lower non-critical threshold</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>lower non-critical threshold (if present, ignore on read otherwise)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>lower critical threshold (if present, ignore on read otherwise)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>lower non-recoverable threshold (if present, ignore on read otherwise)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>upper non-critical threshold (if present, ignore on read otherwise)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td>upper critical (if present, ignore on read otherwise)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td>upper non-recoverable (if present, ignore on read otherwise)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 设置传感器事件启用（Set Sensor Event Enable）

命令功能

设置传感器事件启用。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>S/E 04h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>28h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>sensor number (FFh=reserved)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>[7]-0b=disable all Event Messages from this sensor (optional) [does not</p>
<p>impact individual enable/disable status]</p>
<p>[6]-0b=disable scanning on this sensor (optional)</p>
<p>[5:4]-00b=do not change individual enables</p>
<p>01b=enable selected event messages</p>
<p>10b=disable selected event messages</p>
<p>11b=reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-reserved</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(3)*</td>
<td><p>For sensors with threshold based events:</p>
<p>[7]-1b=select assertion event for upper non-critical going high</p>
<p>[6]-1b=select assertion event for upper non-critical going low</p>
<p>[5]-1b=select assertion event for lower non-recoverable going high</p>
<p>[4]-1b=select assertion event for lower non-recoverable going low</p>
<p>[3]-1b=select assertion event for lower critical going high</p>
<p>[2]-1b=select assertion event for lower critical going low</p>
<p>[1]-1b=select assertion event for lower non-critical going high</p>
<p>[0]-1b=select assertion event for lower non-critical going low</p>
<p>For sensors with discrete events:</p>
<p>[7]-1b=select assertion event for state bit 7</p>
<p>[6]-1b=select assertion event for state bit 6</p>
<p>[5]-1b=select assertion event for state bit 5</p>
<p>[4]-1b=select assertion event for state bit 4</p>
<p>[3]-1b=select assertion event for state bit 3</p>
<p>[2]-1b=select assertion event for state bit 2</p>
<p>[1]-1b=select assertion event for state bit 1</p>
<p>[0]-1b=select assertion event for state bit 0</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(4)*</td>
<td><p>For sensors with threshold based events:</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved. Write as 0000b.</p>
<p>[3]-1b=select assertion event for upper non-recoverable going high</p>
<p>[2]-1b=select assertion event for upper non-recoverable going low</p>
<p>[1]-1b=select assertion event for upper critical going high</p>
<p>[0]-1b=select assertion event for upper critical going low</p>
<p>For sensors with discrete events:</p>
<p>[00h otherwise]</p>
<p>[7]-reserved. Write as 0b.</p>
<p>[6]-1b=select assertion event for state bit 14</p>
<p>[5]-1b=select assertion event for state bit 13</p>
<p>[4]-1b=select assertion event for state bit 12</p>
<p>[3]-1b=select assertion event for state bit 11</p>
<p>[2]-1b=select assertion event for state bit 10</p>
<p>[1]-1b=select assertion event for state bit 9</p>
<p>[0]-1b=select assertion event for state bit 8</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(5)*</td>
<td><p>For sensors with threshold based events:</p>
<p>[7]-1b=select deassertion event for upper non-critical going high</p>
<p>[6]-1b=select deassertion event for upper non-critical going low</p>
<p>[5]-1b=select deassertion event for lower non-recoverable going high</p>
<p>[4]-1b=select deassertion event for lower non-recoverable going low</p>
<p>[3]-1b=select deassertion event for lower critical going high</p>
<p>[2]-1b=select deassertion event for lower critical going low</p>
<p>[1]-1b=select deassertion event for lower non-critical going high</p>
<p>[0]-1b=select deassertion event for lower non-critical going low</p>
<p>For sensors with discrete events:</p>
<p>(00h otherwise)</p>
<p>[7]-1b=select deassertion event for state bit 7</p>
<p>[6]-1b=select deassertion event for state bit 6</p>
<p>[5]-1b=select deassertion event for state bit 5</p>
<p>[4]-1b=select deassertion event for state bit 4</p>
<p>[3]-1b=select deassertion event for state bit 3</p>
<p>[2]-1b=select deassertion event for state bit 2</p>
<p>[1]-1b=select deassertion event for state bit 1</p>
<p>[0]-1b=select deassertion event for state bit 0</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(6)*</td>
<td><p>For sensors with threshold based events:</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved. Write as 0000b.</p>
<p>[3]-1b=select deassertion event for upper non-recoverable going high</p>
<p>[2]-1b=select deassertion event for upper non-recoverable going low</p>
<p>[1]-1b=select deassertion event for upper critical going high</p>
<p>[0]-1b=select deassertion event for upper critical going low</p>
<p>For sensors with discrete events:</p>
<p>(00h otherwise)</p>
<p>[7]-reserved. Write as 0b.</p>
<p>[6]-1b=select deassertion event for state bit 14</p>
<p>[5]-1b=select deassertion event for state bit 13</p>
<p>[4]-1b=select deassertion event for state bit 12</p>
<p>[3]-1b=select deassertion event for state bit 11</p>
<p>[2]-1b=select deassertion event for state bit 10</p>
<p>[1]-1b=select deassertion event for state bit 9</p>
<p>[0]-1b=select deassertion event for state bit 8</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2"><p>*注：带小括号部分表示这部分内容可能不存在。</p>
<p>*=Devices must accept this command with a variable number (2 to 6) of request data bytes. (In particular, bytes 3 to 6 do not need to be transferred if disabling all EventMessages from the sensor.) This requirement is to allow a reduction in the number of data bytes that must be transferred during the sensor initialization (init agent) process. The receiver shall treat data bytes that are not explicitly transmitted as if they were written as '00h'.</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容          |
|----------|-----------------|
| 1        | Completion Code |

## 获取传感器启用状态（Get Sensor Event Enable）

命令功能

获取传感器事件启用。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容                       |
|----------|------------------------------|
| NetFn    | S/E 04h                      |
| CMD      | 29h                          |
| 1        | sensor number (FFh=reserved) |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>[7]-0b=All Event Messages disabled from this sensor</p>
<p>[6]-0b=Sensor scanning disabled</p>
<p>[5:0]-reserved. Ignore on read.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(3)*</td>
<td><p>For sensors with threshold based events:</p>
<p>[7]-1b=assertion event for upper non-critical going high enabled</p>
<p>[6]-1b=assertion event for upper non-critical going low enabled</p>
<p>[5]-1b=assertion event for lower non-recoverable going high enabled</p>
<p>[4]-1b=assertion event for lower non-recoverable going low enabled</p>
<p>[3]-1b=assertion event for lower critical going high enabled</p>
<p>[2]-1b=assertion event for lower critical going low enabled</p>
<p>[1]-1b=assertion event for lower non-critical going high enabled</p>
<p>[0]-1b=assertion event for lower non-critical going low enabled</p>
<p>For sensors with discrete events:</p>
<p>[7]-1b=assertion event msg. for state bit 7 enabled</p>
<p>[6]-1b=assertion event msg. for state bit 6 enabled</p>
<p>[5]-1b=assertion event msg. for state bit 5 enabled</p>
<p>[4]-1b=assertion event msg. for state bit 4 enabled</p>
<p>[3]-1b=assertion event msg. for state bit 3 enabled</p>
<p>[2]-1b=assertion event msg. for state bit 2 enabled</p>
<p>[1]-1b=assertion event msg. for state bit 1 enabled</p>
<p>[0]-1b=assertion event msg. for state bit 0 enabled</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(4)*</td>
<td><p>For sensors with threshold based events:</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved. Write as 0000b.</p>
<p>[3]-1b=assertion event for upper non-recoverable going high enabled</p>
<p>[2]-1b=assertion event for upper non-recoverable going low enabled</p>
<p>[1]-1b=assertion event for upper critical going high enabled</p>
<p>[0]-1b=assertion event for upper critical going low enabled</p>
<p>For sensors with discrete events:</p>
<p>(00h otherwise)</p>
<p>[7]-reserved.</p>
<p>[6]-1b=assertion event msg. for state bit 14 enabled</p>
<p>[5]-1b=assertion event msg. for state bit 13 enabled</p>
<p>[4]-1b=assertion event msg. for state bit 12 enabled</p>
<p>[3]-1b=assertion event msg. for state bit 11 enabled</p>
<p>[2]-1b=assertion event msg. for state bit 10 enabled</p>
<p>[1]-1b=assertion event msg. for state bit 9 enabled</p>
<p>[0]-1b=assertion event msg. for state bit 8 enabled</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(5)*</td>
<td><p>For sensors with threshold based events:</p>
<p>[7]-1b=deassertion event for upper non-critical going high enabled</p>
<p>[6]-1b=deassertion event for upper non-critical going low enabled</p>
<p>[5]-1b=deassertion event for lower non-recoverable going high enabled</p>
<p>[4]-1b=deassertion event for lower non-recoverable going low enabled</p>
<p>[3]-1b=deassertion event for lower critical going high enabled</p>
<p>[2]-1b=deassertion event for lower critical going low enabled</p>
<p>[1]-1b=deassertion event for lower non-critical going high enabled</p>
<p>[0]-1b=deassertion event for lower non-critical going low enabled</p>
<p>For sensors with discrete events:</p>
<p>[7]-1b=deassertion event msg. for state bit 7 enabled</p>
<p>[6]-1b=deassertion event msg. for state bit 6 enabled</p>
<p>[5]-1b=deassertion event msg. for state bit 5 enabled</p>
<p>[4]-1b=deassertion event msg. for state bit 4 enabled</p>
<p>[3]-1b=deassertion event msg. for state bit 3 enabled</p>
<p>[2]-1b=deassertion event msg. for state bit 2 enabled</p>
<p>[1]-1b=deassertion event msg. for state bit 1 enabled</p>
<p>[0]-1b=deassertion event msg. for state bit 0 enabled</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(6)*</td>
<td><p>For sensors with threshold based events:</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved. Write as 0000b.</p>
<p>[3]-1b=deassertion event for upper non-recoverable going high enabled</p>
<p>[2]-1b=deassertion event for upper non-recoverable going low enabled</p>
<p>[1]-1b=deassertion event for upper critical going high enabled</p>
<p>[0]-1b=deassertion event for upper critical going low enabled</p>
<p>For sensors with discrete events:</p>
<p>(00h otherwise)</p>
<p>[7]-reserved.</p>
<p>[6]-1b=deassertion event msg. for state bit 14 enabled</p>
<p>[5]-1b=deassertion event msg. for state bit 13 enabled</p>
<p>[4]-1b=deassertion event msg. for state bit 12 enabled</p>
<p>[3]-1b=deassertion event msg. for state bit 11 enabled</p>
<p>[2]-1b=deassertion event msg. for state bit 10 enabled</p>
<p>[1]-1b=deassertion event msg. for state bit 9 enabled</p>
<p>[0]-1b=deassertion event msg. for state bit 8 enabled</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2"><p>*注：带小括号部分表示这部分内容可能不存在。</p>
<p>*=Devices must accept a variable number of response data bytes (2 to 6). (In particular, bytes 3 to 6 do not need to be transferred if byte 2 indicates that all Event Messages have been disabled.) This requirement is to allow a reduction in the number of data bytes that must be transferred. It is recommended that implementations only return the number of data bytes required to satisfy the command.</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 重新布置传感器事件（Re-arm Sensor Events）

命令功能

重新布置传感器事件。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>S/E 04h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>2Ah</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>sensor number (FFh=reserved)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>[7]-0b=re-arm all event status from this sensor. If 0, following parameter</p>
<p>bytes are ignored, but should still be written as 0, if sent.</p>
<p>[6:0]-reserved. Write as 000_0000b.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(3)*</td>
<td><p>For sensors with threshold based events:</p>
<p>[7]-1b=re-arm assertion event for upper non-critical going high</p>
<p>[6]-1b=re-arm assertion event for upper non-critical going low</p>
<p>[5]-1b=re-arm assertion event for lower non-recoverable going high</p>
<p>[4]-1b=re-arm assertion event for lower non-recoverable going low</p>
<p>[3]-1b=re-arm assertion event for lower critical going high</p>
<p>[2]-1b=re-arm assertion event for lower critical going low</p>
<p>[1]-1b=re-arm assertion event for lower non-critical going high</p>
<p>[0]-1b=re-arm assertion event for lower non-critical going low</p>
<p>For sensors with discrete events:</p>
<p>[7]-1b=re-arm assertion event for state bit 7</p>
<p>[6]-1b=re-arm assertion event for state bit 6</p>
<p>[5]-1b=re-arm assertion event for state bit 5</p>
<p>[4]-1b=re-arm assertion event for state bit 4</p>
<p>[3]-1b=re-arm assertion event for state bit 3</p>
<p>[2]-1b=re-arm assertion event for state bit 2</p>
<p>[1]-1b=re-arm assertion event for state bit 1</p>
<p>[0]-1b=re-arm assertion event for state bit 0</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(4)*</td>
<td><p>For sensors with threshold based events:</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved. Write as 0000b.</p>
<p>[3]-1b=re-arm assertion event for upper non-recoverable going high</p>
<p>[2]-1b=re-arm assertion event for upper non-recoverable going low</p>
<p>[1]-1b=re-arm assertion event for upper critical going high</p>
<p>[0]-1b=re-arm assertion event for upper critical going low</p>
<p>For sensors with discrete events:</p>
<p>(00h otherwise)</p>
<p>[7]-reserved. Ignore on read.</p>
<p>[6]-1b=re-arm assertion event for state bit 14</p>
<p>[5]-1b=re-arm assertion event for state bit 13</p>
<p>[4]-1b=re-arm assertion event for state bit 12</p>
<p>[3]-1b=re-arm assertion event for state bit 11</p>
<p>[2]-1b=re-arm assertion event for state bit 10</p>
<p>[1]-1b=re-arm assertion event for state bit 9</p>
<p>[0]-1b=re-arm assertion event for state bit 8</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(5)*</td>
<td><p>For sensors with threshold based events:</p>
<p>[7]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for upper non-critical going high</p>
<p>[6]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for upper non-critical going low</p>
<p>[5]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for lower non-recoverable going high</p>
<p>[4]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for lower non-recoverable going low</p>
<p>[3]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for lower critical going high</p>
<p>[2]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for lower critical going low</p>
<p>[1]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for lower non-critical going high</p>
<p>[0]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for lower non-critical going low</p>
<p>For sensors with discrete events:</p>
<p>(00h otherwise)</p>
<p>[7]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for state bit 7</p>
<p>[6]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for state bit 6</p>
<p>[5]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for state bit 5</p>
<p>[4]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for state bit 4</p>
<p>[3]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for state bit 3</p>
<p>[2]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for state bit 2</p>
<p>[1]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for state bit 1</p>
<p>[0]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for state bit 0</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(6)*</td>
<td><p>For sensors with threshold based events:</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved. Write as 0000b.</p>
<p>[3]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for upper non-recoverable going high</p>
<p>[2]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for upper non-recoverable going low</p>
<p>[1]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for upper critical going high</p>
<p>[0]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for upper critical going low</p>
<p>For sensors with discrete events:</p>
<p>(00h otherwise)</p>
<p>[7]-reserved. Ignore on read.</p>
<p>[6]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for state bit 14</p>
<p>[5]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for state bit 13</p>
<p>[4]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for state bit 12</p>
<p>[3]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for state bit 11</p>
<p>[2]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for state bit 10</p>
<p>[1]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for state bit 9</p>
<p>[0]-1b=re-arm deassertion event for state bit 8</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2"><p>*注：带小括号部分表示这部分内容可能不存在。</p>
<p>*=Devices must accept a variable number of request data bytes (2 to 6). This requirement is to allow a reduction in the number of data bytes that must be transferred. The receiver shall treat data bytes that are not explicitly transmitted as if they were written as '00h'.</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容          |
|----------|-----------------|
| 1        | Completion Code |

## 获取传感器事件状态（Get Sensor Event Status）

命令功能

获取传感器事件状态。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容                       |
|----------|------------------------------|
| NetFn    | S/E 04h                      |
| CMD      | 2Bh                          |
| 1        | Sensor number (FFh=reserved) |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 18%" />
<col style="width: 63%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>[7]-0b=All Event Messages disabled from this sensor</p>
<p>[6]-0b=Sensor scanning disabled</p>
<p>[5]-1b=reading/state unavailable (formerly "initial update in progress"). This bit is set to indicate that a 're-arm' or 'Set Event Receiver' command has been</p>
<p>used to request an update of the sensor status, and that update has not occurred yet. Software should use this bit to avoid getting an incorrect status</p>
<p>while the first sensor update is in progress. This bit is only required if it is possible for the controller to receive and process a 'Get Sensor Reading' or 'Get Sensor Event Status' command for the sensor before the update has</p>
<p>completed. This is most likely to be the case for sensors, such as fan RPM sensors, that may require seconds to accumulate the first reading after a rearm.</p>
<p>The bit is also used to indicate when a reading/state is unavailable because the management controller cannot obtain a valid reading or state for the monitored entity, typically because the entity is not present. See Section 16.4, Event Status, Event Conditions, and Present State and Section 16.6, Re-arming for more information.</p>
<p>[4:0]-reserved. Ignore on read.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><p>For sensors with threshold based events:</p>
<p>(High-going events are asserted when value first becomes ≥ threshold. Low-going events are asserted when value first becomes ≤ corresponding threshold.)</p>
<p>[7]-1b=assertion event condition for upper non-critical going high occurred</p>
<p>[6]-1b=assertion event condition for upper non-critical going low occurred</p>
<p>[5]-1b=assertion event condition for lower non-recoverable going high occurred</p>
<p>[4]-1b=assertion event condition for lower non-recoverable going low occurred</p>
<p>[3]-1b=assertion event condition for lower critical going high occurred</p>
<p>[2]-1b=assertion event condition for lower critical going low occurred</p>
<p>[1]-1b=assertion event condition for lower non-critical going high occurred</p>
<p>[0]-1b=assertion event condition for lower non-critical going low occurred</p>
<p>For sensors with discrete events:</p>
<p>[7]-1b=state 7 assertion event occurred</p>
<p>[6]-1b=state 6 assertion event occurred</p>
<p>[5]-1b=state 5 assertion event occurred</p>
<p>[4]-1b=state 4 assertion event occurred</p>
<p>[3]-1b=state 3 assertion event occurred</p>
<p>[2]-1b=state 2 assertion event occurred</p>
<p>[1]-1b=state 1 assertion event occurred</p>
<p>[0]-1b=state 0 assertion event occurred</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(4)*</td>
<td><p>For sensors with threshold based events:</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved. Write as 0000b.</p>
<p>[3]-1b=assertion event condition for upper non-recoverable going high occurred</p>
<p>[2]-1b=assertion event condition for upper non-recoverable going low occurred</p>
<p>[1]-1b=assertion event condition for upper critical going high occurred</p>
<p>[0]-1b=assertion event condition for upper critical going low occurred</p>
<p>For sensors with discrete events:</p>
<p>(00h otherwise)</p>
<p>[7]-reserved. Ignore on read.</p>
<p>[6]-1b=state 14 assertion event occurred</p>
<p>[5]-1b=state 13 assertion event occurred</p>
<p>[4]-1b=state 12 assertion event occurred</p>
<p>[3]-1b=state 11 assertion event occurred</p>
<p>[2]-1b=state 10 assertion event occurred</p>
<p>[1]-1b=state 9 assertion event occurred</p>
<p>[0]-1b=state 8 assertion event occurred</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(5)*</td>
<td><p>For sensors with threshold based events:</p>
<p>(High-going events are deasserted when value goes less than the corresponding</p>
<p>threshold minus the positive-going hysteresis value. Low-going events are deasserted when value goes greater than the corresponding threshold plus the negative-going hysteresis value.)</p>
<p>[7]-1b=deassertion event condition for upper non-critical going high occurred</p>
<p>[6]-1b=deassertion event condition for upper non-critical going low occurred</p>
<p>[5]-1b=deassertion event condition for lower non-recoverable going high occurred</p>
<p>[4]-1b=deassertion event condition for lower non-recoverable going low occurred</p>
<p>[3]-1b=deassertion event condition for lower critical going high occurred</p>
<p>[2]-1b=deassertion event condition for lower critical going low occurred</p>
<p>[1]-1b=deassertion event condition for lower non-critical going high occurred</p>
<p>[0]-1b=deassertion event condition for lower non-critical going low occurred</p>
<p>For sensors with discrete events:</p>
<p>[7]-1b=state 7 deassertion event occurred</p>
<p>[6]-1b=state 6 deassertion event occurred</p>
<p>[5]-1b=state 5 deassertion event occurred</p>
<p>[4]-1b=state 4 deassertion event occurred</p>
<p>[3]-1b=state 3 deassertion event occurred</p>
<p>[2]-1b=state 2 deassertion event occurred</p>
<p>[1]-1b=state 1 deassertion event occurred</p>
<p>[0]-1b=state 0 deassertion event occurred</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(6)*</td>
<td><p>For sensors with threshold based events:</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved. Write as 0000b.</p>
<p>[3]-1b=deassertion event condition for upper non-recoverable going high occurred</p>
<p>[2]-1b=deassertion event condition for upper non-recoverable going low occurred</p>
<p>[1]-1b=deassertion event condition for upper critical going high occurred</p>
<p>[0]-1b=deassertion event condition for upper critical going low occurred</p>
<p>For sensors with discrete events:</p>
<p>(0h otherwise)</p>
<p>[7]-reserved. Ignore on read.</p>
<p>[6]-1b=state 14 deassertion event occurred</p>
<p>[5]-1b=state 13 deassertion event occurred</p>
<p>[4]-1b=state 12 deassertion event occurred</p>
<p>[3]-1b=state 11 deassertion event occurred</p>
<p>[2]-1b=state 10 deassertion event occurred</p>
<p>[1]-1b=state 9 deassertion event occurred</p>
<p>[0]-1b=state 8 deassertion event occurred</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2"><p>*注：带小括号部分表示这部分内容可能不存在。</p>
<p>*=Devices must accept a variable number of response data bytes (3 to 6). This requirement is to allow a reduction in the number of data bytes that must be transferred. It is recommended that implementations only return the number of data bytes required to satisfy the command.</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取传感器读数（Get Sensor Reading）

命令功能

获取传感器读数。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容                       |
|----------|------------------------------|
| NetFn    | S/E 04h                      |
| CMD      | 2Dh                          |
| 1        | Sensor number (FFh=reserved) |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>Sensor reading</p>
<p>Byte 1: byte of reading. Ignore on read if sensor does not return an numeric</p>
<p>(analog) reading.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><p>[7]-0b=All Event Messages disabled from this sensor</p>
<p>[6]-0b=sensor scanning disabled</p>
<p>[5]-1b=reading/state unavailable (formerly "initial update in progress").</p>
<p>This bit is set to indicate that a 're-arm' or 'Set Event Receiver' command has been used to request an update of the sensor status, and that update has not occurred yet. Software should use this bit to avoid getting an incorrect status while the first sensor update is in progress. This bit is only required if it is possible for the controller to receive and process a 'Get Sensor Reading' or 'Get Sensor Event Status' command for the sensor before the update has completed. This is most likely to be the case for sensors, such as fan RPM sensors, that may require seconds to accumulate the first reading after a re-arm. The bit is also used to indicate when a reading/state is unavailable because the management controller cannot obtain a valid reading or state for the monitored entity, typically because the entity is not present. See Section 16.4, Event Status, Event Conditions, and Present State and Section 16.6, Re-arming for more information.</p>
<p>[4:0]-reserved. Ignore on read.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(4)</td>
<td><p>For threshold-based sensors</p>
<p>Present threshold comparison status</p>
<p>[7:6]-reserved. Returned as 1b. Ignore on read.</p>
<p>[5]-1b=at or above (≥) upper non-recoverable threshold</p>
<p>[4]-1b=at or above (≥) upper critical threshold</p>
<p>[3]-1b=at or above (≥) upper non-critical threshold</p>
<p>[2]-1b=at or below (≤) lower non-recoverable threshold</p>
<p>[1]-1b=at or below (≤) lower critical threshold</p>
<p>[0]-1b=at or below (≤) lower non-critical threshold</p>
<p>For discrete reading sensors</p>
<p>[7]-1b=state 7 asserted</p>
<p>[6]-1b=state 6 asserted</p>
<p>[5]-1b=state 5 asserted</p>
<p>[4]-1b=state 4 asserted</p>
<p>[3]-1b=state 3 asserted</p>
<p>[2]-1b=state 2 asserted</p>
<p>[1]-1b=state 1 asserted</p>
<p>[0]-1b=state 0 asserted</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(5)</td>
<td><p>For discrete reading sensors only. (Optional)</p>
<p>(00h Otherwise)</p>
<p>[7]-reserved. Returned as 1b. Ignore on read.</p>
<p>[6]-1b=state 14 asserted</p>
<p>[5]-1b=state 13 asserted</p>
<p>[4]-1b=state 12 asserted</p>
<p>[3]-1b=state 11 asserted</p>
<p>[2]-1b=state 10 asserted</p>
<p>[1]-1b=state 9 asserted</p>
<p>[0]-1b=state 8 asserted</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取传感器类型（Get Sensor Type）

命令功能

获取传感器类型。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容                       |
|----------|------------------------------|
| NetFn    | S/E 04h                      |
| CMD      | 2Fh                          |
| 1        | Sensor number (FFh=reserved) |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td>sensor type</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><p>[7]-reserved</p>
<p>[6:0]-Event/Reading type code</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 请求重报未恢复事件（Rearm Events）

命令功能

请求重报未恢复事件。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| NetFn | 30h |
| CMD | 94h |
| 1:3 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 4 | Sub command，子命令=32h |
| 5:8 | 预留，必须填0 |

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |

## 事件上报命令（Receive Event）

命令功能

事件上报命令。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>94h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=33h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5:08</td>
<td>New EventId，新事件码，小字节序，SMM与BMC内部交互使用新事件码，新事件码唯一标识一条事件。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9:12</td>
<td>Old EventId，旧事件码，小字节序，没有旧事件码则填0，为了兼容，SMM组装SNMP TRAP OID时，若有旧事件码则使用旧事件码生成TRAP OID，否则使用新事件码生成TRAP OID。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>13</td>
<td>对应传感器事件的事件类型，用于由旧事件码计算SNMP TRAP OID。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>14</td>
<td>对应传感器事件的传感器类型，用于由旧事件码计算SNMP TRAP OID。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>15</td>
<td>Segment Id，1 based，对于高性能服务器9032，每个segment表示一个4P系统，用Segment Id来区分哪个4P；填0表示不涉及。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>16</td>
<td>Group Id，产品存在Slot Id(丝印编号)重复时，使用Group Id区分，从1开始，比如插在内存板上的内存条，不同内存板上对应位置内存条编号重复，Group Id就是用于区分哪个内存板。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>17:18</td>
<td>事件主体编号，从1开始，跟丝印编号顺序一样递增，0xff表示指定segment和group的所有事件主体，填0表示不涉及。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>19:20</td>
<td>事件序号，1~65535，小字节序。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>21:24</td>
<td>产生时间，相对于1970年1月1日 0时0分0秒以来秒数。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>25</td>
<td><p>Serverity，严重性级别。</p>
<ul>
<li><p>0-Normal</p></li>
<li><p>1-Minor</p></li>
<li><p>2-Major</p></li>
<li><p>3-Critical</p></li>
</ul></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>26</td>
<td><p>事件种类</p>
<ul>
<li><p>0: 系统事件</p></li>
<li><p>1: 维护日志</p></li>
<li><p>2: 运行日志</p></li>
<li><p>3: 装备事件目前只支持了系统事件</p></li>
</ul></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>27:28:00</td>
<td><p>上报协议</p>
<ul>
<li><p>bit0: 本地记录</p></li>
<li><p>bit1: IPMI(管理模块)</p></li>
<li><p>bit2: SNMP Trap</p></li>
<li><p>bit3: syslog</p></li>
<li><p>bit4: e-mail</p></li>
<li><p>bit5: restful，小字节序</p></li>
</ul></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>29</td>
<td><p>事件触发方式</p>
<p>1-正常监控</p>
<p>2-模拟</p>
<p>3-手动触发恢复事件</p>
<p>4-收到重报命令重报，含义与事件监控对象的Mode属性取值保持一致</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>30:33:00</td>
<td>事件互斥码，小字节序，不涉及则填0。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>34</td>
<td><p>[7:1]: reserved</p>
<p>[0]: 级联标志</p>
<p>0=是最后一帧数据</p>
<p>1=后面还有数据</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>35:36:00</td>
<td>Offset，写入的数据偏移，从0开始。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>37:38:00</td>
<td><p>当数据较长需要多次写入时，一定要从头到尾按顺序写入，不能乱序。</p>
<p>Length，写入长度</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>39:N</td>
<td><p>data1:1-事件主体名称长度</p>
<p>data2:N-事件主体名称</p>
<p>说明</p>
<p>事件主体名称由两部分组成，“--”两个横杆分隔：</p>
<ul>
<li><p>前部分为：传感器名称或事件主体名称，优先为传感器名称，新增的非传感器事件则为事件主体名称，有些网管绑定了传感器名称，上报传感器名称是为了让SMM/CMC的SNMP TRAP兼容网管。</p></li>
<li><p>后部分为：附加标识信息，由事件监控对象1个或多个事件描述动态参数拼接而成；横杆和后部分可选。</p></li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li><p>格式1：lang_xxx_str=[事件主体名称]</p></li>
</ul>
<p>说明</p>
<p>接收侧实现了事件多语言且由对应多语言ID时上报格式，事件描述、处理建议、动态数据含义类同。</p>
<ul>
<li><p>格式2：lang_xxx_str</p></li>
</ul>
<p>说明</p>
<p>无法或不需实现多语言事件时以此格式上报英文的事件主体名称，动态数据含义类同。</p>
<ul>
<li><p>格式3：[事件主体名称]</p></li>
</ul>
<p>说明</p>
<p>语言ID与接收侧软件版本存在配套关系(一般指第三方模块上报事件给BMC)或语言ID无法前后兼容，如某条事件的事件描述或处理建议格式变化且无法兼容时新增语言ID，回退到老版本，将无法识别该语言ID。</p>
<p>解决方法：事件描述或处理建议等属性按lang_xxx_str=<em>xxxxxx</em>形式赋值，<em>xxxxxx</em>为事件描述或处理建议新格式)时使用该格式，事件描述、处理建议、动态数据含义类同。</p>
<p>data(N+1):2-事件描述长度，小字节序</p>
<p>data(N+3):M-事件描述内容(包含事件主体、位置[可选])</p>
<ul>
<li><p>格式1：lang_xxx_str=[事件描述][0xba]动态数据1[0xba]动态数据2[0xba]动态数据3[0xba]动态数据4</p></li>
<li><p>格式2：lang_xxx_str[0xba]动态数据1[0xba]动态数据2[0xba]动态数据3[0xba]动态数据4</p></li>
</ul>
<p>其中每个“动态数据”的3种格式为：lang_xxx_str或lang_xxx_str=xxxxx或xxxxx。</p>
<p>说明</p>
<p>动态数据N个数可选，以不可见字符0xba分隔，预留最多10个动态数据。</p>
<p>data(N+2+M):2-处理建议长度，小字节序，长度为0时表示无处理建议。</p>
<p>data(N+4+M):L-处理建议内容</p>
<ul>
<li><p>格式1：lang_xxx_str=[处理建议][0xba]动态数据1[0xba]动态数据2</p></li>
<li><p>格式2：lang_xxx_str[0xba]动态数据1[0xba]动态数据2</p></li>
</ul>
<p>其中每个“动态数据”的3种格式为：lang_xxx_str或lang_xxx_str=xxxxx或xxxxx</p>
<p>说明</p>
<p>动态数据N个数可选，以不可见字符0xba分隔，预留最多10个动态数据。</p>
<p>data(N+4+M+L):4-健康互斥码。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2"><p>注：</p>
<ul>
<li><p>为了减少BMC开发工作量，第一个版本不向管理板上报处理建议信息，命令中“处理建议长度”为0。</p></li>
<li><p>事件描述和处理建议必须有对应的多语言ID，而事件主体名称和动态数据由于其特殊性在大多数情况下无法或不需要实现事件多语言时，可以没有对应的多语言ID，直接以英文字符显示或上报。</p></li>
</ul></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:04</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>data1:1–事件接收侧是否实现了事件多语言</p>
<p>0–未实现，此时发送侧有多语言ID的项应该以lang_xxx_str=xxxxx格式上报，否则以xxxxx格式上报。</p>
<p>1–已实现，此时发送侧有多语言ID的项应该以lang_xxx_str格式上报，否则以xxxxx格式上报。</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 查询事件管控（Get Event Management）

命令功能

查询事件管控。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>94h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=34h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5:8</td>
<td>Event ID，小字节序，Event ID由事件上报时携带的，新事件ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9</td>
<td><p>表示segment，1 based</p>
<p>对于高性能服务器9032等，每个segment表示一个4P系统，用Segment Id来区分哪个4P。</p>
<p>填0表示不涉及；填0xff，表示所有segment。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>10</td>
<td><p>表示GroupId</p>
<p>产品存在Slot Id(丝印编号)重复时，使用Group Id区分，从1开始。</p>
<p>填0xff表示指定Segment Id下的所有Group，比如插在内存板上的内存条，不同内存板上对应位置内存条编号重复，Group Id就是用于区分哪个内存板，若GroupId为0xff，表示针对所有内存板的内存条，大多数情况下部件丝印不重复，此时只有一组，故GroupId填1。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>11:12</td>
<td><p>该字节表示事件主体编号，从1开始，跟丝印编号顺序一样递增。</p>
<p>0xff表示指定segment和group的所有事件主体，填0表示不涉及。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>13</td>
<td>Block Selector (00h if parameter does not require a block number)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>14</td>
<td>Event Info Parameter见<a href="#d1e75852">表10-1 Event Info</a></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>15</td>
<td>Read Offset，读取的数据偏移，从0开始。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>16</td>
<td>Length，读取长度。</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>End of List，表示当前数据是否结束。</p>
<p>当参数数据比较长的时候，可能需要分多次读取，通过此字段可以判断数据是否读完。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6:N</td>
<td><p>[7:1]：reserved</p>
<p>[0]：End of list</p>
<p>0=last data</p>
<p>1=middle data</p>
<p>Data，实际返回的数据可能小于等于Read length。</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 设置事件管控（Set Event Management）

命令功能

设置事件管控。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>94h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=35h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5:08</td>
<td>Event ID，小字节序，Event ID由事件上报时携带的，新事件ID。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9</td>
<td><p>Segment Id，表示哪个segment的事件，1 based。</p>
<p>对于高性能服务器9032等，每个segment表示一个4P系统，用Segment Id来区分哪个4P；填0表示不涉及。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>10</td>
<td><p>Group Id，表示哪个Group的事件。</p>
<p>产品存在Slot Id(丝印编号)重复时，使用Group Id区分，从1开始，比如插在内存板上的内存条，不同内存板上对应位置内存条编号重复，Group Id就是用于区分哪个内存板，若GroupId为0xff，表示针对所有内存板的内存条，大多数情况下部件丝印不重复，此时只有一组，故GroupId填1。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>11:12</td>
<td><p>该字节表示事件主体编号，从1开始，跟丝印编号顺序一样递增。</p>
<p>0xff表示指定segment和group的所有事件主体，填0表示不涉及。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>13</td>
<td>Parameter Selector，详见<a href="#d1e75852">表10-1 Event Info</a></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>14</td>
<td><p>[7:1]：reserved</p>
<p>[0]：级联标志</p>
<p>0=是最后一帧数据</p>
<p>1=后面还有数据</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>15</td>
<td><p>Offset，写入的数据偏移，从0开始。</p>
<p>当数据较长需要多次写入时，一定要从头到尾按顺序写入，不能乱序。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>16</td>
<td>Length，写入长度。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>17:N</td>
<td>写入的数据。</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:04 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |

参考信息

1.  Event Info

<table style="width:83%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 14%" />
<col style="width: 11%" />
<col style="width: 50%" />
<col style="width: 7%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>参数</th>
<th>#</th>
<th>数据</th>
<th>#(十进制)</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Event Mode</td>
<td>read-write</td>
<td><p>data1 – 事件监控模式</p>
<p>0h – 不监控</p>
<p>1h- 本地自动扫描</p>
<p>2h – 手动模拟</p>
<p>3h – 预留</p>
<p>4h – 预留</p>
<p>5h – 第三方控制(State属性由本地或BMC外部模块直接更新，监控任务不扫描)</p>
<p>data2- 模拟操作，当data1为02h时有效，否则统一填0，read时也填0</p>
<p>0h – 关闭</p>
<p>1h – 打开</p>
<p>data3- 事件状态，当data2为01h时有效，否则统一填0，read时也填0</p>
<p>0h – 恢复</p>
<p>1h – 产生</p>
<p>data4:4 – 预留，统一填0 （预留给门限类事件模拟读数，目前不实现）</p></td>
<td>1</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Event State</td>
<td>read-write</td>
<td><p>data1 – Event State，事件状态</p>
<p>0h – 未产生</p>
<p>1h – 产生</p></td>
<td>2</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Description Dynamic Data</td>
<td>Write only</td>
<td><p>Block Selector=动态数据编号，取值：1~4</p>
<p>data1:N – 事件描述动态数据</p></td>
<td>3</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Suggestion Dynamic Data</td>
<td>Write only</td>
<td><p>Block Selector=动态数据编号，取值：1~2</p>
<p>data1:N – 事件处理建议动态数据</p></td>
<td>4</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 查询事件（Get Event Entry）

命令功能

查询事件命令。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>94h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=37h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Event type</p>
<p>0=当前未恢复的非正常级别事件，但不包括装备/维修特有事件，呈现给用户，此时data5为0时同为1时效果。</p>
<p>1=当前未恢复的非正常级别事件，主要给装备用，此时data5为0时同为1时效果。</p>
<p>2=本地记录的所有事件。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>Serverity，严重性级别，</p>
<p>1：轻微及以上</p>
<p>2：严重及以上</p>
<p>3：紧急</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td><p>格式类型</p>
<p>0-英文事件格式</p>
<p>1-多语言ID格式，由调用者转换（暂未实现）</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8:09</td>
<td><p>Event Record ID，LS Byte first</p>
<p>0000h=Get first event</p>
<p>FFFFh=Get last event</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>10:11</td>
<td>Read Offset，读取的数据偏移，从0开始</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>12</td>
<td>Read Length，本次读取长度</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5:6</td>
<td><p>Next Record ID，LS Byte first</p>
<p>如果返回FFFFh，表示是最后一条记录。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td><p>End of List，表示当前数据是否结束。当参数数据比较长的时候，可能需要分多次读取，通过此字段可以判断数据是否读完。</p>
<p>[7:1]：reserved</p>
<p>[0]：End of list</p>
<p>0=last data</p>
<p>1=middle data</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td>预留，填0</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9:N</td>
<td><p>#事件信息</p>
<p>data1:4-NewEventId，小字节序，新事件码因为是唯一的，可用于事件管控。</p>
<p>data5:4-OldEventId，小字节序，有旧事件码则提供，否则填0，但是旧事件码不唯一，为了兼容才提供。</p>
<p>data9:1-严重性级别</p>
<p>0-Normal</p>
<p>1-Minor</p>
<p>2-Majo</p>
<p>3-Critical</p>
<p>data10:1-事件触发方式</p>
<p>1-正常监控</p>
<p>2-模拟</p>
<p>3-手动触发恢复事件</p>
<p>16-收到重报命令重报</p>
<p>18-模拟+重报，含义与事件监控对象的Mode属性取值保持一致</p>
<p>data11:20-时间日期，格式：YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS</p>
<p>data31:N-事件内容</p>
<p>格式类型为0时：英文格式的事件描述</p>
<p>格式类型为1时：</p>
<p>格式1：lang_xxx_str=[事件描述][0xba]动态数据1[0xba]动态数据2[0xba]动态数据3[0xba]动态数据4</p>
<p>格式2：lang_xxx_str[0xba]动态数据1[0xba]动态数据2[0xba]动态数据3[0xba]动态数据4</p>
<p>其中每个“动态数据”的3种格式：lang_xxx_str或lang_xxx_str=xxxxx或xxxxx</p>
<p>说明</p>
<p>动态数据N个数可选，以不可见字符0xba分隔，预留最多10个动态数据。</p>
<p>实际返回的数据可能小于等于Read length。</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 查询告警记录（Get Event Record）

命令功能

查询告警信息。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>94h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=40h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>低四位：request type，请求类型，</p>
<p>0-当前存在的告警；高四位：format，返回信息类型，0-为精简信息，目前仅支持0</p>
<p>1-查询历史事件；高四位：format，返回信息类型，0-为精简信息，目前仅支持0</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6:7</td>
<td><p>event index，一定条件过滤出多个事件时，查询事件起始编号，从0开始。</p>
<p>当查询到的事件信息单个消息容纳不下，则需要多次获取，第N次获取的偏移序号为0~N-1次查询到的事件数总和</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td>severity，严重等级，位图形式，bit0-normal，bit1-minor，bit2-major，bit3-critical，当对应bit为0时不包含该严重级别的事件，为1时表示包含该级别的事件；0xFF表示不指定等级</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9</td>
<td>subject type，主体类型，0xFF表示不指定主体类型</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(10)</td>
<td><p>request type=1时，有效：</p>
<p>direction，事件方向，1-产生事件，0-恢复事件，0xFF-不指定方向</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(11:14)</td>
<td><p>request type=1时，有效：</p>
<p>start time，起始时间戳（单位：秒），0xFFFFFFFF表示从最早的事件开始</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(15:18)</td>
<td><p>request type=1时，有效：</p>
<p>end time，终点时间戳（单位：秒），0xFFFFFFFF表示到当前时间</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code，异常返回码参见[Completion Code说明](#section254943233120) |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 5:6 | total event num，事件总数量 |
| 7 | msg event num，本消息事件数量 |
| 8 | rev，填0 |
| 9:12 | event code，告警码 |
| 13:16 | time stamp，事件发生时间戳 |
| 17 | severity，严重等级，0-normal，1-minor，2-major，3-critical |
| 18 | subject type，主体类型 |
| 19 | device num，当主体类型下存在多个设备，表明部件设备Number，从0开始编号，0xFF为无效值。 |
| 20:23 | rev1，填0 |
| …… | …… |
| N+1:N+4 | event code |
| N+5:N+8 | time stamp |
| N+9 | severity |
| N+10 | subject type |
| N+11 | device num |
| N+12:N+15 | rev1，填0 |

Completion Code说明

| 响应码 | 含义 | 建议 |
|----|----|----|
| COMP_CODE_SUCCESS 0x00 | 成功，并无数据待返回 | 等待下一轮发起请求 |
| COMP_CODE_BUSY 0xC0 | 失败，但可能存在数据待返回 | 立即重新发起请求 |
| COMP_CODE_DATA_TRUNCATED 0xC6 | 成功，并还有数据待返回 | 继续发起请求待返回数据 |
| COMP_CODE_OUTOF_RANGE (0xC9) | 失败，并无待返回数据 | 检查请求参数 |
| 其它 | 失败 | 检查请求参数 |

## 配置告警上报参数（Set Alert Configuration）

命令功能

配置告警上报参数。

<col style="width: 57%" />

</tr>

<td>93h</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=15h</td>

</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td><p>Offset，写入的数据偏移，从0开始。</p>
<p>当数据较长需要多次写入时，一定要从头到尾按顺序写入，不能乱序。</p></td>

<td>9</td>

</tr>
<tr>

## 查询告警上报参数（Get Alert Configuration）

命令功能

查询告警上报参数。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>93h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=16h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Destination Selector</p>
<p>取值：1~5，非服务器配置填0xff</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>Alert Parameter，见<a href="#table978318461052">表10-2 Alert Parameter</a></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td>Block Selector (00h if parameter does not require a block number)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td>Read Offset，读取的数据偏移，从0开始。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9</td>
<td>Length，读取长度</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 5:N | Data，实际返回的数据可能小于等于Read length。 |

参考信息

1.  Alert Parameter

<table style="width:83%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 23%" />
<col style="width: 50%" />
<col style="width: 8%" />
</colgroup>

<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Parameter Data</th>
<th>#(10进制)</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Trap Event Format Separator</td>
<td>data1- Get/Set Trap Event Format Separator</td>
<td>1</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Trap Event Format Include Keyword</td>
<td><p>data1-Get/Set Trap Event Format Include Keyword String</p>
<p>0h-not include</p>
<p>1h-include</p></td>
<td>2</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Trap Event Format Keyword String</td>
<td><p>data1:N-Get/Set the Combination Of Trap Events Custom Format Keywords, divided by ','.</p>
<p>Max 50 Bytes.End by null if less than 50 Bytes.</p></td>
<td>3</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Trap Destination Test</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>5</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Email Destination Enable</td>
<td><p>data1-Block Selector=Destination email selector, 1 based</p>
<p>data2-Get/Set Email Address Enable.</p>
<p>0h-Disable</p>
<p>1h-Enable</p></td>
<td>6</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Email Address</td>
<td><p>data1-Block Selector=Destination email selector, 1 based</p>
<p>data2:N-Get/Set the SMTP Destination Email Address For Receiving Events.</p>
<p>Max 50 Bytes.End by null if less than 50 Bytes.</p></td>
<td>7</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Email Description</td>
<td><p>data 1-Block Selector=Destination email selector, 1 based</p>
<p>data2:N-Get/Set the Description Of SMTP Destination Email Address For Receiving Events.</p>
<p>Max 50 Bytes.End by null if less than 50 Bytes.</p></td>
<td>8</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Email Destination Test</td>
<td><p>Set Email Test.</p>
<p>data1-Block Selector=email Destination selector, 1 based</p></td>
<td>9</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Email Templet Topic</td>
<td><p>data1:N-Get/Set the Topic Of SMTP Email Custom Templet.</p>
<p>Max 50 Bytes.End by null if less than 50 Bytes.</p></td>
<td>10</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Email Templet From</td>
<td><p>data1:N-Get/Set the From Of SMTP Email Custom Templet.</p>
<p>Max 50 Bytes.End by null if less than 50 Bytes.</p></td>
<td>11</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Email Templet Extra Information</td>
<td><p>data1-Email Templet Topic Extra Mask Bits</p>
<p>[7:3]=Reserved. Write as 0000 0b</p>
<p>[2]=1-Bit in Byte 2 of command will afffect the BMC IP Address bit</p>
<p>[1]=1-Bit in Byte 2 of command will afffect the Board Serial Number bit</p>
<p>[0]=1-Bit in Byte 2 of command will afffect the Product Asset bit</p>
<p>data2- Email Templet Topic Extra Get/Set Bits</p>
<p>[7:3]=Reserved. Write as 0000 0b</p>
<p>[2]=1-Include BMC IP Address</p>
<p>0-Not Include BMC IP Address</p>
<p>[1]=1-Include Board Serial Number</p>
<p>0-Not Include Board Serial Number</p>
<p>[0]=1-Include Product Asset</p>
<p>0-Not Include Product Asset</p></td>
<td>12</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SMTP Login Mode</td>
<td><p>data1-Get/Set SMTP Server Login Mode</p>
<p>0h=Anonymity</p>
<p>1h=User Authentication</p></td>
<td>13</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SMTP Login Username</td>
<td><p>data1:N-Get/Set SMTP Server Login Username</p>
<p>Max 50 Bytes.End by null if less than 50 Bytes.</p></td>
<td>14</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SMTP Login Password</td>
<td><p>data1:N-Set SMTP Server Login Password</p>
<p>Max 50 Bytes.End by null if less than 50 Bytes.</p></td>
<td>15</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Email Destination Maximum</td>
<td>data1-Get SMTP Email Destination Maximum</td>
<td>16</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SNMP Trap Mode</td>
<td><p>data1-SNMP Trap Mode</p>
<p>0=Event Code Mode</p>
<p>1=OID Mode</p></td>
<td>17</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SNMP Trap Source Identity</td>
<td><p>data1-SNMP Trap Source Identity</p>
<p>0=board SN</p>
<p>1=product asset tag</p>
<p>2=host name</p></td>
<td>18</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SMTP enable TLS</td>
<td><p>data1-Enable TLS</p>
<p>0=disable</p>
<p>1=enable</p></td>
<td>19</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SMTP server</td>
<td><p>data1:N-SMTP server (IPv4/IPv6/FQDN)</p>
<p>Max 255 Bytes. End by null if less than 255 Bytes.</p></td>
<td>20</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Trap Community Name Check</td>
<td>data1:N-Trap Community Name</td>
<td>21</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Trap Event Format Custom</td>
<td><p>data1-Trap Mode Custom</p>
<p>0=default</p>
<p>1=Tencent custom format</p></td>
<td>22</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Trap Alarm Severity</td>
<td><p>data1-Trap Alarm Severity</p>
<p>0=NULL</p>
<p>15=Informational</p>
<p>14=Minor</p>
<p>12=Major</p>
<p>8=Critical</p></td>
<td>23</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Trap Alarm SNMP Version</td>
<td><p>data1-Trap Alarm SNMP Version</p>
<p>0=SNMPv1</p>
<p>1=SNMPv2c</p>
<p>3=SNMPv3</p></td>
<td>24=0x18</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Event Reporting Type</td>
<td><p>data1:8- Event Reporting Type</p>
<p>data1: Redfish Event Reporting Type</p>
<p>0= OemEvent</p>
<p>255=set时，保持上一次值，不做修改</p>
<p>data2: Snmp Event Reporting Type</p>
<p>0= OemEvent</p>
<p>1= SEL</p>
<p>255=set时，保持上一次值，不做修改</p>
<p>data3: Smtp Event Reporting Type</p>
<p>0= OemEvent</p>
<p>1= SEL</p>
<p>255=set时，保持上一次值，不做修改</p>
<p>data4: Syslog Event Reporting Type</p>
<p>0= OemEvent</p>
<p>1= SEL</p>
<p>255=set时，保持上一次值，不做修改</p>
<p>data5-8: Reserved. Write as 0xFFFFFFFF</p></td>
<td>25=0x19</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Trap Enable</td>
<td><p>data1-Enable Trap</p>
<p>0=disable</p>
<p>1=enable</p>
<p>说明：</p>
<p>1、当Destination Selector为0xff时，设置snmp trap上报功能使能状态；</p>
<p>2、当Destination Selector为1-4时，设置指定snmp trap接收服务器使能状态；</p></td>
<td>26=0x1A</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 设置事件接收器（Set Event Receiver）

命令功能

设置事件接收器。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>参数（字节）</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>S/E 04h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>00h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Event Receiver Slave Address. 0FFh disables Event Message Generation,</p>
<p>Otherwise:</p>
<p>[7:1]-IPMB (I2C) Slave Address</p>
<p>[0]-always 0b when [7:1] hold I2C slave address</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>[7:2]-reserved</p>
<p>[1:0]-Event Receiver LUN</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容          |
|----------|-----------------|
| 1        | Completion Code |

## 获取事件接收器（Get Event Receiver）

命令功能

获取事件接收器。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容  |
|----------|---------|
| NetFn    | S/E 04h |
| CMD      | 01h     |

<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>Event Receiver Slave Address. 0FFh indicates Event Message Generation</p>
<p>has been disabled. Otherwise:</p>
<p>[7:1] IPMB (I2C) Slave Address</p>
<p>[0] always 0b when [7:1] hold I2C slave address</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><p>[7:2]-reserved</p>
<p>[1:0]-Event Receiver LUN</p></td>
