</tbody>
</table>

## 恢复事件（Clear Event）

命令功能

恢复事件。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>93h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=39h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Event architecture.</p>
<p>0-Sensor event，基于传感器的事件机制</p>
<p>1-Object event，新事件机制</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6:9</td>
<td><p>Event ID，若byte5为1时，需要填写Event ID，否则必须填全0。</p>
<p>data1:4-Event ID，小字节序，Event ID由事件上报时携带的。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>10</td>
<td><p>当byte5为0时：Sensor Type</p>
<p>当byte5为1时：该字节表示事件主体序号的高字节</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>11</td>
<td><p>当byte5为0时：Sensor #</p>
<p>当byte5为1时：该字节表示事件主体序号的低字节，若byte10和byte11都为0xff时，表示对Event ID指定的一类事件操作，而不是针对某个部件的某个事件。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>12</td>
<td><p>Event Dir | Event Type，仅byte5为0时有效</p>
<p>byte5为1时，必须填0</p>
<p>bit7表示0-告警和1-去告警</p>
<p>bit6-bit0 eventtype</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>13</td>
<td>Event Data 1，仅byte5为0时有效，byte5为1时，必须填0</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>14</td>
<td>Event Data 2，仅byte5为0时有效，byte5为1时，必须填0</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>15</td>
<td>Event Data 3，仅byte5为0时有效，byte5为1时，必须填0</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>16</td>
<td><p>Operate Type</p>
<p>0-手动触发恢复事件</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |

## 添加SEL日志（Add SEL Entry）

命令功能

向BMC添加SEL日志。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容                 |
|----------|------------------------|
| NetFn    | Storage 0Ah            |
| CMD      | 44h                    |
| 1:16     | Record Data, 16 bytes. |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code. Generic, plus following command specific:</p>
<p>80h=operation not supported for this Record Type</p>
<p>81h=cannot execute command, SEL erase in progress</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:3</td>
<td>Record ID for added record, LS Byte first.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

参考信息

1.  SEL Record Formats

<table style="width:83%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 5%" />
<col style="width: 11%" />
<col style="width: 50%" />
<col style="width: 14%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Byte</th>
<th>Field</th>
<th>Description</th>
<th>BIOS填写字段</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><p>1</p>
<p>2</p></td>
<td>Record ID</td>
<td>ID used for SEL Record access. The Record ID values 0000h and FFFFh have special meaning in the Event Access commands and must not be used as Record ID values for stored SEL Event Records.</td>
<td>NO</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>Record Type</td>
<td><p>[7:0]-Record Type</p>
<p>02h=system event record</p>
<p>C0h-DFh=OEM timestamped, bytes 8-16 OEM defined</p>
<p>E0h-FFh=OEM non-timestamped, bytes 4-16 OEM defined</p></td>
<td>YES</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4:7</td>
<td>Timestamp</td>
<td>Time when event was logged. LS byte first.</td>
<td>NO</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8:9</td>
<td>Generator ID</td>
<td><p>RqSA &amp; LUN if event was generated from IPMB. Software ID if event was generated from system software.</p>
<p>Byte 1</p>
<p>[7:1]-7-bit I2C . Slave Address, or 7-bit system software ID</p>
<p>[0] 0b=ID is IPMB Slave Address</p>
<p>1b=system software ID</p>
<p>Byte 2</p>
<p>[7:4]-Channel number. Channel that event message was received over. 0h if the event message was received via the system interface, primary IPMB, or internally generated by the BMC. (New for IPMI v1.5. These bits were reserved in IPMI v1.0)</p>
<p>[3:2]-reserved. Write as 00b.</p>
<p>[1:0]-IPMB device LUN if byte 1 holds Slave Address. 00b otherwise.</p></td>
<td>YES</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>10</td>
<td>EvM Rev</td>
<td><p>Event Message format version (=<strong>04h</strong> for events in this specification, 03h for IPMI</p>
<p>v1.0 Event Messages.)</p>
<p><em>Note: the BMC must accept Platform Event request messages that are in IPMI v1.0</em></p>
<p><em>format (EvMRev=03h) and log them as IPMI v1.5/v2.0 Records by setting the</em></p>
<p><em>EvMRev field to 04h and setting the Channel Number in the Generator ID field</em></p>
<p><em>appropriately for the channel that the event was received from.</em></p></td>
<td>YES</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>11</td>
<td>Sensor Type</td>
<td>Sensor Type Code for sensor that generated the event</td>
<td>YES</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>12</td>
<td>Sensor #</td>
<td>Number of sensor that generated the event</td>
<td>NO</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>13</td>
<td><p>Event Dir |</p>
<p>Event Type</p></td>
<td><p>Event Dir</p>
<p>[7 ]-0b=Assertion event.</p>
<p>1b=Deassertion event.</p>
<p>Event Type</p>
<p>Type of trigger for the event, e.g. critical threshold going high, state asserted, etc.</p>
<p>Also indicates <em>class</em> of the event. E.g. discrete, threshold, or OEM. The Event Type field is encoded using the Event/Reading Type Code. See section 42.1, <em>Event/Reading Type Codes</em>.</p>
<p>[6:0]-Event Type Code</p></td>
<td>YES</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>14</td>
<td>Event Data 1</td>
<td>Per <em>Table 29-6, Event Request Message</em> Event Data Field Contents</td>
<td>YES</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>15</td>
<td>Event Data 2</td>
<td>Per <em>Table 29-6, Event Request Message</em> Event Data Field Contents</td>
<td>YES</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>16</td>
<td>Event Data 3</td>
<td>Per <em>Table 29-6, Event Request Message</em> Event Data Field Contents</td>
<td>YES</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

![](media/image6.png)

BIOS填写字段为NO的字段，BIOS填写0即可。

## 配置事件告警级别（Set Event Severity Level）

命令功能

配置事件告警级别。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>91h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。，厂商ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=21h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5:8</td>

</tr>
<tr>

<p>02h: Major</p>
<p>03h: Critical</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取系统健康状态（Get System Health）

命令功能

获取系统健康状态。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>91h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。，厂商ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=08h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5*</td>

</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2">注：其中*是可选参数，不带这个参数默认是FRU0。</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 5 | Minor Event count |
| 6 | Major Event count |
| 7 | Critical Event count |

## 获取系统健康事件（Get System Health Event）

命令功能

获取系统健康事件。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| NetFn | 30h |
| CMD | 91h |
| 1:3 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 4 | Sub command，子命令=09h |
| 5:6 | Event Record ID，LS Byte first |

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 5:6 | Next Record ID，LS Byte first |
| 7:22 | SEL Record，满足SEL格式定义的事件数据 |

## 获取日志最大条数（Get Log Entry Size）

命令功能

查询SEL，Syslog支持的最大条数。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>93h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub Command，子命令=17h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>设置功耗封顶失败时动作</p>
<p>00h--查询SEL支持最大条数</p>
<p>01h--查询Syslog支持的最大条数</p>
<p>other reserved</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5:6</td>
<td><p>LS Byte first</p>
<p>支持SEL、Syslog最大条数</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取备份SEL表项（Get Backup SEL Entry）

命令功能

获取备份SEL表项。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>91h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>sub command=0x14</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>Backup ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>67</td>
<td>Reservation ID, LS Byte first.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td><p>Operation:</p>
<p>0=Ready to get the backup SEL record, notify the IPMC ready the records data.</p>
<p>1= Get the backup SEL record</p>
<p>2=Finished reading the backup SEL record</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(9:10)</td>
<td><p>This byte exists when byte 8=1.</p>
<p>SEL Record ID, LS Byte first.</p>
<p>0000h=GET FIRST ENTRY</p>
<p>FFFFh=GET LAST ENTRY</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(11)</td>
<td><p>The byte 11 and byte 12 may absent.</p>
<p>Offset into record</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(12)</td>
<td>If byte 11 exist, this byte must be provied. Bytes to read. FFh means read entire record.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>Return an error completion code if the SEL is empty.</p>
<p>80h=No backup SEL record</p>
<p>81h=Backup SEL erase in progress</p>
<p>82h=Backup SEL changed</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5:6</td>
<td><p>Next SEL Record ID, LS Byte first (return FFFFh if the record just</p>
<p>returned is the last record.)</p>
<p>Note: FFFFh is not allowed as the record ID for an actual record. I.e. the Record ID in the Record Data for the last record should not be FFFFh.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7:N</td>
<td>Record Data, 16 bytes for entire record.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取备份SEL信息（Get Backup SEL Info）

命令功能

获取备份SEL的信息。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| NetFn | 30h |
| CMD | 91h |
| 1:3 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 4 | sub command=0x15 |
| 5 | Backup ID |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>Return an error completion code if the SEL is empty.</p>
<p>80h=No backup SEL record</p>
<p>81h=Backup SEL erase in progress.</p>
<p>82h=Backup SEL changed.</p>
<p>If completion code is not 0, the following bytes is ignored.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Backup SEL record Format Version-version number of the SEL command set for this SEL Device.</p>
<p>51h for this IPMI2.0.</p>
<p>(BCD encoded).BCD encoded with bits 7:4 holding the Least Significant digit of the revision and bits 3:0 holding the Most Significant bits.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>Entries LS Byte-number of log entries in SEL, LS Byte</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td>Entries MS Byte-number of log entries in SEL, MS Byte</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8:11</td>
<td>Backup timestamp. LS byte first.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取系统重启原因（Get System Restart Cause）

命令功能

获取系统重启原因。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容      |
|----------|-------------|
| NetFn    | Chassis 00h |
| CMD      | 07h         |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>Restart Cause</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-0h=unknown (system start/restart detected, but cause unknown)</p>
<p>[required if this condition exists]</p>
<p>1h=Chassis Control command [required]</p>
<p>2h=reset via pushbutton [optional]</p>
<p>3h=power-up via power pushbutton [optional]</p>
<p>4h=Watchdog expiration (see watchdog flags) [required]</p>
<p>5h=OEM [optional]</p>
<p>6h=automatic power-up on AC being applied due to 'always restore' power restore policy (see 28.8, Set Power Restore Policy Command) [optional]</p>
<p>7h=automatic power-up on AC being applied due to 'restore previous</p>
<p>power state' power restore policy (see 28.8, Set Power Restore Policy Command) [optional]</p>
<p>8h=reset via PEF [required if PEF reset supported]</p>
<p>9h=power-cycle via PEF [required if PEF power-cycle supported]</p>
<p>Ah=soft reset (e.g. CTRL-ALT-DEL) [optional]</p>
<p>Bh=power-up via RTC (system real time clock) wakeup [optional]</p>
<p>all other=reserved</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>Channel number. (Channel that command was received over，指复位命令，不是当前命令)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 非系统接口平台事件消息（Platform Event Message）

命令功能

平台事件消息（非系统接口）。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>S/E 04h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>02h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Event Message Revision. This field is used to identify different revisions of the Event Message format. The revision number shall be 04h for Event Messages that comply with the format given in this specification. IPMI v1.0 messages use 03h. It is recommended that software be able to interpret both versions.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td>Sensor Type. Indicates the event class or type of sensor that generated the Event Message.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>Sensor #.A unique number (within a given sensor device) representing the 'sensor' within the management controller that generated the Event Message. Sensor numbers are used for both identification and access of sensor information, such as getting and setting sensor thresholds.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td><p>Event Dir | Event Type</p>
<p>[7]:Event Dir</p>
<p>Indicates the event transition direction. (0=Assertion Event, 1=Deassertion Event)</p>
<p>[6:0]:Event Type</p>
<p>This field indicates the type of threshold crossing or state transition (trigger) that produced the event. This is encoded using the Event/Reading Type Code.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2">For Sensor Class=threshold</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5:7</td>
<td><p>Event Data 1</p>
<p>[7:6]-00b=unspecified byte 2</p>
<p>01b=trigger reading in byte 2</p>
<p>10b=OEM code in byte 2</p>
<p>11b=sensor-specific event extension code in byte 2</p>
<p>[5:4]-00b=unspecified byte 3</p>
<p>01b=trigger threshold value in byte 3</p>
<p>10b=OEM code in byte 3</p>
<p>11b=sensor-specific event extension code in byte 3</p>
<p>[3:0]-Offset from Event/Reading Code for threshold event.</p>
<p>Event Data 2 reading that triggered event, FFh or not present if unspecified.</p>
<p>Event Data 3 threshold value that triggered event, FFh or not present if unspecified. If present, byte 2 must be present.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2">For Sensor Class=discrete</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5:7</td>
<td><p>Event Data 1</p>
<p>[7:6]-00b=unspecified byte 2</p>
<p>01b=previous state and/or severity in byte 2</p>
<p>10b=OEM code in byte 2</p>
<p>11b=sensor-specific event extension code in byte 2</p>
<p>[5:4]-00b=unspecified byte 3</p>
<p>01b=reserved</p>
<p>10b=OEM code in byte 3</p>
<p>11b=sensor-specific event extension code in byte 3</p>
<p>[3:0]-Offset from Event/Reading Code for discrete event state</p>
<p>Event Data 2</p>
<p>[7:4]-Optional offset from 'Severity' Event/Reading Code. (0Fh if unspecified).</p>
<p>[3:0]-Optional offset from Event/Reading Type Code for previous discrete event state. (0Fh if unspecified.)</p>
<p>Event Data 3 Optional OEM code. FFh or not present if unspecified.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2">For Sensor Class=OEM</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5:7</td>
<td><p>Event Data 1</p>
<p>[7:6]-00b=unspecified in byte 2</p>
<p>01b=previous state and/or severity in byte 2</p>
<p>10b=OEM code in byte 2</p>
<p>11b=reserved</p>
<p>[5:4]-00b=unspecified byte 3</p>
<p>01b=reserved</p>
<p>10b=OEM code in byte 3</p>
<p>11b=reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-Offset from Event/Reading Type Code</p>
<p>Event Data 2</p>
<p>[7:4]-Optional OEM code bits or offset from 'Severity' Event/Reading Type Code. (0Fh if unspecified).</p>
<p>[3:0]-Optional OEM code or offset from Event/Reading Type Code for previous event state. (0Fh if unspecified).</p>
<p>Event Data 3 Optional OEM code. FFh or not present or unspecified.</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容          |
|----------|-----------------|
| 1        | Completion Code |

## 系统接口平台事件消息（Platform Event Message）

命令功能

平台事件消息（系统接口）。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>S/E 04h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>02h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Generator ID.7-bit System Software ID. This field identifies the device that has generated the Event Message.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>Event Message Revision. This field is used to identify different revisions of the Event</p>
<p>Message format. The revision number shall be 04h for Event Messages that comply with the format given in this specification. IPMI v1.0 messages use 03h. It is recommended that software be able to interpret both versions.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>Sensor Type. Indicates the event class or type of sensor that generated the Event Message.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sensor #.A unique number (within a given sensor device) representing the 'sensor' within the management controller that generated the Event Message. Sensor numbers are used for both identification and access of sensor information, such as getting and setting sensor thresholds.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Event Dir | Event Type</p>
<p>[7]:Event Dir</p>
<p>Indicates the event transition direction. (0=Assertion Event, 1=Deassertion Event)</p>
<p>[6:0]:Event Type</p>
<p>This field indicates the type of threshold crossing or state transition (trigger) that produced the event. This is encoded using the Event/Reading Type Code.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2">For Sensor Class=threshold</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6:8</td>
<td><p>Event Data 1</p>
<p>[7:6]-00b=unspecified byte 2</p>
<p>01b=trigger reading in byte 2</p>
<p>10b=OEM code in byte 2</p>
<p>11b=sensor-specific event extension code in byte 2</p>
<p>[5:4]-00b=unspecified byte 3</p>
<p>01b=trigger threshold value in byte 3</p>
<p>10b=OEM code in byte 3</p>
<p>11b=sensor-specific event extension code in byte 3</p>
<p>[3:0]-Offset from Event/Reading Code for threshold event.</p>
<p>Event Data 2 reading that triggered event, FFh or not present if unspecified.</p>
<p>Event Data 3 threshold value that triggered event, FFh or not present if unspecified. If present, byte 2 must be present.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2">For Sensor Class=discrete</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6:8</td>
<td><p>Event Data 1</p>
<p>[7:6]-00b=unspecified byte 2</p>
<p>01b=previous state and/or severity in byte 2</p>
<p>10b=OEM code in byte 2</p>
<p>11b=sensor-specific event extension code in byte 2</p>
<p>[5:4]-00b=unspecified byte 3</p>
<p>01b=reserved</p>
<p>10b=OEM code in byte 3</p>
<p>11b=sensor-specific event extension code in byte 3</p>
<p>[3:0]-Offset from Event/Reading Code for discrete event state</p>
<p>Event Data 2</p>
<p>[7:4]-Optional offset from ‘Severity’ Event/Reading Code. (0Fh if unspecified).</p>
<p>[3:0]-Optional offset from Event/Reading Type Code for previous discrete event state. (0Fh if unspecified.)</p>
<p>Event Data 3 Optional OEM code. FFh or not present if unspecified.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2">For Sensor Class=OEM</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6:8</td>
<td><p>Event Data 1</p>
<p>[7:6]-00b=unspecified in byte 2</p>
<p>01b=previous state and/or severity in byte 2</p>
<p>10b=OEM code in byte 2</p>
<p>11b=reserved</p>
<p>[5:4]-00b=unspecified byte 3</p>
<p>01b=reserved</p>
<p>10b=OEM code in byte 3</p>
<p>11b=reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-Offset from Event/Reading Type Code</p>
<p>Event Data 2</p>
<p>[7:4]-Optional OEM code bits or offset from 'Severity' Event/Reading Type Code. (0Fh if unspecified).</p>
<p>[3:0]-Optional OEM code or offset from Event/Reading Type Code for previous event state. (0Fh if unspecified).</p>
<p>Event Data 3 Optional OEM code. FFh or not present or unspecified.</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取系统重启原因（Get System Restart Cause）

命令功能

获取系统重启原因。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>92h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=11h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>fruid</p>
<p>00h - main board</p>
<p>01h - base</p>
<p>02h - fabric</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Restart Cause</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-0h=unknown (system start/restart detected, but cause unknown)</p>
<p>[required if this condition exists]</p>
<p>1h=Chassis Control command [required]</p>
<p>2h=reset via pushbutton [optional]</p>
<p>3h=power-up via power pushbutton [optional]</p>
<p>4h=Watchdog expiration (see watchdog flags) [required]</p>
<p>5h=OEM [optional]</p>
<p>6h=automatic power-up on AC being applied due to 'always restore' power restore policy [optional]</p>
<p>7h=automatic power-up on AC being applied due to 'restore previous</p>
<p>power state' power restore policy [optional]</p>
<p>8h=reset via PEF [required if PEF reset supported]</p>
<p>9h=power-cycle via PEF [required if PEF power-cycle supported]</p>
<p>Ah=soft reset (e.g. CTRL-ALT-DEL) [optional]</p>
<p>Bh=power-up via RTC (system real time clock) wakeup [optional]</p>
<p>all other=reserved</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>Channel number. (Channel that command was received over)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取事件描述（Get event descripion）

命令功能

获取事件描述。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>94h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=3Dh</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5:6</td>
<td><p>recordID，LSB first</p>
<p>recordID从0开始</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5:6</td>
<td><p>next recordID, LSB first, (return FFFFh if the record just</p>
<p>returned is the last record.)</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td>event count，本次发送的事件数目，下面是具体事件内容。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td>sensor type，第一条事件的sensor type</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9</td>
<td>event reading type</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>10</td>
<td>event data0</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>11</td>
<td>event data1</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>12</td>
<td>event data2</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>13</td>
<td>alarm level</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>14</td>
<td>event data0 flag，默认为0</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>15</td>
<td><p>event data1 flag，默认为0</p>
<p>1表示event_data1保存的是sensor number</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>16</td>
<td>event data2 flag，默认为0</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>17</td>
<td>event desc length(N)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>18:N</td>
<td>event desc data</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(18+N):1</td>
<td>sensor type，第二条事件的sensor type</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>…</td>
<td>…</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 设置传感器读数（Set Sensor Reading）

命令功能

设置传感器读取的当前值。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>91h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=0Ch</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>Sensor Number</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>Action:</p>
<p>0 Stop test</p>
<p>1 Start test</p></td>
</tr>

<td>Reading</td>
</tr>

| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |

## 获取传感器名称（Get Sensor Name）

命令功能

获取指定传感器的名称。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| NetFn | 30h |
| CMD | 93h |
| 1:3 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 4 | Sub command，子命令=02h |
| 5 | Sensor number |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>*5:20</td>
<td><p>Sensor Name，16 Bytes，不足16字节部分补0</p>
<p>说明</p>
<p>Sensor Name字段可选，如果查询不成功则没有该字段。</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取传感器最高事件级别（Get Sensor Max Event Severity）

命令功能

获取传感器最高事件级别。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| NetFn | 30h |
| CMD | 93h |
| 1:3 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 4 | Sub command，子命令=09h |
| 5 | Sensor Number |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Event Severity</p>
<p>0h=No State Assert Event</p>
<p>1h=Non Critical</p>
<p>2h=Critical</p>
<p>3h=Non Recoverable</p>
<p>Other=Reserved</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取传感器信息（Get Sensors Info）

命令功能

支持读取多个传感器的信息。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>93h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=28h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>trigger type</p>
<p>0: reading</p>
<p>1: event</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6:N</td>
<td>Sensors Number</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2">注：此命令可以支持读取多个传感器的信息，可以读取门限传感器的读数和离散传感器的事件级别，6：N通过不定长的输入参数来确定所需读取的传感器个数。</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>0xFF：输入的sensor number错误</p>
<p>[7]-0b=All Event Messages disabled from this sensor</p>
<p>[6]-0b=sensor scanning disabled</p>
<p>[5]-1b=reading/state unavailable</p>
<p>[4:0]-reserved. Ignore on read</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5:（2N-6）</td>
<td><p>每个传感器有两个字节的返回值：完成码和读数</p>
<p>5：读取第一个传感器时的完成码</p>
<p>6：第一个传感器的读数</p>
<p>……</p>
<p>2N-7：读取第N个传感器时的完成码</p>
<p>2N-6：第N个传感器的读数</p>
<p>离散传感器返回的传感器读数是当前传感器事件最高级别：</p>
<p>Event Severity</p>
<p>0h=No State Assert Event</p>
<p>1h=Non Critical</p>
<p>2h=Critical</p>
<p>3h=Non Recoverable</p>
<p>Other=Reserved</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取传感器门限值（Get Threshold Sensor Reading）

命令功能

获取传感器门限值。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| NetFn | 30h |
| CMD | 93h |
| 1:3 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 4 | Sub command，子命令=31h |
| 5 | Sensor Type，见[表10-4 传感器类型](#table856651194911) |
| 6 | Parameter Selector |
| 7 | Device \#，1 based，部件编号，仅在支持查询总功率的部件（如CLU，风扇）时255代表查询总功率，其他均为具体的部件编号。 |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>【0xC9】表示输入的部件编号超过限制</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5:8</td>
<td>Reading，小字节序，有符号int类型</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9</td>
<td>Unit</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

参考信息

1.  传感器类型

| 类型       | 取值(10进制) |
|------------|--------------|
| 温度       | 1            |
| 电压       | 2            |
| 电流       | 3            |
| 转速       | 4            |
| 电源或功率 | 8            |
| 功率       | 11           |

2.  温度数据表

| Parameter   | Parameter Data | \#(10进制) |
|-------------|----------------|------------|
| Inlet Temp  | 整机进风口温度 | 1          |
| OutLet Temp | 整机出风口温度 | 2          |
| CPU Temp    | CPU核心温度    | 3          |
| DIMM Temp   | 内存条温度     | 4          |
| RAID Temp   | raid卡温度     | 5          |

3.  电压数据表

| Parameter         | Parameter Data | \#(10进制) |
|-------------------|----------------|------------|
| PS input voltage  | 电源输入电压   | 1          |
| PS output voltage | 电源输出电压   | 2          |
| SYS12V/SYS_12V_2  | 12v电压        | 3          |

4.  电流数据表

| Parameter         | Parameter Data | \#(10进制) |
|-------------------|----------------|------------|
| PS input current  | 电源输入电流   | 1          |
| PS output current | 电源输出电流   | 2          |

5.  功率数据表

| Parameter       | Parameter Data | \#(10进制) |
|-----------------|----------------|------------|
| PS input power  | 电源输入功率   | 1          |
| PS output power | 电源输出功率   | 2          |
| Fan total power | 风扇总功率     | 3          |
| CLU Power       | 散热组件总功率 | 4          |

6.  转速表

| Parameter                 | Parameter Data | \#(10进制) |
|---------------------------|----------------|------------|
| FAN1 F Speed/FAN1 R Speed | 风扇转速       | 1          |

7.  单位

| 单位       | \#(10进制) |
|------------|------------|
| 摄氏度(C)  | 1          |
| 伏特(V)    | 4          |
| 安倍(A)    | 5          |
| 瓦特(W)    | 6          |
| 转速(RPM)  | 7          |
| 毫伏(mV)   | 104        |
| 毫安(mA)   | 105        |
| 0.1瓦特(W) | 106        |

## 获取传感器读数计算系数（Get Sensor Reading Factors）

命令功能

查询传感器读数计算系数。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容                       |
|----------|------------------------------|
| NetFn    | S/E 04h                      |
| CMD      | 23h                          |
| 1        | sensor number (FFh=reserved) |
| 2        | reading byte                 |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td>Next reading. This field indicates the next reading for which a different set of sensor reading factors is defined. If the reading byte passed in the request does not match exactly to a table entry, the nearest entry will be returned, and this field will hold the reading byte value for which an exact table match would have been obtained. Once the exact’table byte has been obtained, this field will be returned with a value such that, if the returned value is used as the reading byte for the next request, the process can be repeated to cycle through all the Sensor Reading Factors in the device's internal table. This process shall wrap around' such a complete list of the table values can be obtained starting with any reading byte value.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>M: LS 8 bits</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td><p>[7:6]-M: MS 2 bits</p>
<p>[5:0]-Tolerance in +/- 1/2 raw counts</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>[7:0]-B: LS 8 bits</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>[7:6]-B: MS 2 bits</p>
<p>Unsigned, 10-bit Basic Sensor Accuracy in 1/100 percent scaled up byr unsigned Accuracy exponent.</p>
<p>[5:0]-Accuracy: LS 6 bits</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td><p>[7:4]-Accuracy: MS 4 bits</p>
<p>[3:2]-Accuracy exp: 2 bits, unsigned</p>
<p>[1:0]-reserved: 2 bits, returned as 00b</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td><p>[7:4]-R (result) exponent 4 bits, signed</p>
<p>[3:0]-B exponent 4 bits, signed</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取设备SDR信息（Get Device SDR Info）

命令功能

获取设备SDR信息。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>S/E 04h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>20h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(1)</td>
<td><p>Operation (optional)</p>
<p>[7:1]-reserved</p>
<p>[0]-1b=Get SDR count. This returns the total number of SDRs in the device.</p>
<p>0b=Get Sensor count. This returns the number of sensors implemented on LUN this command was addressed to.</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>For Operation="Get Sensor Count" (or if byte 1 not present in request):</p>
<p>Number of sensors in device for LUN this command was addressed to.</p>
<p>For Operation=“Get SDR Count”:</p>
<p>Total Number of SDRs in the device.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><p>Flags:</p>
<p>Dynamic population</p>
<p>[7]-0b=static sensor population. The number of sensors handled by this device is fixed, and a query shall return records for all sensors.</p>
<p>1b=dynamic sensor population. This device may have its sensor population vary during 'run time' (defined as any time other that when an install operation is in progress).</p>
<p>Reserved</p>
<p>[6:4]-reserved</p>
<p>Device LUNs</p>
<p>[3]-1b=LUN 3 has sensors</p>
<p>[2]-1b=LUN 2 has sensors</p>
<p>[1]-1b=LUN 1 has sensors</p>
<p>[0]-1b=LUN 0 has sensors</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4:7</td>
<td><p>Sensor Population Change Indicator. LS byte first.</p>
<p>Four byte timestamp, or counter. Updated or incremented each time the sensor population changes. This field is not provided if the flags indicate a static sensor population.</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取设备SDR（Get Device SDR）

命令功能

获取设备SDR。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>S/E 04h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>21h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Reservation ID. LS Byte. Only required for partial reads with a non-zero</p>
<p>'Offset into record' field. Use 0000h for reservation ID otherwise.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td>Reservation ID. MS Byte.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>Record ID of record to Get, LS Byte. 0000h returns the first record.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Record ID of record to Get, MS Byte.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>Offset into record</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>Bytes to read. FFh means read entire record.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code. Generic, plus following command specific:</p>
<p>80h=record changed. This status is returned if any of the record contents</p>
<p>have been altered since the last time the Requester issued the request</p>
<p>with 00h for the 'Offset into SDR' field.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td>Record ID for next record, LS Byte</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>Record ID for next record, MS Byte</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4:3+N</td>
<td>Requested bytes from record</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 预留设备SDR存储库（Reserve Device SDR Repository）

命令功能

预留设备SDR存储库。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容  |
|----------|---------|
| NetFn    | S/E 04h |
| CMD      | 22h     |

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容                                  |
|----------|-----------------------------------------|
| 1        | Completion Code                         |
| 2        | Reservation ID, LS Byte 0000h reserved. |
| 3        | Reservation ID, MS Byte                 |

## 获取SDR存储库信息（Get SDR Repository Info）

命令功能

获取SDR存储库信息。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容      |
|----------|-------------|
| NetFn    | Storage 0Ah |
| CMD      | 20h         |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>SDR Version-version number of the SDR command set for the SDR Device.</p>
<p>51h for this specification. (BCD encoded with bits 7:4 holding the Least</p>
<p>Significant digit of the revision and bits 3:0 holding the Most Significant bits.)</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>Record count LS Byte-number of records in the SDR Repository</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Record count MS Byte-number of records in the SDR Repository</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5:6</td>
<td>Free Space in bytes, LS Byte first. 0000h indicates 'full', FFFEh indicates 64KB-2 or more available. FFFFh indicates 'unspecified'.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7:10</td>
<td>Most recent addition timestamp. LS byte first.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>11:14</td>
<td>Most recent erase (delete or clear) timestamp. LS byte first.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>15</td>
<td><p>Operation Support</p>
<p>[7]-Overflow Flag. 1=SDR could not be written due to lack of space in the</p>
<p>SDR Repository.</p>
<p>[6:5]-00b=modal/non-modal SDR Repository Update operation unspecified</p>
<p>01b=non-modal SDR Repository Update operation supported</p>
<p>10b=modal SDR Repository Update operation supported</p>
<p>11b=both modal and non-modal SDR Repository Update supported</p>
<p>[4]-reserved. Write as 0b</p>
<p>[3]-1b=Delete SDR command supported</p>
<p>[2]-1b=Partial Add SDR command supported</p>
<p>[1]-1b=Reserve SDR Repository command supported</p>
<p>[0]-1b=Get SDR Repository Allocation Information command supported</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 保留SDR存储库（Reserve SDR Repository）

命令功能

保留SDR资料库。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容      |
|----------|-------------|
| NetFn    | Storage 0Ah |
| CMD      | 22h         |

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容                  |
|----------|-------------------------|
| 1        | Completion Code         |
| 2        | Reservation ID, LS Byte |
| 3        | Reservation ID, MS Byte |

## 获取SDR（Get SDR）

命令功能

获取SDR。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| NetFn | Storage 0Ah |
| CMD | 23h |
| 1 | Reservation ID. LS Byte. Only required for partial reads with a nonzero 'Offset into record' field. Use 0000h for reservation ID otherwise. |
| 2 | Reservation ID. MS Byte. |
| 3 | Record ID of record to Get, LS Byte |
| 4 | Record ID of record to Get, MS Byte |
| 5 | Offset into record |
| 6 | Bytes to read. FFh means read entire record. |

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容                             |
|----------|------------------------------------|
| 1        | Completion Code                    |
| 2        | Record ID for next record, LS Byte |
| 3        | Record ID for next record, MS Byte |
| 4        | Record Data                        |

## 添加SDR(Add SDR)

命令功能

添加SDR储存库。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容      |
|----------|-------------|
| NetFn    | Storage 0Ah |
| CMD      | 24h         |
| 1        | Datas.      |

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容                              |
|----------|-------------------------------------|
| 1        | Completion Code                     |
| 2        | Record ID for added record, LS Byte |
| 3        | Record ID for added record, MS Byte |

## 部分添加SDR（Partial Add SDR）

命令功能

部分添加SDR储存库。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>Storage 0Ah</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>24h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Reservation ID, LS Byte.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td>Reservation ID, MS Byte.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>Record ID, LS Byte for continuing partial add. Use 0000h for Record ID otherwise.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Record ID, MS Byte for continuing partial add. Use 0000h for Record ID otherwise.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>Offset into record.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>In progress. [7:4] - reserved</p>
<p>[3:0] - in progress</p>
<p>0h = partial add in progress.</p>
<p>1h = last record data being transferred with this request</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td>SDR Record Data</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容                              |
|----------|-------------------------------------|
| 1        | Completion Code                     |
| 2        | Record ID for added record, LS Byte |
| 3        | Record ID for added record, MS Byte |

## 清除SDR储存库（Clear SDR Repository）

命令功能

清除SDR储存库。

<table style="width:82%;">

<col style="width: 57%" />

<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>

</thead>

<td>Storage 0Ah</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td>27h</td>
</tr>
<tr>

</tr>
<tr>

</tr>
<tr>

## 查询传感器数值（Get Sensor Value）

命令功能

查询传感器数值。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>3Eh</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>31h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Sensor category（划横线的不支持）</p>
<p>0x01 – CPU temperature (degree)</p>
<p>0x02 – CPU margin temperature (degree)要求为正数</p>
<p>0x03 – inlet temperature (degree)</p>
<p>0x04 – outlet temperature (degree) optional</p>
<p>0x10-memory temperature (degree)</p>
<p>0x33 – system power consumption (Watt)</p>
<p>0X34 – node input 12V voltage(V)</p>
<p>0x35 – PSU input power (Watt)</p>
<p>0x36 – FAN speed (RPM)</p>
<p>0x37 – HDD total power consumption (Watt) optional</p>
<p>0x38 – FAN total power consumption (Watt) optional</p>
<p>0x39 – node power consumption （Watt） only valid for 2U4 node.</p>
<p>0x40 – RTC Battery voltage (V)</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td>Category offset, 1 based (1, 2, 3………)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>80h=sensor Category is invalid in current firmware</p>
<p>81h=Category offset exceed limitation</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td><p>Sensor actual reading, Ali 3 byte reading format</p>
<p>guint8 integer_value[2]; /* 传感器值的整数部分，低字节在前 */</p>
<p>guint8 decimal_value; /* 传感器值的小数部分 */</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>Sensor number</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 发送Trap事件（Send Trap Event）

命令功能

通过Trap方式发送事件。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>93h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=01h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Channel number.</p>
<p>(This value is required to select which configuration parameters are to be used to send the Alert.)</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-Channel number</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>Destination Selector</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-destination selector. Selects which alert destination should go to.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td>Generator ID_L</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td>Generator ID_H</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9</td>
<td>EvMRev</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>10</td>
<td>Sensor Type</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>11</td>
<td>Sensor #</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>12</td>
<td>Event Dir | Event Type</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>13</td>
<td>Event Data 1</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>14</td>
<td>Event Data 2</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>15</td>
<td>Event Data 3</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |

## 校验事件一致性（Get Current Asserted Event）(接收侧（SMM）与发送侧(BMC)的事件是否一致)

命令功能

校验事件一致性(接收侧（SMM）与发送侧(BMC)的事件是否一致)。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| NetFn | 30h |
| CMD | 94h |
| 1:3 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 4 | Sub command，子命令=38h |
| 5:6 | Reserved，预留必须填0 |
| 7:8 | Read Offset，读取的数据偏移，从0开始 |
| 9 | Read Length，本次读取长度. |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>Reserved，预留必须填0</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6:07</td>
<td>未恢复事件(包括正常级别事件)总数</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td><p>End of List，表示当前数据是否结束。当参数数据比较长的时候，可能需要分多次读取，通过此字段可以判断数据是否读完。</p>
<p>[7:1]：reserved</p>
<p>[0]：End of list</p>
<p>0=last data</p>
<p>1=middle data</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9:N</td>
<td><p>#事件信息</p>
<p>data1:4-NewEventId，第1条未恢复事件的新事件码，小字节序，新事件码因为是唯一的，可用于事件管控。</p>
<p>data5:1–Reserved，预留且填0。</p>
<p>data6:1–GroupId，第1条未恢复事件的事件主体所在group，从1开始，像高性能的内存条插在内存板上，不同内存板上同位置内存条丝印重复，X6800节点PCIE卡也类似。</p>
<p>data7:2-SubjectId，第1条未恢复事件的事件主体编号，小字节序，从1开始，跟丝印编号顺序一样递增，一般对应铆接器对象的SlotId，填0表示不涉及。</p>
<p>data9:1–附加标识信息长度，如果没有附加标识信息则长度为0。</p>
<p>data10:N–附加标识信息。</p>
<p>……..</p>
<p>datam:4-NewEventId，第n条未恢复事件的新事件码，小字节序，新事件码因为是唯一的，可用于事件管控。</p>
<p>data(m+4):1–Reserved，预留且填0。</p>
<p>data(m+5):1–GroupId，第n条未恢复事件的事件主体所在group，从1开始，像高性能的内存条插在内存板上，不同内存板上同位置内存条丝印重复，X6800节点PCIE卡也类似。</p>
<p>data(m+6):2-SubjectId，第n条未恢复事件的事件主体编号，小字节序，从1开始，跟丝印编号顺序一样递增，一般对应铆接器对象的SlotId，填0表示不涉及。</p>
<p>data(m+8):1–附加标识信息长度，如果没有附加标识信息则长度为0。</p>
<p>data(m+9):N–附加标识信息。</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 设置系统事件相关配置（Set System Event Configuration）

命令功能

设置系统事件相关配置。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>90h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=58h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>Configuration selector</p>
<p>0=Global Event Deassertion Control // 所有告警的消除控制 1=Event Report control per Event Code // 单条告警上报控制</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>Reserve // 保留</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Parameter length // 本帧参数长度</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>Parameter offset // 本帧参数起始偏移地址</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6:N</td>
<td><p>Parameter</p>
<p>Configuration selector=0: // 所有告警的消除控制</p>
<p>Byte0:</p>
<p>0=Event can not deassert</p>
<p>1=Event can deassert</p>
<p>Configuration selector=1: // 单条告警上报控制</p>
<p>Byte0-3: Event Code // 目标告警码</p>
<p>eg: 0x0000001D</p>
<p>Byte4: Report Status // 告警上报状态</p>
<p>0= Don't Report event // 关闭当前告警检测，且消除</p>
<p>1= Report event // 告警且屏蔽</p>
<p>2= Deassert event once // 屏蔽当前告警</p>
<p>Byte5: Persistence types // 告警上报状态的持久化类型</p>
<p>0= Not persistent // 不持久化</p>
<p>1= Reset persistent // 复位持久化</p>
<p>2= Power-down persistent // 掉电持久化</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容          |
|----------|-----------------|
| 1        | Completion Code |

## 获取SEL信息（Get SEL Info）

命令功能

获取SEL信息。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容      |
|----------|-------------|
| NetFn    | Storage 0Ah |
| CMD      | 40h         |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>81h=cannot execute command, SEL erase in progress</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>SEL Version-version number of the SEL command set for this SEL Device.</p>
<p>51h for this IPMI2.0.</p>
<p>(BCD encoded).BCD encoded with bits 7:4 holding the Least Significant digit of the revision and bits 3:0 holding the Most Significant bits.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>Entries LS Byte-number of log entries in SEL, LS Byte</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Entries MS Byte-number of log entries in SEL, MS Byte</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5:6</td>
<td>Free Space in bytes, LS Byte first. FFFFh indicates 65535 or more bytes of free space are available.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7:10</td>
<td><p>Most recent addition timestamp. LS byte first.</p>
<p>Returns FFFF_FFFFh if no SEL entries have ever been made or if a component update or error caused the retained value to be lost.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>11:14</td>
<td>Most recent erase timestamp. Last time that one or more entries were deleted from the log. LS byte first.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>15</td>
<td><p>Operation Support</p>
<p>[7]-Overflow Flag. 1=Events have been dropped due to lack of space in the SEL.</p>
<p>[6:4]-reserved. Write as 000</p>
<p>[3]-1b=Delete SEL command supported</p>
<p>[2]-1b=Partial Add SEL Entry command supported</p>
<p>[1]-1b=Reserve SEL command supported</p>
<p>[0]-1b=Get SEL Allocation Information command supported</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取SEL分配信息（Get SEL Allocation Info）

命令功能

获取SEL分配信息。

参数说明

| 参数（字节） | 域内容      |
|--------------|-------------|
| NetFn        | Storage 0Ah |
| CMD          | 41h         |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td>Number of possible allocation units, LS Byte</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><p>Number of possible allocation units, MS Bytes</p>
<p>This number indicates whether the total number of possible allocation units is equal to, or some number less than the log size divided by the allocation unit</p>
<p>size.</p>
<p>0000h indicates 'unspecified'.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Allocation unit size in bytes, LS Byte. 0000h indicates 'unspecified'.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>Allocation unit size in bytes, MS byte.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>Number of free allocation units, LS Byte</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td>Number of free allocation units, MS Byte</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td>Largest free block in allocation units, LS Byte</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9</td>
<td>Largest free block in allocation units, MS Byte</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>10</td>
<td>Maximum record size in allocation units.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取SEL条目（Get SEL Entry）

命令功能

获取SEL条目。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>Storage 0Ah</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>43h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:2</td>
<td>Reservation ID, LS Byte first. Only required for partial Get. Use 0000h otherwise.[1]</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3:4</td>
<td><p>SEL Record ID, LS Byte first.</p>
<p>0000h=GET FIRST ENTRY</p>
<p>FFFFh=GET LAST ENTRY</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>Offset into record</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>Bytes to read. FFh means read entire record.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2">The reservation ID should be set to 0000h for implementations that don't implement the Reserve SEL command.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>Return an error completion code if the SEL is empty.</p>
<p>81h=cannot execute command, SEL erase in progress.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:3</td>
<td><p>Next SEL Record ID, LS Byte first (return FFFFh if the record just returned is the last record.)</p>
<p>Note: FFFFh is not allowed as the record ID for an actual record. I.e. the Record ID in the Record Data for the last record should not be FFFFh.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4:N</td>
<td>Record Data, 16 bytes for entire record</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取SEL时间（Get SEL Time）

命令功能

获取SEL时间。

参数说明

| 参数（字节） | 域内容      |
|--------------|-------------|
| NetFn        | Storage 0Ah |
| CMD          | 48h         |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:5</td>
<td><p>Present Timestamp clock reading. LS byte first.Time is an unsigned 32-bit value representing the local time as the number of seconds from 00:00:00, January 1,1970.</p>
<p>0xFFFFFFFF indicates an invalid or unspecified time value.</p>
<p>0x00000000 through 0x20000000 are used for timestamping events that occur after the initialization of the System Event Log device up to the time that the timestamp is set with the system time value.</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 设置SEL时间（Set SEL Time）

命令功能

设置SEL时间。

| CMD      | 49h                                      |
| 1:4      | Time in four-byte format. LS byte first. |

## 添加BIOS审计日志（Add Syslog Entry）(BT超长帧)

命令功能

添加BIOS审计日志。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>92h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=0Fh</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Event Type，日志类型</p>
<p>00h-Security，安全日志</p>
<p>01h-Operation，操作日志</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6-n</td>
<td><p>Entry string</p>
<p>由操作对象，事件详情和事件码构成。</p>
<p>如：Network, Set Mgnmt Eth IPv4 address (192.168.0.2) success, EvtCode: 0x02120640</p>
<ul>
<li><p>Network：操作对象</p></li>
<li><p>Set Mgnmt Eth IPv4 address (192.168.0.2) success：事件详情</p></li>
<li><p>事件码定义则遵循以下规则：</p></li>
</ul>
<p>EvtCode=日志类型(4Bits)|操作对象(8Bits)|操作子项(16Bits)|操作结果(4Bits)。</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |

## 查询syslog服务器信息（Get Syslog Server Info）

命令功能

查询syslog服务器信息，包括syslog服务器属性与配置信息。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 23%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>93h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=6Fh</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>0x00，预留</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>0x00-0x03代表syslog server ID，0xff代表syslog server统一配置功能</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td><p>查询选项，01-04h为syslog服务器属性，05-09h为syslog统一配置属性，查询选项以及对应的返回属性说明如下：</p>
<p>01h-IP Address，服务器地址：允许查询的域名最大长度为230个字节</p>
<p>02h-Port，服务器端口：固定4个字节，输出采用小端序</p>
<p>03h-LogType，日志类型：选择该选项时，属性值中：bit0表示操作日志是否使能、bit1表示安全日志是否使能、bit2表示事件日志是否使能、bit3表示入侵检测日志是否使能、bit4表示系统串口日志是否使能、bit5表示BMC串口日志是否使能、bit6表示故障诊断日志是否使能、bit7表示板卡芯片日志是否使能（其中0表示不使能，1表示使能）</p>
<p>04h-ServerEnable，指定syslog服务器使能状态：0-关闭、1-打开</p>
<p>05h-ServiceEnabled，syslog服务使能：0-关闭、1-打开</p>
<p>06h-TransmissionProtocol，传输协议：1-UDP、2-TCP、3-TLS</p>
<p>07h-AlarmSeverity，告警级别：0-None：不发送事件信息、1-Normal：正常及以上，2-Minor：轻微及以上，3-Major：严重及以上，4-Critical：紧急</p>
<p>08h-MessageFormat，消息格式，0- Custom（自定义）、1- RFC3164</p>
<p>09h-ServerIdentity，主机标识：0- BoardSN（单板序列号）、1- ProductAssetTag（产品资产标签）、2- HostName（主机名）</p>
<p>说明：MessageFormat为RFC3164时，ServerIdentity固定为HostName</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 5 | 0x00-预留 |
| 6 | 返回的属性值字节长度 |
| 7:N | PropertyValue |

## 设置syslog服务器信息（Set Syslog Server Info）

命令功能

设置syslog服务器信息，包括syslog服务器属性与配置信息。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 23%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>93h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=70h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>0x00，预留</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>0x00-0x03代表syslog服务器ID，0xff代表syslog server统一配置功能</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td><p>设置选项，01-04h为syslog服务器属性，05-09h为syslog统一配置属性，设置选项以及对应的待设置属性说明如下：</p>
<p>01h-IP Address，服务器地址：允许设置的域名最大长度为230个字节</p>
<p>02h-Port，服务器端口：固定4个字节，输入采用小端序</p>
<p>03h-LogType，日志类型：选择该选项时，待设置属性值中：bit0表示操作日志是否使能、bit1表示安全日志是否使能、bit2表示事件日志是否使能、bit3表示入侵检测日志是否使能、bit4表示系统串口日志是否使能、bit5表示BMC串口日志是否使能、bit6表示故障诊断日志是否使能、bit7表示板卡芯片日志是否使能（其中0表示不使能，1表示使能）</p>
<p>04h-ServerEnable，指定syslog服务器使能状态：0-关闭、1-打开</p>
<p>05h-ServiceEnabled，syslog服务使能状态：0-关闭、1-打开</p>
<p>06h-TransmissionProtocol，传输协议：1-UDP、2-TCP、3-TLS</p>
<p>07h-AlarmSeverity，告警级别：0-None：不发送事件信息、1-Normal：正常及以上，2-Minor：轻微及以上，3-Major：严重及以上，4-Critical：紧急</p>
<p>08h-MessageFormat 消息格式，0- Custom（自定义）、1- RFC3164</p>
<p>09h-ServerIdentity 主机标识：0- BoardSN（单板序列号）、1- ProductAssetTag（产品资产标签）、2- HostName（主机名）</p>
<p>说明：MessageFormat为Custom时才支持设置ServerIdentity；MessageFormat为RFC3164时，ServerIdentity不支持设置（固定为HostName）</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td>待设置的属性值字节长度</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9:N</td>
<td>PropertyValue，待设置的属性值</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 5 | Success Code 0x00 |

## 获取事件订阅消息统计信息（Get Statistics for Event Subscription Messages）

命令功能

获取事件订阅消息统计信息。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| NetFn | 30h |
| CMD | 93h |
| 1:3 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 4 | Sub command，子命令=87h |
| 5 | Parameter Selector，LS Byte first，参见表 [表1 机框配置参数表](#d1e85184) |
| 6 | DestinationId，目的端序号取值范围为：0x00~0x03 |
| 7:8 | Read Offset，读取的数据偏移，从0开始 |
| 9 | Length，读取长度 |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>End of List</p>
<p>表示当前数据是否结束。当参数数据比较长的时候，可能需要分多次读取，通过此字段可以判断数据是否读完。</p>
<p>[7:1]: reserved</p>
<p>[0]: End of list</p>
<p>0=last data</p>
<p>1=middle data</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6:N</td>
<td>Data，具体数据参见 表 <a href="#d1e85184">表1 机框配置参数表</a>。</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

参考信息

1.  机框配置参数表

<table style="width:83%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 18%" />
<col style="width: 21%" />
<col style="width: 42%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>功能描述</th>
<th>parameter selector</th>
<th><strong>详细描述</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>snmp trap 日发送量</td>
<td>0x00</td>
<td><p><strong>请求</strong>:</p>
<p>Read Offset: 0x0000</p>
<p>Length: 16</p>
<p><strong>响应</strong>:</p>
<p>End of List: 0</p>
<p>Data6~Data9，SuccessCountYesterday，前一天发送成功的次数：</p>
<p>Data10~Data13，FailureCountYesterday前一天发送失败的次数：</p>
<p>Data14~Data17，SuccessCountToday，当天发送成功的次数：</p>
<p>Data18~Data21，FailureCountToday 当天发送失败的次数</p>
<p>说明</p>
<p>修改snmp trap接收端地址后，会清空对应接收端的日发送量信息</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

# 用户&安全命令

## 查询黑名单或白名单IPMI（Query Black or White List IPMI）

命令功能

查询黑名单或白名单IPMI。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>93h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=4bh</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Parameter：查询的是黑名单，还是白名单中的命令</p>
<p>0：黑名单</p>
<p>1：白名单</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>ID：查询ID 0~512</p>
<p>0和1代表查询黑/白名单中的第1条IPMI命令</p>
<p>2代表查询黑/白名单中的第2条IPMI命令</p>
<p>3代表查询黑/白名单中的第3条IPMI命令</p>
<p>……</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>M黑名单/白名单中存储的IPMI命令总条数M</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6: N+6</td>
<td><p>N：最大数字251</p>
<p>byte 6：黑白名单中第1条IPMI命令的整长度N</p>
<p>byte 7：黑白名单中第1条IPMI命令netfn</p>
<p>byte 8：黑白名单中第1条IPMI命令cmd</p>
<p>byte 9：黑白名单中第1条IPMI命令chan_protocol</p>
<p>byte 10~N+6：第1条IPMI命令的数据ipmi_data</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 添加删除黑白名单命令的IPMI命令表（Set shied IPMI command）

命令功能

添加删除黑白名单命令的IPMI命令表。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>93h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=3Fh</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>Parameter Data，取值参见表<a href="#table53419272249">表5-5 Parameter Selector定义</a>。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>Btye5：Parameter 0或者1时</p>
<p>Option</p>
<p>0：添加IPMI命令</p>
<p>1：删除IPMI命令</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td><p>ReadWrite读写</p>
<p>0=read</p>
<p>1=write</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td>需要被添加或者删除命令的NetFunction网络功能码</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9</td>
<td>需要被添加或者删除命令的Command命令字</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>10</td>
<td><p>Chan no，IPMI通道号，来自该通道的指定命令被添加或者删除</p>
<p>Byte5=0(黑名单模式时):</p>
<p>0x8 BT通道</p>
<p>0xff所有通道</p>
<p>Byte5=1(白名单模式时):</p>
<p>0x8-BT通道</p>
<p>0xff-无效通道</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>11:n</td>
<td>需要被添加或者删除命令的Data数据，数据长度最大不超过30字节。</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:04 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |

## 设置频道安全密钥（Set Channel Security Keys）

命令功能

设置频道安全密钥。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>App 06h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>56h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Channel Number</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-Channel Number(Note: this command only applies to channels that support RMCP+, if the channel does not support RMCP+ the command will return an error completion code)</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>Operation</p>
<p>[7:2]-reserved</p>
<p>[1:0]-Operation</p>
<p>00b=read key</p>
<p>BMC returns value of specified key, provided key has not yet been locked. Some BMCs may allow the key to be re-written if it does not match the expected value. Other BMCs may only allow one 'set' operation. If the key value has not yet been initialized, the BMC will return 0’s for the key value. Utility software responsible for BMC installation and initial setup can use this Operation to also check to see whether keys have been initialized and locked</p>
<p>01b=set key</p>
<p>BMC writes given key value to non-volatile storage</p>
<p>10b=lock key</p>
<p>BMC locks out modification or reading the key value. Once a key has been locked, it is not cannot be rewritten or read via IPMI specified commands.</p>
<p>11b=reserved</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><p>Key ID</p>
<p>[7:0]-key ID</p>
<p>00h=RMCP+ "KR" key (20 bytes). The "KR" key is used as a unique value for</p>
<p>random number generation. Note: A BMC implementation is allowed to share a single KR value across all channels. A utility can set KR and lock it for one channel, and then verify it has been set and locked for any other channels by using this command to read the key from other channels and checking the 'lock status' field for each channel to see if it matches and is locked</p>
<p>01h=RMCP+ “KG” key (20 bytes). "KG" key acts as a value that is used for</p>
<p>key exchange for the overall channel. This key cannot be locked. This is to ensure a password/key configuration utility can set its value. This value is used in conjunction with the user key values (passwords) in RAKP HMACSHA1 and RAKP-HMAC-MD5 authentication. I.e. the remote console needs to have a-priori knowledge of both this key value and the user password setting, in order to establish a session. KG must be individually settable on each channel that supports RMCP+</p>
<p>all other=reserved</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(4:M)</td>
<td><p>Key value. Value for specified key. Used for "set" Operation only. Otherwise</p>
<p>this field is not used in the request. The BMC will ignore any bytes following</p>
<p>the 'Key ID' byte</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code. Generic, plus following command-specific completion</p>
<p>codes:</p>
<p>80h=Cannot perform set/confirm. Key is locked (mandatory)</p>
<p>81h=insufficient key bytes</p>
<p>82h=too many key bytes</p>
<p>83h=key value does not meet criteria for specified type of key</p>
<p>84h=KR is not used. BMC uses a random number generation approach that does not require a KR value</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>7:2-reserved</p>
<p>1:0-lock status</p>
<p>00b=key is not lockable</p>
<p>01b=key is locked</p>
<p>10b=key is unlocked</p>
<p>11b=reserved</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(3:N)</td>
<td><p>Key value</p>
<p>The BMC returns the specified key value when the Operation is set to "read key". Otherwise, the BMC returns no additional bytes past the completion code</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 设置BMC用户名（Set User Name）

命令功能

设置BMC用户名。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>App 06h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>45h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>User ID</p>
<p>[7:6]-reserved.</p>
<p>[5:0]-User ID. 000000b=reserved. (User ID 1 is permanently associated</p>
<p>with User 1, the null user name)</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>User Name String in ASCII, 16 bytes, max. Strings with fewer than 16 characters are terminated with a null (00h) character and 00h padded to 16</p>
<p>bytes. When the string is read back using the Get User Name command, those bytes shall be returned as 0's</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容          |
|----------|-----------------|
| 1        | Completion Code |

## 获取BMC用户名（Get User Name）

命令功能

获取BMC用户名。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>App 06h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>46h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>User ID</p>
<p>[7:6]-reserved.</p>
<p>[5:0]-User ID to return name for. 000000b=reserved</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 25%" />

<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:17</td>
<td><p>User Name String in ASCII, 16 bytes, max. Strings of fewer than 16 characters are returned with null (00h) characters filling in the remaining bytes. BMC does not check to see whether string data is 'printable' or not.</p>

</tr>
