## 获取文件校验和（Get File Checksum From iMana）

命令功能

获取iMana文件校验和。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>94h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=3Eh</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Operation type:</p>
<p>01h-get file status</p>
<p>02h-get SHA256类型校验和</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>Resource ID，详见<a href="#d1e117833">表14-9 Resource ID</a>。</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Upload progress.</p>
<p>[7]-status</p>
<p>0h=reported，已经上报校验和</p>
<p>1h=unreported，未上报校验和</p>
<p>[6:0]-预留</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>*6:7</td>
<td><p>Length，返回数据的长度。LSB first</p>
<p>如果Operation type为01h，无此字段。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>*8:N</td>
<td>校验和数据（16进制），如果Operation type为01h，无此字段。</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

参考信息

1.  Resource ID

| ID | file name | upload | download | 备注 |
|----|----|----|----|----|
| 00h | bios display0.ini | Y | Y | \- |
| 01h | bios option0.ini | Y | Y | \- |
| 02h | bios changed0.ini | Y | Y | \- |
| 03h | bmc debug info | N | Y | 一键收集信息文件 |
| 04h | Firmware | Y | N | 包括BMC、BIOS、CPLD等固件升级镜像。 |
| 05h | bios netconfig.ini | Y | Y | \- |
| 06h | bmc sol.dat | N | Y | \- |
| 07h | bmc blackbox.tar | N | Y | \- |
| 08h | BIOS ClpConfig.ini | N | Y | \- |
| 09h | BIOS ClpResponse.ini | Y | N | \- |
| 0ah | BMA systeminfo.txt | Y | Y | \- |
| 0bh | powerview.txt | N | Y | \- |
| 0ch | bios configsync.ini | Y | Y | 用于9032产品主从节点BIOS同步setup配置，启动时主节点BIOS的设置菜单配置发给主节点BMC，主节点BMC同步到从节点BMC，从节点BIOS从从节点BMC获取并更新。 |
| 0dh | bmc sshpublickey | Y | N | \- |
| 0eh | SSL服务器证书 | Y | N | \- |
| 0fh | 导入导出配置(BMC/BIOS等) | Y | Y | \- |
| 10h | 服务器证书的CSR | N | Y | \- |
| 11h | 一件收集信息 | N | Y | \- |
| 12h | LDAP服务端根证书 | Y | N | \- |
| 13h | 双因子认证根证书 | Y | N | \- |
| 14h | 双因子认证用户的客户端证书 | Y | N | \- |
| 15h | Syslog服务端根证书 | Y | N | \- |
| 16h | Syslog本地证书 | Y | N | \- |
| 18h | NTP组密钥 | Y | N | \- |
| 19h | bios registry.json | Y | Y | BIOS设置菜单注册文件 |
| 1Ah | bios currentvalue.json | Y | Y | BIOS设置菜单项当前值文件 |
| 1Bh | bios setting.json | Y | Y | BIOS设置菜单项修改预期值文件 |
| 1Ch | bios result.json | Y | Y | BIOS设置菜单项修改结果文件 |
| 1Dh | weakdictionary | Y | Y | 弱口令字典 |
| 1Eh | CMES.dat | Y | N | 部件号CMES文件 |

## 设置管理配置恢复点（Set Mgnt Configuration Recover Point）

命令功能

设置管理配置恢复点。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>93h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=07h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Recover Point Selector</p>
<p>0h=配置备份点1</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>Action</p>
<p>0xAA Start Mgnt Configuration backup.</p>
<p>0x55 Get backup status</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Backup progress</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-Backup progress</p>
<p>0h=Backup in progress</p>
<p>1h=Backup completed</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 恢复管理配置信息（Recover Mgnt Configuration）

命令功能

恢复管理信息。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>93h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=08h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Recover Point Selector</p>
<p>0h=配置备份点1</p>
<p>1h=原始配置备份点</p>
<p>2h=日志文件(除SEL，包括操作日志、调试日志、维护日志、运行日志)</p>
<p>3h=截屏和录像文件</p>
<p>4h=syslog日志(RMC专用)</p>
<p>10h=清空datafs(仅装备模式下可用)</p>
<p>11h=清空CMOS数据(仅装备模式下可用)</p>
<p>说明</p>
<p>对于iBMC V2 3.2.0.6及以上版本，本命令中清除日志文件（2h），清除截屏与录像文件（3h）以及清空datafs(10h) 3个子命令，仅支持以下机型：</p>
<ul>
<li><p>2488H V6</p></li>
<li><p>TS200-2280_1711、TS200-2180_1711、TS200-5280_1711、TS200-1280_1711、TS200-2480_1711、TS200-5290、TS200-2280E、TS200-2280K、TS200-2180K、TS200-5280K、TS200-2280M</p></li>
<li><p>S920X00、S920X01、S920S00、S920S01、S920X02、S920X03、S920X05、S920XA0、S920X00K、S920X01K、S920S00K、S920S01K</p></li>
<li><p>Atlas 500 Pro-3000、Atlas 800-9000、Atlas 800-9010、Atlas 800-3000</p></li>
<li><p>DA120C V2、DA120 V2</p></li>
</ul></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>Action</p>
<p>0xAA Start Mgnt Configuration recover.</p>
<p>0x55 Get recover status，valid only for byte5=0</p>
<p>当byte5为10h的时候：</p>
<p>[7:1]-reserved</p>
<p>[0]-reboot flag:</p>
<p>0b：暂不重启</p>
<p>1b：立即重启</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Recover progress</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-Recover progress</p>
<p>0h=Recover in progress</p>
<p>1h=Recover completed</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 设置IPMB状态（Set IPMB State）

命令功能

设置IPMB状态。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>PICMG 2Ch</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>09h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>PICMG Identifier, Indicates that this is a PICMG-defined group extension command</p>
<p>A value of 00h is used</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>IPMB-A State[1], Indicates the state of IPMB-A.</p>
<p>Options are:</p>
<p>[0]-IPMB-A State</p>
<p>0h=Override state-Isolate (disable)</p>
<p>1h=Local Control state-IPM Controller determines state of IPMB-A</p>
<p>[1:7]-IPMB-0 Link Identification</p>
<p>00h=Select All IPMB-0 Links (also the value for bused IPMB-0)</p>
<p>01h-5Fh=IPMB-0 Link Number 1 to 95</p>
<p>60h-7Eh=reserved</p>
<p>If Byte 2=FFh, command does not change current state of IPMB-A</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><p>IPMB-B State[1], Indicates the state of IPMB-B</p>
<p>Options are:</p>
<p>[0]-IPMB-B State</p>
<p>0h=Override state-Isolate (disable)</p>
<p>1h=Local Control state-IPM Controller determines state of IPMB-B</p>
<p>[1:7]-IPMB-0 Link Identification</p>
<p>00h=Select All IPMB-0 Links (also the value for bused IPMB-0)</p>
<p>01h-5Fh=IPMB-0 Link Number 1 to 95</p>
<p>60h-7Eh=reserved</p>
<p>If Byte 3=FFh, command does not change current state of IPMB-B</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2">1 Field changed in Engineering Change Notice 3.0-1.0-001 of this specification</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>PICMG Identifier. Indicates that this is a PICMG-defined group extension command.</p>
<p>A value of 00h is used</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 配置BMC的转发跳转命令（Set BMC Forward）

命令功能

配置BMC的转发跳转命令。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>94h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=3Ah</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Config Type:</p>
<p>data1：1，配置类型</p>
<p>0-关闭</p>
<p>1-开启</p>
<p>other-reserved</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>Reserved</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td><p>Source IP协议</p>
<p>data1-1: IP协议</p>
<p>0-IPv4</p>
<p>1–IPv6</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8:23</td>
<td>Source IP Addr: IPv4(byte8~byte11)或IPv6地址，MSByte first</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>24:25</td>
<td>Source Port，MSByte first</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>26</td>
<td><p>Destination IP协议</p>
<p>data1-1：IP协议</p>
<p>0-IPv4</p>
<p>1–IPv6</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>27:42</td>
<td>Destination IP Addr: IPv4(byte27~byte30)或IPv6地址，MSByte first</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>43:44</td>
<td>Destination Port, MSByte first</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>0x00：成功</p>
<p>Other：失败</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Mapping IP协议</p>
<p>data1-1：IP协议</p>
<p>0-IPv4</p>
<p>1–IPv6</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6:21</td>
<td>Mapping IP Addr: IPv4(byte6~byte9)或IPv6地址，MSByte first</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>22:23</td>
<td>Mapping Port</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取固件信息属性（Get Firmware Info Properties）

命令功能

获取固件的属性。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>91h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=1Eh</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>FRU Device ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2"><p>注：增加这个命令是为了让接口模块可以根据产品属性进行动态版本展示。</p>
<p>设计的初衷是接口模块首先发送这个命令查询FRU支持的版本展示固件，然后根据FRU支持的固件获取对应的版本项信息形成展示输出。与<a href="#ZH-CN_TOPIC_0000001130280728">14.7 读取版本信息（Read Version Data）</a>命令配合使用。</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5:8</td>
<td><p>Supported Firmware Mask</p>
<p>Each bit represents a class of firmware</p>
<p>Firmware are defined in<a href="#ZH-CN_TOPIC_0000001130280728">14.7 读取版本信息（Read Version Data）</a></p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 设置BMA-BMC通道类型（Set BoB Channel Type）

命令功能

设置BMA-BMC通道类型。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>93h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=51h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Config Type:</p>
<p>data1：1，通道类型</p>
<p>0-veth</p>
<p>1-cdev</p>
<p>2-usb-linux（暂只支持1711平台）</p>
<p>3-usb-Windows（暂不支持，保留）</p>
<p>4-usb-VmWare（暂不支持，保留）</p>
<p>other-reserved</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |

## 设置固件激活（Set Firmware Active）

命令功能

设置活动固件。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>94h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=14h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>FRU ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>Component ID:</p>
<p>00h CPLD</p>
<p>01h~FFh reseverd</p></td>
</tr>

</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>80h=正在进行升级</p>
<p>81h=部件没有升级</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取组件属性（Get component properties）

命令功能

获取组件属性。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>PICMG 2Ch</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>2Fh</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>PICMG ID填0</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>Component ID，选择查询哪个部件的属性。</p>
<p>0-7=有效的部件ID</p>
<p>8-FFh=保留</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>Component properties selector，选择查询部件的哪个属性。</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>完成码</p>
<p>81h=当前接口不支持软件升级，下面的响应字节仍然有效。</p>
<p>82h=非法的部件ID</p>
<p>83h=非法的部件属性选择</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td>PICMG ID填0</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3:N</td>
<td><p>Component properties data，部件属性数据。</p>
<p>Component properties selector，所选择的属性相对应的数据。</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 创建USB存储连接（Create USB Mass Storage）

命令功能

创建USB存储的链接。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>92h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=25h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Parameter Selector，参数选择=00h</p>
<p>00h: Create USB Mass Storage</p>
<p>03h: Close USB Mass Storage</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>Location:</p>
<p>0：本地U盘（BMC内部FLASH虚拟成U盘）</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td><p>type:</p>
<p>0：临时挂载（临时挂载时x86只进行读U盘操作，BMC也可以读写访问U盘）</p>
<p>1：正式挂载（正式挂载时x86可进行读写U盘操作，BMC不可以访问U盘）</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td><p>device id:</p>
<p>0：iBMA U盘</p>
<p>1：SP U盘</p>
<p>说明</p>
<p>为了兼容旧版本，本字节不是必须的，当没有本字节时，只能针对SP U盘进行操作。</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>说明</p>
<ul>
<li><p>对于长延时IPMI命令，响应返回值不代表操作结果，操作结果通过Get USB Mass Storage Status（参数选择=01h）命令查询。</p></li>
<li><p>针对SP U盘：非系统接口或bios启动完成后的请求会返回错误（错误码=0xCE）</p></li>
<li><p>针对iBMA U盘：系统下电或BIOS未启动完成的请求会返回错误（错误码=0xCE）。</p></li>
<li><p>USB端口被其它设备使用时返回错误（错误码=0xC1）。</p></li>
<li><p>若无iBMA分区或无iBMA安装包时返回错误（错误码=0xD5）。</p></li>
</ul></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>reserved</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<td>4</td>

</tr>

<table style="width:82%;">

</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>92h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=25h</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<p>1: SP U盘</p>

<table style="width:82%;">

<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />

<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>说明</p>
<ul>
<li><p>对于长延时IPMI命令，响应返回值不代表操作结果，操作结果通过Get USB Mass Storage Status（参数选择=01h）命令查询。</p></li>
<li><p>非系统接口发送的请求会返回错误（错误码=0xCE）。</p></li>

</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>

## 设置属性值通用命令（Set Property Value Common Command）

命令功能

设置属性值通用命令。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>93h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=35h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5:6</td>
<td>Function ID, 见<a href="#table1732214315184">表14-11 信息参数</a>,LSB first</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td>Set Information Count M，设置信息数目</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td><p>[7:1]：reserved</p>
<p>[0]：级联标志</p>
<p>0=是最后一帧数据</p>
<p>1=后面还有数据</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9:10</td>
<td><p>Offset，写入的数据偏移，从0开始，LSB first</p>
<p>当数据较长需要多次写入时，一定要从头到尾按顺序写入，不能乱序。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>11:N</td>
<td><p>//写入的数据，以下都作为写入的数据</p>
<p>//datax:y x表示起始字节，y表示字节数</p>
<p>//指定对象索引</p>
<p>data1:2-Object Key ID， LSB first索引属性的信息号，如果对象没有索引属性则填0xffff，表示查询类的第一个对象。</p>
<p>data3:1-Reserved，统一填0。</p>
<p>data4:1-Object Key Length L，若Object Key ID填0xffff，则此处统一填1。</p>
<p>data5:L-Object Key Value，指定信息值作为对象索引值，见<a href="#table1732214315184">表14-11 信息参数</a>， LSB first，若Object Key ID填0xffff，则此处统一填0，</p>
<p>//以下指定设置的信息号及信息值，当某个属性设置的值超长(一般指超过220个字节长度)时，该属性的值需要分帧设置，每一帧都要带上information ID、Reserved、information Length三元组。</p>
<p>data(X):2-information1 ID， LSB first</p>
<p>data(X+2):1-Reserved，统一填0</p>
<p>data(X+3):1-information1 Length L</p>
<p>data(X+4):L-information1 Value，每一帧的数据都要求带上information ID、Reserved、information Length三元组，包括分帧时。</p>
<p>…...</p>
<p>dataY:2-informationM ID， LSB first</p>
<p>data(Y+2):1-Reserved，统一填0。</p>
<p>data(Y+3):1-informationM Length L</p>
<p>data(Y+4):L-informationM Value</p>
<p>说明</p>
<p>当某个属性设置的值超长(一般指超过220个字节长度)时，该属性需要分帧设置，每一帧都要带上information ID、Reserved、information Length三元组。</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |

## 查询属性值通用命令（Get Property Value Common Command）

命令功能

查询属性值通用命令。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>93h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=36h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5:6</td>
<td>Function ID Parameter，见<a href="#table1732214315184">表14-11 信息参数</a>， LSB first</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td>Get Information Count M，获取信息数目</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td>Required Data Length，要求的读取数据长度</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9:10</td>
<td>Read Offset，读取的数据偏移，从0开始， LSB first</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>11:N</td>
<td><p>//datax:y x表示起始字节，y表示字节数</p>
<p>//指定对象索引</p>
<p>data1:2-Object Key ID， LSB first.</p>
<p>索引属性的信息号，如果对象没有索引属性则填0xffff，表示查询类的第一个对象，若索引属性信息号最高位为1(即：1xxxxxxx xxxxxxxxb)且不为0xffff，则表示查询该类与索引属性值(不是真正的索引属性，存在不唯一性)匹配的所有对象(即：多对象)，否则，查询具有索引属性的第1个对象(即：单对象)。</p>
<ul>
<li><p>获取多对象的情况下，始终不支持属性帧拆分(如右图所示)，即：一个属性值超长，需要跨多帧时，第一帧数据之后的帧数据前面不需要带头(即：三元组)。</p></li>
<li><p>获取单对象情况下，始终支持属性帧拆分(如右图所示)，即：每一帧数据前面都要带头(即：三元组)。</p></li>
</ul>
<p>实际使用索引属性ID范围为(1~0x7ffe)。</p>
<p>data3:1-Reserved，统一填0。</p>
<p>data4:1-Object Key Length L，若Object Key ID填0xffff，则此处统一填1。</p>
<p>data5:L-Object Key Value，指定信息值作为对象索引值， 见<a href="#table1732214315184">表14-11 信息参数</a>， LSB first，若Object Key ID填0xffff，则此处统一填0。</p>
<p>//以下指定查询的信息号</p>
<p>data(5+L):2-information1 ID， LSB first</p>
<p>data(5+L+2):2-information2 ID， LSB first</p>
<p>…...</p>
<p>data(5+L+2M-2):2-informationM ID， LSB first</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>End of List，表示当前数据是否结束。当参数数据比较长的时候，可能需要分多次读取，通过此字段可以判断数据是否读完。</p>
<p>[7:1]: reserved</p>
<p>[0]: End of list</p>
<p>0=last data</p>
<p>1=middle data</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6:N</td>
<td><p>//datax:y x表示起始字节，y表示字节数</p>
<p>//以下返回查询结果，包括信息号及信息值，当某个属性的值超长(一般指超过220个字节长度)时，该属性的值需要分帧返回，每一帧都要带上information ID、Reserved、information Length三元组。</p>
<p>data1:2-information1 ID， LSB first</p>
<p>data3:1-information1 Type，详见<a href="#table1051615316424">表14-10 Data Type Parameters</a>。</p>
<p>data4:1-information1 Length L，信息获取不到时，长度返回为0，且不返回information1 Value。</p>
<p>data5:L-information1 Value，每一帧的数据都要求带上information ID、Reserved、information Length三元组，包括分帧时。</p>
<p>......</p>
<p>dataX:2-informationM ID， LSB first</p>
<p>data(X+2):1-informationM Type，详见<a href="#table1051615316424">表14-10 Data Type Parameters</a>。</p>
<p>data(X+3):1-informationM Length L ，信息获取不到时，长度返回为0，且不返回informationM Value。</p>
<p>data(X+4):L-informationM Value</p>
<p>说明</p>
<p>当某个属性的值超长(一般指超过220个字节长度)时，该属性需要分帧返回，每一帧都要带上information ID、Reserved、information Length三元组。</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

参考信息

1.  Data Type Parameters

<table style="width:83%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 9%" />
<col style="width: 10%" />
<col style="width: 63%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>数据类型码</th>
<th>对应C数据类型</th>
<th>数据类型含义</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>121</td>
<td>UINT8</td>
<td><p>无符号8位整型</p>
<p>范围：0~255</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>110</td>
<td>INT16</td>
<td><p>有符号16位整型</p>
<p>范围：-32768 ~ 32767</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>113</td>
<td>UINT16</td>
<td><p>无符号16位整型</p>
<p>范围：0 ~ 65535</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>105</td>
<td>INT32</td>
<td><p>有符号32位整型</p>
<p>范围：-2147483648 ~ 2147483647</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>117</td>
<td>UINT32</td>
<td><p>无符号32位整型</p>
<p>范围：0 ~ 4294967295</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>115</td>
<td>char[]</td>
<td>字符串</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 查询指定功能号的所有对象的指定置属性（Get Property Value For All Object Common Command）

命令功能

查询指定功能号的所有对象的指定置属性。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>93h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=38h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5:6</td>
<td>Function ID Parameter，见<a href="#table1732214315184">表14-11 信息参数</a>，LSB first</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td>Get Information Count M，获取信息数目</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td>Required Data Length，要求的读取数据长度</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9:10</td>
<td>Read Offset，读取的数据偏移，从0开始，LSB first</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>11:N</td>
<td><p>//datax:y x表示起始字节，y表示字节数</p>
<p>//指定查询哪些信息</p>
<p>data1:2-information1 ID， LSB first</p>
<p>data3:2-information2 ID， LSB first</p>
<p>…...</p>
<p>data(2M-1):2-informationM ID， LSB first</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>End of List，表示当前数据是否结束。当参数数据比较长的时候，可能需要分多次读取，通过此字段可以判断数据是否读完。</p>
<p>[7:1]: reserved</p>
<p>[0]: End of list</p>
<p>0=last data</p>
<p>1=middle data</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6:N</td>
<td><p>//datax:y x表示起始字节，y表示字节数。</p>
<p>//以下返回查询结果，包括信息号及信息值，当某个属性的值超长(一般指超过220个字节长度)时，该属性的值需要分帧返回，只有第一帧会带上information ID、Reserved、information Length三元组。返回顺序：对象1.属性1，对象1.属性2，....对象1.属性M，...，对象n.属性1，对象n.属性2，....对象n.属性M。</p>
<p>data1:2-information1 ID， LSB first</p>
<p>data3:1-information1 Type，详见<a href="#table1051615316424">表14-10 Data Type Parameters</a>。</p>
<p>data4:1-information1 Length L ，信息获取不到时长度返回为0，且不返回information1 Value。</p>
<p>data5:L-information1 Value，只有第一帧的数据会带上information ID、Reserved、information Length三元组，包括分帧时。</p>
<p>…...</p>
<p>dataX:2-informationM ID， LSB first</p>
<p>data(X+2):1-informationM Type，详见<a href="#table1051615316424">表14-10 Data Type Parameters</a>。</p>
<p>data(X+3):1-informationM Length L，信息获取不到时长度返回为0，且不返回informationM Value。</p>
<p>data(X+4):L-informationM Value</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

使用实例

\#查询BMC端口信息。

请求：

ipmicmd -k "0f 00 *MM NN*" smi 0

响应：

0f *MM NN*

1.  信息参数

<table style="width:83%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 9%" />
<col style="width: 12%" />
<col style="width: 13%" />
<col style="width: 8%" />
<col style="width: 17%" />
<col style="width: 10%" />
<col style="width: 11%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>

<th>类名称</th>

<th>读写</th>
</tr>

<tr>
<td rowspan="17">1</td>

<td rowspan="17">Snmp</td>

<td>-</td>

</tr>

<td>Read and write</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>

<td>Read and write</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>

<td>Read and write</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>V3版本启用状态</td>
<td>0：不使能，1：使能</td>
<td>Read and write</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td>服务端口号</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>Read and write</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td>鉴权算法</td>
<td>0：MD5; 1:SHA1</td>
<td>Read and write</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9</td>
<td>加密算法</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>Read and write</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>10</td>
<td>服务ID</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>Read only</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>11</td>
<td>SNMPV1V2C登录规则</td>
<td><p>1：规则1</p>
<p>2：规则2</p>
<p>4：规则3</p>

<p>0：清除</p></td>
<td>Read and write</td>
</tr>

<td>12</td>
<td>snmp超长口令使能状态</td>
<td><p>0：禁用</p>
<p>1：启用</p></td>
<td>Read and write</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>13</td>

<td><p>0：禁用</p>
<p>1：启用</p></td>
<td>Read and write</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>14</td>
<td>Snmp.sysName同步HostName标志</td>
<td><p>0：禁用</p>
<p>1：启用</p></td>
<td>Read and write</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td><p>0：不使能</p>
<p>1：使能</p></td>
<td>Read and write</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>16</td>
<td>联系人信息</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>Read and write</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>17</td>
<td>位置信息</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>Read and write</td>

<td>-</td>

<td>-</td>
<td>Read and write</td>

<td>-</td>

<td>Read and write</td>
</tr>

<td>11</td>

<p>1：开启</p></td>

</tr>

</tr>
<tr>

</tr>
<tr>
<td>14</td>

<td><p>0：不使能</p>
<p>1：使能，默认是1</p></td>
<td>Read and write</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>15</td>
<td>弱口令字典检查使能</td>
<td><p>0：不使能</p>
<p>1：使能，默认是0</p></td>
<td>Read and write</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>16</td>
<td>初始密码提示开关</td>
<td><p>0：不使能</p>
<p>1：使能，默认是1</p></td>
<td>Read and write</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>17</td>
<td>用户不活动期限</td>
<td>0或者30~365的整数，单位为天，0表示不活动期限无限制</td>
<td>Read and write</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>18</td>
<td>SSH的加密算法</td>
<td><p>on: 使能</p>
<p>off: 不使能</p></td>
<td>Read and write</td>
</tr>

<td>19</td>

<td>Read and write</td>

<td><p>on: 使能</p>
<p>off: 不使能</p></td>
<td>Read and write</td>
</tr>

<td>21</td>

<p>off: 不使能</p></td>
<td>Read and write</td>
</tr>

<td>22</td>

<p>off: 不使能</p></td>
<td>Read and write</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td>Read and write</td>

## 恢复厂商默认配置（Restore To Manufacturer Setting）

命令功能

恢复厂商默认配置。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容    |
|----------|-----------|
| 1        | ‘R’ – 52h |
| 2        | ‘M’– 4Dh  |
| 3        | ‘S’ – 53h |

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容          |
|----------|-----------------|
| 1        | Completion Code |

## 从iMana下载资源（Download resource from iMana）

命令功能

从iMana下载资源。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>94h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=06h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Operation type:</p>
<p>AAh initiate download</p>
<p>55h get resource name</p>
<p>00h get download status</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>Resource ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7*</td>
<td><p>Flag</p>
<p>[7]：级联标志</p>
<p>0=是最后一帧数据</p>
<p>1=后面还有数据</p>
<p>[6:0]:Offset，资源路径名的数据偏移，从0开始当资源路径名较长需要多次传输时，一定要从头到尾按顺序传输，不能乱序。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8*</td>
<td>Length，传输长度</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9*</td>
<td>Resource name，绝对路径名</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2">注：*号部分只在Operation type为 initiate download时存在。</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Upload progress</p>
<p>[7]-status</p>
<p>0h=Download in progress</p>
<p>1h=Download completed</p>
<p>[6:0]-Download progress percentage</p>
<p>（目前还无法获取百分比，预留为0）</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6**</td>
<td><p>Flag</p>
<p>[7]: 级联标志</p>
<p>0=是最后一帧数据</p>
<p>1=后面还有数据</p>
<p>[6:0]:Offset，资源路径名的数据偏移，从0开始当资源路径名较长需要多次传输时，一定要从头到尾按顺序传输，不能乱序。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7**</td>
<td>Length，传输长度</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8-N**</td>
<td>Resource name，绝对路径名</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2">注：**号部分只在Operation type为 get resource name时存在。</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取带外管理软件的名字（Get Name of BMC）

命令功能

获取带外管理软件名称

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| NetFn | 30h |
| CMD | 92h |
| 1:3 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 4 | Sub command，子命令=45h |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>0x00: 获取成功0xFF，未知错误</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>返回的带外管理软件的名字的长度</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6:N</td>
<td>从BMC中获取到的带外管理软件的名字</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

|----------|-----------------|

## 清除消息标志（Clear Message Flags）

命令功能

清除消息标志。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>App 06h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>[7]-1b=Clear OEM 2</p>
<p>[6]-1b=Clear OEM 1</p>
<p>[5]-1b=Clear OEM 0</p>
<p>[4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3]-1b=Clear watchdog pre-timeout interrupt flag</p>
<p>[2]-reserved</p>
<p>[1]-1b=Clear Event Message Buffer.</p>
<p>[0]-1b=Clear Receive Message Queue</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />

<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>Implementations are not required to return an error completion code if an attempt is made to clear the Event Message Buffer flag but the Event Message Buffer is not supported</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取消息标志（Get Message Flags）

命令功能

获取消息标志。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容  |
|----------|---------|
| NetFn    | App 06h |
| CMD      | 31h     |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 56%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>Flags</p>
<p>[7]-1b=OEM 2 data available</p>
<p>[6]-1b=OEM 1 data available</p>
<p>[5]-1b=OEM 0 data available</p>
<p>[4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3]-1b=Watchdog pre-timeout interrupt occurred.</p>
<p>[2]-reserved</p>
<p>[1]-1b=Event Message Buffer Full. (Return as 0 if Event Message Buffer is not supported, or when the Event Message buffer is disabled.)</p>
<p>[0]-1b=Receive Message Available. One or more messages ready for reading from Receive Message Queue</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取消息（Get Message）

命令功能

获取消息。

参数说明

| 参数（字节） | 域内容  |
|--------------|---------|
| NetFn        | App 06h |
| CMD          | 33h     |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 11%" />
<col style="width: 70%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code generic, plus following command specific completion code:</p>
<p>80h=data not available (queue/buffer empty)</p>
<p>Implementation of this completion code is Mandatory. The code eliminates the need for system software to always check the Message Buffer Flags to see if there data left in the Receive Message Queue. If a non-OK, non-80h completion is encountered-software will need to check the Message Flags to get the empty/non-empty status of the Receive Message Queue</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>Channel Number</p>
<p>[7:4] Inferred privilege level for message</p>
<p>When the BMC receives a message for the receive message queue, it assigns an ‘inferred privilege level’ to the message as follows:</p>
<p>If the message is received from a session-based channel, it will initially be assigned a privilege level that matches the 'maximum requested privilege level' that was negotiated via the Activate Session command</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3:N</td>
<td><p>If per-message authentication is enabled, but User-level authentication is disabled, the BMC will assign a level of 'User' to any messages that are received with an Authentication Type=none. (Note that per-message and user-level authentication options only apply to multi-session channels.)</p>
<p>The BMC will then lower the assigned privilege limit, if necessary, based on the present session privilege limit that was set via the Set Session Privilege Level command</p>
<p>If the channel is session-less (e.g. IPMB), the BMC will return ‘None’ for the privilege level</p>
<p>0h=None (unspecified)</p>
<p>1h=Callback level</p>
<p>2h=User level</p>
<p>3h=Operator level</p>
<p>4h=Administrator level</p>
<p>5h=OEM Proprietary level</p>
<p>[3:0] channel number</p>
<p>Message Data. Max. Length &amp; format dependent on protocol associated with channel</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 发送消息（Send Message）

命令功能

发送消息。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>App 06h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>34h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Channel Number</p>
<p>[7:6] 00b=No tracking</p>
<p>The BMC reformats the message for the selected channel but does not track the originating channel, sequence number, or address information. This option is typically used when software sends a message from the system interface to another media</p>
<p>Software will typically use 'no tracking' when it delivers sends a message from the system interface to another channel, such as IPMB. In this case, software will format the encapsulated message so that when it appears on the other channel, it will appear to have been directly originated by BMC LUN 10b. See 6.12.1, BMC LUN 10b Routing</p>
<p>01b=Track Request</p>
<p>The BMC records the originating channel, sequence number, and addressing information for the requester, and then reformats the message for the protocol of the destination channel. When a response is returned, the BMC looks up the requester's information and format the response message with the framing and destination address information and reformats the response for delivery back to the requester. This option is used for delivering IPMI Request messages from non-SMS (non-system interface) channels. See IPMI 2.0R1E3 6.12.3, Send Message Command with Response Tracking</p>
<p>10b=Send Raw.</p>
<p>(optional) This option is primarily provided for test purposes. It may also be used for proprietary messaging purposes. The BMC simply delivers the encapsulated data to the selected channel in place of the IPMI Message data. Note that if the channel uses</p>
<p>sessions, the first byte of the Message Data field must be a Session Handle. The BMC should return a non-zero completion code if an attempt is made to use this option for a given channel and the option is not supported. It is recommended that completion code CCh be returned for this condition</p>
<p>11b=reserved</p>
<p>[5] 1b=Send message with encryption</p>
<p>BMC will return an error completion code if this encryption is unavailable.</p>
<p>0b=Encryption not required</p>
<p>The message will be sent unencrypted if that option is available under the given session. Otherwise, the message will be sent encrypted.</p>
<p>[4] 1b=Send message with authentication</p>
<p>BMC will return an error completion code if this authentication is unavailable.</p>
<p>0b=Authentication not required</p>
<p>Note behavior is dependent on whether authentication is used is depending on whether the target channel is running an IPMI v1.5 or IPMI v2.0/RMCP+ session, as follows:</p>
<ul>
<li><p>IPMI v1.5 sessions will default to sending the message with authentication if that option is available for the session</p></li>
<li><p>IPMI v2.0/RMCP+ sessions will send the message unauthenticated if that option is available under the session. Otherwise, the message will be sent with authentication</p></li>
</ul>
<p>[3:0] channel number to send message to</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>generic, plus additional command-specific completion codes:</p>
<p>80h=Invalid Session Handle.</p>
<p>The session handle does not match up with any currently active sessions for this channel.</p>
<p>If channel medium=IPMB, SMBus, or PCI Management Bus:</p>
<p>(This status is recommended for applications that need to access low-level I2C or SMBus devices.)</p>
<p>81h=Lost Arbitration</p>
<p>82h=Bus Error</p>
<p>83h=NAK on Write</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(2:N)*</td>
<td><p>Response Data</p>
<p>This data will only be present when using the Send Message command to originate requests from IPMB or PCI Management Bus to other channels such as LAN or serial/modem. It is not present in the response to a Send Message command delivered via the System Interface.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2">*注：带小括号部分表示这部分内容可能不存在。</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取频道信息（Get Channel Info）

命令功能

获取频道信息。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>App 06h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>42h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-channel number, Use Eh to get information about the channel this command is being executed from.</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-actual channel number, This value will typically match the channel number passed in the request, unless the request is for channel E, in which case the response returns the actual channel number</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><p>[7]-reserved</p>
<p>[6:0]-7-bit Channel Medium type: per Table 6-3, Channel Medium Type Numbers</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td><p>Channel Protocol Type:</p>
<p>[7:5]-reserved</p>
<p>[4:0]-5-bit Channel IPMI Messaging Protocol Type per Table 6-2, Channel Protocol Type Numbers</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Session support</p>
<p>[7:6]-00b=channel is session-less</p>
<p>01b=channel is single-session</p>
<p>10b=channel is multi-session</p>
<p>11b=channel is session-based (return this value if a channel could alternate between single- and multi-session operation, as can occur with a serial/modem channel that supports connection mode auto-detect.)</p>
<p>Number of sessions that have been activated on given channel</p>
<p>[5:0]-active session count, 1-based</p>
<p>00_0000b=no sessions have been activated on this channel</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6:8</td>
<td><p>Vendor ID (IANA Enterprise Number) for OEM/Organization that specified the Channel Protocol</p>
<p>Least significant byte first</p>
<p>Returns the IPMI IANA for IPMI-specification defined, non-OEM protocol type numbers other than OEM</p>
<p>The IPMI Enterprise Number is: 7154 (decimal)</p>
<p>This gives the values F2h, 1Bh, 00h for bytes 6 through 8, respectively. This value is returned for all channel protocols specified in this document, including PPP</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9:10</td>
<td><p>Auxiliary Channel Info</p>
<p>For Channel=Fh (System Interface):</p>
<p>byte 1: SMS Interrupt Type</p>
<p>00h-0Fh=IRQ 0 through 15, respectively</p>
<p>10h-13h=PCI A-D, respectively</p>
<p>14h=SMI</p>
<p>15h=SCI</p>
<p>20h-5Fh=system interrupt 0 through 63, respectively</p>
<p>60h=assigned by ACPI/Plug'n Play BIOS</p>
<p>FFh=no interrupt/unspecified</p>
<p>all other=reserved</p>
<p>byte 2: Event Message Buffer Interrupt Type</p>
<p>see values for byte 1</p>
<p>For OEM channel types:</p>
<p>byte 1:2=OEM specified per OEM identified by Vendor ID field</p>
<p>All other channel types:</p>
<p>byte 1:2=reserved</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 激活有效载荷（Activate Payload）

命令功能

激活有效载荷。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>App 06h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>48h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>[7:6]-reserved</p>
<p>[5:0]-payload type IPMI</p>
<p>Message payloads do not need to be explicitly activated. A payload that is required to be launched over a different port than that used to establish the initial IPMI session is only required to support the IPMI commands needed by the particular payload type</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>Payload Instance</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-payload instance, 1-based</p>
<p>0h=reserved</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3:16</td>
<td><p>Auxiliary Request Data. Additional payload-specific parameters to configure behavior of the payload when it becomes activated. Ignored if no auxiliary data is specified for given payload type</p>
<p>For Payload Type=SOL:</p>
<p>byte 1</p>
<p>[7]-Encryption Activation</p>
<p>Note: the encryption algorithms specified in this document must be used with Authentication. The BMC will return an error completion code if an attempt is made to activate encryption without also activating authentication</p>
<p>1b: Activate payload with encryption. All SOL payload data from the BMC will be encrypted, if encryption was negotiated at the time of session activation.</p>
<p>0b: Activate payload without encryption. BMC will send all SOL payload data unencrypted, if that option is allowed. (An SOL configuration parameter allows a system to be configured to require encryption for all SOL transfers.)</p>
<p>[6]-Authentication Activation</p>
<p>1b: Activate payload with authentication. All SOL payload data from the BMC will be authenticated, if authentication was negotiated at the time of session activation</p>
<p>0b: Activate payload without authentication. BMC will send all SOL payload data unauthenticated, if that option is allowed. (An SOL configuration parameter allows a system to be configured to require authentication for all SOL transfers.)</p>
<p>[5]-Test Mode (optional). Enables DCD/ and DSR to be manually controlled by the remote console and the reporting of RTS and DTR state via the SOL Operation/Status byte. This can be used to</p>
<p>facilitate software testing of the 16550 UART interface.</p>
<p>1b=activate test mode. If test mode is not supported, bit [0] of the auxiliary response data will be returned as 0b</p>
<p>0b=deactivate test mode</p>
<p>[:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:2]-Shared Serial Alert Behavior</p>
<p>The following settings are determine what happens to serial alerts if IPMI over Serial and SOL are sharing the same baseboard serial controller</p>
<p>11b: Reserved</p>
<p>10b: Serial/modem alerts succeed while SOL active</p>
<p>01b: Serial/modem alerts deferred while SOL active</p>
<p>00b: Serial/modem alerts fail while SOL active</p>
<p>[1]-SOL startup handshake</p>
<p>0b: BMC asserts CTS and DCD/DSR to baseboard upon activation</p>
<p>1b: CTS and DCD/DSR remain deasserted after activation</p>
<p>Remote console must send an SOL Payload packet with control field settings to assert CTS and DCD/DSR. (This enables the remote console to first alter volatile configuration settings before</p>
<p>hardware handshake is released.)</p>
<p>[0]-reserved</p>
<p>byte 2:4 reserved-write a 00h</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 56%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>Generic plus the following command-specific completion codes:</p>
<p>80h: Payload already active on another session (required).</p>
<p>This will be returned any time an attempt is made to activate a payload type when that type is already activated for another session, and when the BMC only supports one instance of that payload type running at a time.</p>
<p>81h: Payload type is disabled (optional). Given payload type is not configured to be enabled for activation.</p>
<p>82h: Payload activation limit reached. Cannot activate given payload type because the maximum number of simultaneous instances of that payload type are already running.</p>
<p>83h: Cannot activate payload with encryption.</p>
<p>84h: Cannot activate payload without encryption. BMC requires encryption for all payloads for given privilege level.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:5</td>
<td><p>Auxiliary Response Data, LS-byte first.</p>
<p>For Payload=SOL:</p>
<p>[31:1]-reserved. Return as 0s</p>
<p>[0]-0b=test mode not supported/enabled</p>
<p>1b=test mode enabled</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6:7</td>
<td><p>Inbound Payload Size</p>
<p>Maximum size of payload data field from remote console to BMC. Excludes size of confidentiality header and trailer fields, if any, 1-based.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8:9</td>
<td><p>Outbound Payload Size</p>
<p>Maximum size of payload data field from BMC to remote console. Excludes size of confidentiality header and trailer fields, if any, 1-based.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>10:11</td>
<td><p>Payload UDP Port Number</p>
<p>UDP port number that payload can be transferred over. If the port number is same as the port that was used to establish the IPMI session, then SOL payload transfers are now available under that IPMI session on that port.</p>
<p>Otherwise, the remote console will need to establish a separate IPMI Session to the specified Port Number using the same IP Address, username and password/key information that was used to establish the IPMI session. SOL payload transfers will then be available over that session.</p>
<p>If the remote console already has an IPMI session established on that port for a different payload type, the SOL payload type will now also be available over that session-provided that the session was established at a privilege level that matches the privilege level and authentication required for SOL.</p>
<p>Otherwise, the remote console will need to close that session and reestablish it at the necessary privilege level.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>12:13</td>
<td>Payload VLAN Number-FFFFh if VLAN addressing is not used.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 停用有效载荷（Deactivate Payload）

命令功能

停用有效载荷。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">

<col style="width: 57%" />

<tr>

<td>NetFn</td>
<td>App 06h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>

</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>[7:6]-reserved</p>
<p>[5:0]-payload type</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>Payload Instance</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-payload instance，1-based. 0h=reserved</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3:6</td>
<td><p>Payload Auxiliary Data, Additional parameters to configure behavior of the payload when it becomes deactivated. Ignored if no auxiliary data is specified for given payload type</p>

</tr>

<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>Generic plus the following command-specific completion codes:</p>
<p>80h: Payload already deactivated</p>
<p>81h: Payload type is disabled (optional). Given payload type is not configured to be enabled for activation</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取有效负载激活状态（Get Payload Activation Status）

命令功能

获取有效负载激活状态。

参数说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| NetFn | App 06h |
| CMD | 4Ah |
| 1 | Payload Type Number-Type number of the standard payload type or OEM Payload Handle to retrieve status for |

1.  Payload Type Numbers

<table style="width:83%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>number</th>
<th>type</th>
<th>major format version</th>
<th>minor format version</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td colspan="4">Standard Payload Types</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>0h</td>
<td>IPMI Message</td>
<td>1h</td>
<td>0h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1h</td>
<td>SOL (serial over LAN)</td>
<td>1h</td>
<td>0h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2h</td>
<td>OEM Explicit(When this payload type appears in the network header, it indicates that the packet includes explicit OEM IANA and OEM Payload ID fields that identify the payload type, instead of using an OEM Payload Type Handle to identify the type of payload contained in the packet. When used, this option adds 6 bytes to the overhead of the packet.)</td>
<td>OEM specified according to OEM IANA and OEM Payload ID.</td>
<td>OEM specified according to OEM IANA and OEM Payload ID.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="4">Session Setup Payload Types</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>10h</td>
<td>RMCP+ Open Session Request</td>
<td>1h</td>
<td>0h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>11h</td>
<td>RMCP+ Open Session Response</td>
<td>1h</td>
<td>0h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>12h</td>
<td>RAKP Message 1</td>
<td>1h</td>
<td>0h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>13h</td>
<td>RAKP Message 2</td>
<td>1h</td>
<td>0h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>14h</td>
<td>RAKP Message 3</td>
<td>1h</td>
<td>0h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>15h</td>
<td>RAKP Message 4</td>
<td>1h</td>
<td>0h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="4">OEM Payload Type Handles</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>20h-27h</td>
<td>Handle values for OEM payloads OEM0 through OEM7, respectively.</td>
<td>OEM specified according to OEM IANA and OEM Payload ID.</td>
<td>OEM specified according to OEM IANA and OEM Payload ID.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>all other</td>
<td>reserved</td>
<td></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The payload type number is a 6-bits (00h-3Fh).

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 56%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>Instance capacity</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-Number of instances of given payload type that can be simultaneously activated on BMC</p>
<p>1-based</p>
<p>0h=reserved</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><p>[7]-1b=instance 8 is activated.</p>
<p>0b=instance 8 is deactivated</p>
<p>[6]-1b=instance 7 is activated</p>
<p>0b=instance 7 is deactivated</p>
<p>…</p>
<p>[0]-1b=instance 1 is activated</p>
<p>0b=instance 1 is deactivated</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td><p>[7]-1b=instance 16 is activated</p>
<p>0b=instance 16 is deactivated</p>
<p>[6]-1b=instance 15 is activated</p>
<p>0b=instance 15 is deactivated</p>
<p>…</p>
<p>[0]-1b=instance 9 is activated</p>
<p>0b=instance 9 is deactivated</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取有效负载实例信息（Get Payload Instance Info）

命令功能

获取有效负载实例信息。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>App 06h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>4Bh</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Payload Type Number-Type number of the standard payload type or OEM Payload Handle to retrieve status for</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>Payload Instance</p>
<p>1-based</p>
<p>0h=reserved</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:5</td>
<td><p>Session ID-ID of session that instance is presently activated on. (The Managed System Session ID that the BMC generated when the session was activated)</p>
<p>00_00_00_00h if given instance is not activated. Remote software can use this information with the Get Session Info command to identify the remote console that presently is using a given payload type</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6:13</td>
<td><p>Payload-specific information (8-bytes)</p>
<p>For Payload Type=SOL:</p>
<p>Byte 1: Port Number, A number representing the system serial port that is being redirected</p>
<p>1-based</p>
<p>0h=unspecified, Used when more than one port can be redirected on a system</p>
<p>Byte 2:8=reserved</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 设置用户有效载荷访问（Set User Payload Access）

命令功能

设置用户有效载荷访问。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>App 06h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>4Ch</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Channel Number</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-Channel Number</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>[7:6]-Operation</p>
<p>00b=ENABLE.</p>
<p>Writing a "1b" to enable/disable bit ENABLES corresponding payload. Writing "0b" to bit causes no change to enabled/disabled state 01b=DISABLE.</p>
<p>Writing a "1b" to bit DISABLES corresponding payload. Writing 0b to bit causes no change to enabled/disabled state</p>
<p>10b, 11b=reserved</p>
<p>[5:0]-User ID, 000000b=reserved</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><p>Standard Payload enables 1</p>
<p>[7:2]-reserved for standard payloads</p>
<p>2-7 enable/disable bits</p>
<p>[1]-standard payload 1 (SOL) enable/disable</p>
<p>[0]-reserved, Note: IPMI Messsaging is enabled/disabled for users via the Set User Access command</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Standard Payload Enables 2-reserved</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>OEM Payload Enables 1</p>
<p>[7]-OEM Payload 7 enable/disable</p>
<p>[6]-OEM Payload 6 enable/disable</p>
<p>[5]-OEM Payload 5 enable/disable</p>
<p>[4]-OEM Payload 4 enable/disable</p>
<p>[3]-OEM Payload 3 enable/disable</p>
<p>[2]-OEM Payload 2 enable/disable</p>
<p>[1]-OEM Payload 1 enable/disable</p>
<p>[0]-OEM Payload 0 enable/disable</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>OEM Payload Enables 2-reserved</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>Note: an implementation will not return an error completion code if the user access level is set higher than the privilege limit for a given channel. If it is desired to bring attention to this condition, it is up to software to check the channel privilege limits set using the Set Channel Access command and provide notification of any mismatch</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取用户有效载荷访问（Get User Payload Access）

命令功能

获取用户有效载荷访问。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>App 06h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>4Dh</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Channel Number</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-Channel Number</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>User ID</p>
<p>[7:6]-reserved</p>
<p>[5:0]-User ID，000000b=reserved</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>Standard Payload enables 1</p>
<p>[7:2]-reserved for standard payloads</p>
<p>2-7 enabled/disabled state</p>
<p>[1]-1b=standard payload 1 enabled (SOL)</p>
<p>0b=standard payload 1 disabled</p>
<p>[0]-reserved</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>Standard Payload Enables 2-reserved</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td><p>OEM Payload Enables 1. For each bit:</p>
<p>1b=payload enabled</p>
<p>0b=payload disabled</p>
<p>[7]-OEM Payload 7 enabled/disabled</p>
<p>[6]-OEM Payload 6 enabled/disabled</p>
<p>[5]-OEM Payload 5 enabled/disabled</p>
<p>[4]-OEM Payload 4 enabled/disabled</p>
<p>[3]-OEM Payload 3 enabled/disabled</p>
<p>[2]-OEM Payload 2 enabled/disabled</p>
<p>[1]-OEM Payload 1 enabled/disabled</p>
<p>[0]-OEM Payload 0 enabled/disabled</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>OEM Payload Enables 2-reserved</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取通道有效载荷支持状态（Get Channel Payload Support）

命令功能

获取通道有效载荷支持。

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />

<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>

</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>App 06h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>4Eh</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Channel Number</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-Channel Number</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />

<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>[7]=Standard payload type #7 supported</p>
<p>…</p>
<p>[0]=Standard payload type #0 supported</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><p>[7]=Standard payload type #15 (0Fh) supported</p>
<p>…</p>
<p>[0]=Standard payload type #8 supported</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td><p>[7]=Session Setup payload type #7 supported</p>
<p>…</p>
<p>[0]=Session Setup payload type #0 supported</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>

<p>…</p>
<p>[0]=Session Setup payload type #8 supported</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>

<p>…</p>
<p>[0]=Payload type 20h (OEM0) used</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td><p>[7]=Payload type 2Fh (OEM15) used</p>
<p>…</p>
<p>[0]=Payload type 28h (OEM8) used</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8:9</td>
<td>reserved. Return as 0000h</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取通道有效载荷版本（Get Channel Payload Version）

命令功能

获取渠道有效载荷版本。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>App 06h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>4Fh</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Channel Number</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-Channel Number</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td>Payload Type Number/Payload Type Handle-number of the standard payload type or OEM Payload Handle to retrieve status for</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code, Generic plus following command-specific completion codes:</p>
<p>80h-Payload type not available on given channel</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>Format Version</p>
<p>[7:4]-Major Format Version. BCD encoded (0 to 9)</p>
<p>[3:0]-Minor Format Version. BCD encoded. (0 to 9)</p>
<p>Software should present version data to the user in the format "major.minor"-e.g. 10h → "1.0" The Format Version for the SOL payload implemented per this specification is 1.0 (10h)</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取iBMA状态（Get BMA State）

命令功能

获取iBMA状态。

参数说明

| 参数（字节） | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| NetFn | 30h |
| CMD | 93h |
| 1:3 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 4 | Sub command，子命令=30h |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>BMA state</p>
<p>0: Comunicate lost</p>
<p>1: BMA is runing</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 生效已上传文件（File Effective）

命令功能

生效已上传文件。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>93h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=0x41h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>File Resource ID见<a href="#d1e116736">表1 Resource ID</a>。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>[7:1]：reserved</p>
<p>[0]：级联标志</p>
<p>0=是最后一帧数据</p>
<p>1=后面还有数据</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td>Offset，写入的数据偏移，从0开始。当数据较长需要多次写入时，一定要从头到尾按顺序写入，不能乱序。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td>Length，写入长度</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9:N</td>
<td><p>file name</p>
<p>data</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

| 字节顺序 | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| 1 | Completion Code |
| 2:4 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |

## 获取BMC辅助固件信息（Get BMC Auxiliary Firmware Info）

命令功能

获取BMC辅助固件信息。

参数说明

| 参数（字节） | 域内容 |
|----|----|
| NetFn | 30h |
| CMD | 93h |
| 1:3 | Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。 |
| 4 | Sub command，子命令=65h |
| 5:6 | 预留扩展，填0。 |

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Version， BMC Platform Verify.</p>
<p>[7:4]-Version.V</p>
<ul>
<li><p>0-V100</p></li>
<li><p>1-V200</p></li>
<li><p>2-V3</p></li>
</ul>
<p>[3:0]-Version.R</p>
<ul>
<li><p>0-R001</p></li>
<li><p>1-R002</p></li>
</ul></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td><p>ECO-FT status</p>
<p>0：unsupport</p>
<p>1：support</p>
<p>2288v5机型专用，其他机型“ECO-FT status”统一返回0</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 上传资源到iMana（Upload resource to iMana）

命令功能

上传资源到iMana。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>30h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>94h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1:3</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Sub command，子命令=05h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Operation type:</p>
<p>AAh initiate upload</p>
<p>00h get upload status</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>Resource ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7*</td>
<td><p>Flag</p>
<p>[7]: 级联标志</p>
<p>0=是最后一帧数据</p>
<p>1=后面还有数据</p>
<p>[6:0]: Offset，资源路径名的数据偏移，从0开始当资源路径名较长需要多次传输时，一定要从头到尾按顺序传输，不能乱序。</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8*</td>
<td>Length，传输长度</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9*</td>
<td>Resource name，绝对路径名</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2">注：*号部分只有在Operation type为AA的时候才需要传输。</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2:4</td>
<td>Manufacturer ID，LS Byte first。长度固定3个字节，例如，某厂家ID是2011，对应十六进制为0x0007DB，则字节序为第1个字节为DBh、第2个字节为07h、第3个字节为00h。</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Upload progress</p>
<p>[7]-status</p>
<p>0h=Upload in progress</p>
<p>1h=Upload completed</p>
<p>[6:0]-Upload progress percentage</p>
<p>（目前还无法获取百分比，预留为0）</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取通道密码套件（Get Channel Cipher Suites）

命令功能

获取通道密码套件。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>App 06h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>54h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Channel Number</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-channel number</p>
<p>0h-Bh, Fh=channel numbers</p>
<p>Eh=retrieve information for channel this request was issued on</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>Payload Type</p>
<p>[7:6]-reserved</p>
<p>[5:0]-Payload Type number Typically 00h (IPMI)</p>
<p>The Payload Type number is used to look up the Security Algorithm support when establishing a separate session for a given payload type</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><p>List Index</p>
<p>[7]-1b=list algorithms by Cipher Suite</p>
<p>0b=list supported algorithms</p>
<p>[6]-reserved</p>
<p>[5:0]-List index (00h-3Fh), 0h selects the first set of 16, 1h selects the next set of 16, and so on</p>
<p>00h=Get first set of algorithm numbers. The BMC returns sixteen (16) bytes at a time per index, starting from index 00h, until the list data is exhausted, at which point it will 0 bytes or &lt;16 bytes of list data</p>
<p>Notes:</p>
<p>When listing numbers for supported algorithms, the BMC returns a list of the algorithm numbers for each algorithm that the BMC supports on a given channel</p>
<p>Each algorithm is listed consecutively and only listed once. There is no requirement that the BMC return the algorithm numbers in any specific order</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>Channel Number</p>
<p>Channel number that the Authentication Algorithms are being returned for. If the channel number in the request was set to Eh, this will return the channel number for the channel that the request was received on</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>(3:18)</td>
<td><p>Cipher Suite Record data bytes, Cipher Suite Record Format. Record data is 'packed', there are no pad bytes between records. It is possible that record data will span across multiple List Index values</p>
<p>The BMC returns sixteen (16) bytes at a time per index, starting from index 00h, until the list data is exhausted, at which point it will 0 bytes or &lt;16 bytes of list data</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 挂起/恢复有效负载加密（Suspend/Resume Payload Encryption）

命令功能

挂起/恢复有效负载加密。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>App 06h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>55h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>[7:6]-reserved</p>
<p>[5:0]-payload type</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>Payload Instance</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-payload instance</p>
<p>1-based</p>
<p>0h=reserved</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><p>[7:2]-reserved</p>
<p>[4:0]-Operation</p>
<p>2h=Regenerate initialization vector</p>
<p>For xRC4 encryption, this causes the BMC to reinitialize the xRC4 state machine, reset the data</p>
<p>offset, and deliver a new Initialization Vector value in the next encrypted packet it sends to the remote console. Because of processing delays and potential tasks in progress, the remote console may receive additional packets from the BMC that are encrypted using the prior Initialization Vector before getting packets that use the new IV</p>
<p>1h=Resume/Start encryption on all transfers of specified payload data from the BMC</p>
<p>0h=Suspend encryption on all transfers of specified payload messages from the BMC</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

1.  Payload Type Numbers

<table style="width:83%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th><strong>number</strong></th>
<th><strong>type</strong></th>
<th><strong>major format version</strong></th>
<th><strong>minor format version</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td colspan="4">Standard Payload Types</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>0h</td>
<td>IPMI Message</td>
<td>1h</td>
<td>0h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1h</td>
<td>SOL (serial over LAN)</td>
<td>1h</td>
<td>0h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2h</td>
<td>OEM Explicit(When this payload type appears in the network header, it indicates that the packet includes explicit OEM IANA and OEM Payload ID fields that identify the payload type, instead of using an OEM Payload Type Handle to identify the type of payload contained in the packet. When used, this option adds 6 bytes to the overhead of the packet.)</td>
<td>OEM specified according to OEM IANA and OEM Payload ID.</td>
<td>OEM specified according to OEM IANA and OEM Payload ID.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="4">Session Setup Payload Types</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>10h</td>
<td>RMCP+ Open Session Request</td>
<td>1h</td>
<td>0h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>11h</td>
<td>RMCP+ Open Session Response</td>
<td>1h</td>
<td>0h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>12h</td>
<td>RAKP Message 1</td>
<td>1h</td>
<td>0h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>13h</td>
<td>RAKP Message 2</td>
<td>1h</td>
<td>0h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>14h</td>
<td>RAKP Message 3</td>
<td>1h</td>
<td>0h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>15h</td>
<td>RAKP Message 4</td>
<td>1h</td>
<td>0h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="4">OEM Payload Type Handles</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>20h-27h</td>
<td>Handle values for OEM payloads OEM0 through OEM7, respectively.</td>
<td>OEM specified according to OEM IANA and OEM Payload ID.</td>
<td>OEM specified according to OEM IANA and OEM Payload ID.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>all other</td>
<td>reserved</td>
<td></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The payload type number is a 6-bits (00h-3Fh).

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>Generic plus the following command-specific completion codes:</p>
<p>80h: Operation not supported for given payload type</p>
<p>81h: Operation not allowed under present configuration for given payload type</p>
<p>82h: Encryption is not available for session that payload type is active under</p>
<p>83h: The payload instance is not presently active</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取系统接口功能（Get System Interface Capabilities）

命令功能

获取系统接口功能。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>App 06h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>57h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>System Interface Type</p>
<p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-System Interface Type (For BT use the Get BT Interface Capabilities command)</p>
<p>0h=SSIF</p>
<p>1h=KCS</p>
<p>2h=SMIC</p>
<p>all other=reserved</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 58%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Completion Code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td>Reserved, Returned as 00h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2">For System Interface Type=SSIF:</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><p>[7:6]-Transaction support</p>
<p>00b=only single-part reads/writes supported</p>
<p>01b=multi-part reads/writes supported. Start and End transactions only.</p>
<p>10b=multi-part reads/writes supported. Start, Middle, and End transactions supported</p>
<p>11b=reserved</p>
<p>[5:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3]-PEC support</p>
<p>1b=implements PEC. BMC will start using PEC in read transactions after it receives any SSIF write transaction that includes a valid PEC. The BMC ceases using PEC if it receives an SSIF write transaction that does not include PEC</p>
<p>0b=does not support PEC. Note that a BMC implementation may reject write transactions that include a PEC byte</p>
<p>[2:0]-SSIF Version</p>
<p>000b=version 1 (version defined in this specification)</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td><p>Input message size in bytes. (1 based)</p>
<p>Number of bytes of IPMI message data that the BMC can accept</p>
<p>This number does not include slave address, SMBus length, PEC, or SMBus CMD bytes, just the IPMI message data</p>
<p>A BMC that just supports single-part writes would return 32 (20h) for this value</p>
<p>A BMC that supports multi-part Start and End would return a value from 33 to 64. A BMC that supports multi-part with Middle transactions would return a value from 65 to 255</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td><p>Output message size in bytes. (1 based)</p>
<p>Maximum number of bytes of IPMI message data that can be read from the BMC. This number does not include slave address, SMBus length, PEC, SMBus CMD bytes, special bytes (such as the special bytes following the length byte in the multi-part read middle and end transactions) just the IPMI message data</p>
<p>A BMC that just supports single-part reads would return 20h (32) for this value</p>
<p>A BMC that supports multi-part Start and End would return a value from 33 to 62 (the reason this is 62 instead of 64 is that there are two special bytes after the length byte.)</p>
<p>A BMC that supports multi-part with Middle transactions would return a value from 63 to 255</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2">For System Interface Type=KCS or SMIC</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><p>[7:3]-reserved</p>
<p>[2:0]-System Interface Version</p>
<p>000b=<sup>version 1 (conformant with KCS or SMIC interface as defined in this specification)</sup></p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td><p>Input maximum message size in bytes. (1 based)</p>
<p>Largest number of bytes that can be transferred in a KCS FFh means 255 or more</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 设置频道访问（Set Channel Access）

命令功能

设置频道访问。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 24%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>NetFn</td>
<td>App 06h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>CMD</td>
<td>40h</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>[7:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-Channel number</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td><p>[7:6]-00b=don't set or change Channel Access</p>
<p>01b=set non-volatile Channel Access according to bits [5:0]</p>
<p>10b=set volatile (active) setting of Channel Access according to bits</p>
<p>[5:0]</p>
<p>11b=reserved</p>
<p>[5]-PEF Alerting Enable/Disable</p>
<p>0b=enable PEF Alerting</p>
<p>1b=disable PEF Alerting on this channel (the Alert Immediate command can still be used to generate alerts)</p>
<p>[4]-0b=enable Per-message Authentication</p>
<p>1b=disable Per-message Authentication. [Authentication required to activate any session on this channel, but authentication not used on subsequent packets for the session.]</p>
<p>[3]-User Level Authentication Enable/Disable</p>
<p>Optional. Return a CCh 'invalid data field' error completion code if an attempt is made to set this bit, but the option is not supported.</p>
<p>0b=enable User Level Authentication. All User Level commands are to be authenticated per the Authentication Type that was negotiated when the session was activated</p>
<p>1b=disable User Level Authentication. Allow User Level commands to be executed without being authenticated</p>
<p>If the option to disable User Level Command authentication is accepted, the BMC will accept packets with Authentication Type set to None if they contain user level commands</p>
<p>For outgoing packets, the BMC returns responses with the same Authentication Type that was used for the request</p>
<p>[2:0]-Access Mode for IPMI messaging (PEF Alerting is enabled/disabled separately from IPMI messaging, see bit 5)</p>
<p>000b=disabled</p>
<p>channel disabled for IPMI messaging</p>
<p>001b=pre-boot only</p>
<p>channel only available when system is in a powered down state or in BIOS prior to start of boot</p>
<p>010b=always available channel always available for communication regardless of system mode. BIOS typically dedicates the serial connection to the BMC</p>
<p>011b=shared same as always available, but BIOS typically leaves the serial port available for software use</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td><p>Channel Privilege Level Limit. This value sets the maximum privilege level that can be accepted on the specified channel</p>
<p>[7:6]-00b=don't set or change channel Privilege Level Limit</p>
<p>01b=set non-volatile Privilege Level Limit according to bits [3:0]</p>
<p>10b=set volatile setting of Privilege Level Limit according to bits [3:0]</p>
<p>11b=reserved</p>
<p>[5:4]-reserved</p>
<p>[3:0]-Channel Privilege Level Limit</p>
<p>0h=reserved</p>
<p>1h=CALLBACK level</p>
<p>2h=USER level</p>
<p>3h=OPERATOR level</p>
<p>4h=ADMINISTRATOR level</p>
<p>5h=OEM Proprietary level</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

响应说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 57%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字节顺序</th>
<th>域内容</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td><p>Completion Code</p>
<p>generic, plus following command-specific completion codes:</p>
<p>82h=set not supported on selected channel (e.g. channel is sessionless)</p>
<p>83h=access mode not supported</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## 获取频道访问（Get Channel Access）

命令功能

获取频道访问。

参数说明

<table style="width:82%;">
<colgroup>

<thead>
<tr>

</tr>
<tr>

<tr>

</tr>
<tr>

<p>01b=get non-volatile Channel Access</p>

<table style="width:82%;">
